          "body": "Hi Steven,\n\nWe're building an AI assistant that's always one step ahead for SG food processors.\n\nIt proactively checks in - running daily reconciliation of export invoices against packing lists, tracking missing Health Certificates or COOs and sending automated reminders, or giving you morning updates on export documents awaiting approval or submission - all without you having to ask.\n\nYou just WhatsApp or email it instructions and it does your back office work around the clock.\n\nWe're a Cambridge-backed group with a working prototype to demo, but this isn't a sales call.         "email_2": {
          "subject": "Steven <> Seth",
          "body": "Hi Steven,\n\nI did some digging into HSC International and had a few ideas on where we could save time:\n\n- Audit-ready reconciliation of export invoices with packing lists for HSC International.\n- Generate 99% accurate Health Certificates and COOs from shipment data.\n- Catch what humans miss in Halal Cert applications to avoid rejections.\n\nHave you solved for export documentation prep or is your team still doing it manually?\n\nIf we could help you do the same and save 10+ hours a week, automatically from WhatsApp, email or any chat app you already use, would that be interesting?\n\nBest,\nSeth",

          "body": "Hi Steven,\n\nMy co-founder and I are building a startup in Singapore to support local businesses and we wanted to reach out because your expertise could save us a ton of mistakes.\n\nGiven your experience in food, I was hoping to get your opinion.\n\nFor some background, we spoke with senior government leaders last week at Smart Nation - they shared that SMEs in underserved areas stand to gain the most from AI compared to MNCs.\n\nWe're now looking to figure out which are the biggest pain points food trading companies face and 30 minutes of your time would make a huge difference.\n\nWe're a Cambridge led group, based in SG, and have a prototype, but this is in no way a sales call.\n\nIf you could just email or WhatsApp an AI assistant your export documents and get back audit-ready, reconciled export document packages in Excel, would that be useful?\n\nWould you be open to a quick chat to point us in the right direction?\n\nBest,\nSeth\n\nP.S.     "6": {
      "company_name": "6",
      "stage1_status": "completed",
      "stage2_status": "pending",
      "stage1_result": {
        "company_name": "Bhavna",
        "contact_name": "Srinivasan Ananthanrayan",
        "contact_email": "srinivasan@bhavna.com.sg",
        "email_1": {
          "subject": "quick question on food",
          "body": "Hi Srinivasan,\n\nWe're building an AI assistant that's always one step ahead for SG food wholesalers.\n\nIt proactively checks in - running daily reconciliations of supplier invoices, tracking missing export health certifications, or giving you morning updates on key shipment documents - all without you having to ask.\n\nYou just WhatsApp or email it instructions and it does your back office work around the clock.\n\nWe're a Cambridge-backed group with a working prototype to demo, but this isn't a sales call. We're trying to learn what food teams actually find useful, what pain points keep coming up, and how you're thinking about future-proofing the business. 30 minutes of your time would make a big difference.\n\nI know you're busy, so let me know what time is best for a call or I can drop by your office at Pereira Road if that's easier!\n\nBest,\nSeth",
          "ps_used": "Generic P.S. option"
        },
        "email_2": {
          "subject": "Srinivasan <> Seth",
          "body": "Hi Srinivasan,\n\nI did some digging into Bhavna and had a few ideas on where we could save time:\n\n- Get 99% accurate data extracted from Bhavna's supplier invoices.\n- Achieve audit-ready reconciliation of export shipment documents.\n- Flag inconsistencies in purchase orders that humans might miss.\n\nHave you solved for export documentation prep or is your team still doing it manually?\n\nIf we could help you do the same and save 10+ hours a week, automatically from WhatsApp, email or any chat app you already use, would that be interesting?\n\nBest,\nSeth",
          "ideas_used": [
            "Get 99% accurate data extracted from Bhavna's supplier invoices.",
            "Achieve audit-ready reconciliation of export shipment documents.",
            "Flag inconsistencies in purchase orders that humans might miss."
          ]
        },
        "email_3": {
          "subject": "Re: quick question on food",
          "body": "Hi Srinivasan,\n\nMy co-founder and I are building a startup in Singapore to support local businesses and we wanted to reach out because your expertise could save us a ton of mistakes.\n\nNoticed Bhavna published 'Sustainability and Green Compliance in FMCG Logistics' - figured you'd have perspective on how operations are scaling.\n\nFor some background, we spoke with senior government leaders last week at Smart Nation - they shared that SMEs in underserved areas stand to gain the most from AI compared to MNCs.\n\nWe're now looking to figure out which are the biggest pain points food trading companies face and 30 minutes of your time would make a huge difference.\n\nWe're a Cambridge led group, based in SG, and have a prototype, but this is in no way a sales call.\n\nIf you could just email or WhatsApp an AI assistant your export documents and get back audit-ready reconciliation in Excel, would that be useful?\n\nWould you be open to a quick chat to point us in the right direction?\n\nBest,\nSeth\n\nP.S. Happy to drop by your office at Pereira Road if that's easier!",
          "hook_used": "News",
          "value_line": "just email or WhatsApp an AI assistant your export documents and get back audit-ready reconciliation in Excel",
          "value_line_source": "document_pain_analysis, company_profile"
        },
        "linkedin_message": {
          "message": "N/A",
          "hook_used": "none",
          "generated": false
        },
        "voice_note": {
          "script": "N/A",
          "location_used": "none",
          "generated": false
        }
      },

        "email_1": {
          "subject": "quick question on food",
          "body": "Hi Hanif,\n\nWe're building an AI assistant that's always one step ahead for SG food traders.\n\nIt proactively checks in - providing daily reports on shipment document status, tracking pending Health Cert applications and sending follow-ups, or giving you morning updates on document discrepancies across shipment bundles - all without you having to ask.\n\nYou just WhatsApp or email it instructions and it does your back office work around the clock.\n\nWe're a Cambridge-backed group with a working prototype to demo, but this isn't a sales call. We're trying to learn what food teams actually find useful, what pain points keep coming up, and how you're thinking about future-proofing the business. 30 minutes of your time would make a big difference.\n\nI know you're busy, so let me know what time is best for a call or I can drop by your office at Tong Eng Building if that's easier!\n\nBest,\nSeth\n\nP.S. Before our call, I can train our AI on your Halal + health cert stack so you can see exactly how it handles the compliance docs for Nomanbhoy & Sons.",
          "ps_used": "Halal certified"
        },
        "email_2": {
          "subject": "Hanif <> Seth",
          "body": "Hi Hanif,\n\nI did some digging into Nomanbhoy & Sons and had a few ideas on where we could save time:\n\n- Generate audit-ready Commercial Invoices and Packing Lists from one entry.\n- Extract 99% accurate data from supplier invoices for efficient processing.\n- Flag discrepancies across COO, Health Cert, and Bill of Lading for Nomanbhoy & Sons.\n\nHave you solved for export documentation prep or is your team still doing it manually?\n\nIf we could help you do the same and save 10+ hours a week, automatically from WhatsApp, email or any chat app you already use, would that be interesting?\n\nBest,\nSeth",
          "ideas_used": [
            "Generate audit-ready Commercial Invoices and Packing Lists from one entry.",
            "Extract 99% accurate data from supplier invoices for efficient processing.",
            "Flag discrepancies across COO, Health Cert, and Bill of Lading for Nomanbhoy & Sons."
          ]
        },
        "email_3": {
          "subject": "Re: quick question on food",
          "body": "Hi Hanif,\n\nMy co-founder and I are building a startup in Singapore to support local businesses and we wanted to reach out because your expertise could save us a ton of mistakes.\n\nGiven your experience in food, I was hoping to get your opinion.\n\nFor some background, we spoke with senior government leaders last week at Smart Nation - they shared that SMEs in underserved areas stand to gain the most from AI compared to MNCs.\n\nWe're now looking to figure out which are the biggest pain points food trading companies face and 30 minutes of your time would make a huge difference.\n\nWe're a Cambridge led group, based in SG, and have a prototype, but this is in no way a sales call.\n\nIf you could just email or WhatsApp an AI assistant your export documentation bundle and get back an audit-ready reconciliation of all shipment details in Excel, would that be useful?\n\nWould you be open to a quick chat to point us in the right direction?\n\nBest,\nSeth\n\nP.S. Happy to drop by your office at Tong Eng Building if that's easier!",
          "hook_used": "Fallback",
          "value_line": "just email or WhatsApp an AI assistant your export documentation bundle and get back an audit-ready reconciliation of all shipment details in Excel",
          "value_line_source": "document_pain_analysis"
        },
        "linkedin_message": {
          "message": "Seth here. Given your experience leading Nomanbhoy & Sons, I was hoping to get your opinion. Emailed you about our idea for a WhatsApp AI assistant that does back office work around the clock - sending a voice note too in case it missed you!",
          "hook_used": "C-suite",
          "generated": true
        },
        "voice_note": {
          "script": "Hi Hanif, I'm building an AI startup in Singapore focused on automating heavy back-office paperwork - a gap recently highlighted to us by government leaders in Smart Nation.\n\nWe're a Cambridge-led team with a working prototype, and I'd love 20 minutes of your time to ensure we're solving the right pain points for firms like Nomanbhoy & Sons.\n\nThis isn't a sales call - just looking for your perspective.\n\nHappy to buy you lunch near your office at Tong Eng Building as a thank you.           "body": "Hi Jack,\n\nWe're building an AI assistant that's always one step ahead for SG food wholesalers.\n\nIt proactively checks in - running daily reconciliation of supplier invoices against purchase orders, tracking missing shipping documents and sending reminders, or giving you morning updates on expired health certificates or import permits - all without you having to ask.\n\nYou just WhatsApp or email it instructions and it does your back office work around the clock.\n\nWe're a Cambridge-backed group with a working prototype to demo, but this isn't a sales call.           "body": "Hi Bessie,\n\nMy co-founder and I are building a startup in Singapore to support local businesses and we wanted to reach out because your expertise could save us a ton of mistakes.\n\nGiven your experience in food, I was hoping to get your opinion.\n\nFor some background, we spoke with senior government leaders last week at Smart Nation - they shared that SMEs in underserved areas stand to gain the most from AI compared to MNCs.\n\nWe're now looking to figure out which are the biggest pain points food trading companies face and 30 minutes of your time would make a huge difference.\n\nWe're a Cambridge led group, based in SG, and have a prototype, but this is in no way a sales call.\n\nIf you could just email or WhatsApp an AI assistant your Commercial Invoices and Packing Lists and get back an audit-ready reconciliation in Excel showing all discrepancies, would that be useful?\n\nWould you be open to a quick chat to point us in the right direction?\n\nBest,\nSeth\n\nP.S.         "company_name": "Wanin Industries",
        "contact_name": "Jerry Tan Tjin Hong",
        "contact_email": "jerrytan@pereocean.com",
        "email_1": {
          "subject": "quick question on Food Wholesaler",
          "body": "Hi Jerry, We're building an AI assistant that's always one step ahead for SG food wholesalers. It proactively checks in - running daily reconciliation of invoices, packing lists, and B/Ls for consistency, tracking pending certificate approvals (COO, Health, Halal) and sending reminders, or giving you morning updates on critical export documents awaiting review - all without you having to ask. You just WhatsApp or email it instructions and it does your back office work around the clock. We're a Cambridge-backed group with a working prototype to demo, but this isn't a sales call. We're trying to learn what food teams actually find useful, what pain points keep coming up, and how you're thinking about future-proofing the business. 30 minutes of your time would make a big difference. I know you're busy, so let me know what time is best for a call or I can drop by your office at Senoko Road if that's easier! Best,\nSeth P.S. Before our call, I can train our AI on your export documents so you can see exactly what we'd catch for Pere Ocean.",
          "ps_used": "Generic"
        },
        "email_2": {
          "subject": "Jerry <> Seth",
          "body": "Hi Jerry, I did some digging into Pere Ocean and had a few ideas on where we could save time: - Extract 99% accurate data from all Pere Ocean's Commercial Invoices and Packing Lists. - Generate audit-ready COO and Health Certificates, perfectly consistent with shipment details. - Flag critical inconsistencies across your export documentation set, catching human errors. Have you solved for export documentation prep or is your team still doing it manually? If we could help you do the same and save 10+ hours a week, automatically from WhatsApp, email or any chat app you already use, would that be interesting? Best,\nSeth",
          "ideas_used": [
            "Extract 99% accurate data from all Pere Ocean's Commercial Invoices and Packing Lists.",
            "Generate audit-ready COO and Health Certificates, perfectly consistent with shipment details.",
            "Flag critical inconsistencies across your export documentation set, catching human errors."

        },

        "email_1": {
          "subject": "quick question on food wholesale",
          "body": "Hi Grace,\n\nWe're building an AI assistant that's always one step ahead for SG food wholesalers.\n\nIt proactively checks in - running daily reconciliations of purchase orders against supplier invoices, tracking pending health certificate applications and sending reminders, or giving morning updates on critical export documentation statuses - all without you having to ask.\n\nYou just WhatsApp or email it instructions and it does your back office work around the clock.\n\nWe're a Cambridge-backed group with a working prototype to demo, but this isn't a sales call. We're trying to learn what food teams actually find useful, what pain points keep coming up, and how you're thinking about future-proofing the business. 30 minutes of your time would make a big difference.\n\nI know you're busy, so let me know what time is best for a call or I can drop by your office at Pereira Road if that's easier!\n\nBest,\nSeth\n\nP.S. Before our call, I can train our AI on your export documents so you can see exactly what we'd catch for Bhavna.",
          "ps_used": "generic export documents"
        },
        "email_2": {
          "subject": "Grace <> Seth",
          "body": "Hi Grace,\n\nI did some digging into Bhavna and had a few ideas on where we could save time:\n\n- Extract 99% accurate data from Bhavna's commercial invoices for faster processing.\n- Generate audit-ready packing lists and cross-check with purchase orders for consistency.\n- Flag discrepancies across shipment documents that humans miss before SFA or TradeNet submission.\n\nHave you solved for export documentation prep or is your team still doing it manually?\n\nIf we could help you do the same and save 10+ hours a week, automatically from WhatsApp, email or any chat app you already use, would that be interesting?\n\nBest,\nSeth",
          "ideas_used": [
            "Extract 99% accurate data from Bhavna's commercial invoices for faster processing.",
            "Generate audit-ready packing lists and cross-check with purchase orders for consistency.",
            "Flag discrepancies across shipment documents that humans miss before SFA or TradeNet submission."
          ]
        },
        "email_3": {
          "subject": "Re: quick question on food wholesale",
          "body": "Hi Grace,\n\nMy co-founder and I are building a startup in Singapore to support local businesses and we wanted to reach out because your expertise could save us a ton of mistakes.\n\nNoticed Bhavna published 'Sustainability and Green Compliance in FMCG Logistics' - figured you'd have perspective on how operations are scaling.\n\nFor some background, we spoke with senior government leaders last week at Smart Nation - they shared that SMEs in underserved areas stand to gain the most from AI compared to MNCs.\n\nWe're now looking to figure out which are the biggest pain points food trading companies face and 30 minutes of your time would make a huge difference.\n\nWe're a Cambridge led group, based in SG, and have a prototype, but this is in no way a sales call.\n\nIf you could just email or WhatsApp an AI assistant your shipment details and get back a complete set of clean, ready to import export documents in Excel, would that be useful?\n\nWould you be open to a quick chat to point us in the right direction?\n\nBest,\nSeth\n\nP.S.           "body": "Hi Jeremy,\n\nI did some digging into Chia Seng Global Fresh and had a few ideas on where we could save time:\n\n- Extract 99% accurate data from Chia Seng's commercial invoices and packing lists.\n- Generate complete, audit-ready COO and Health Certificates for shipments.\n- Flag discrepancies across all your export documents that humans miss.\n\nHave you solved for export documentation prep or is your team still doing it manually?\n\nIf we could help you do the same and save 10+ hours a week, automatically from WhatsApp, email or any chat app you already use, would that be interesting?\n\nBest,\nSeth",

            "Generate complete, audit-ready COO and Health Certificates for shipments.",

          "body": "Hi Jeremy,\n\nMy co-founder and I are building a startup in Singapore to support local businesses and we wanted to reach out because your expertise could save us a ton of mistakes.\n\nGiven your 26+ years in the industry, I was hoping to get your opinion.\n\nFor some background, we spoke with senior government leaders last week at Smart Nation - they shared that SMEs in underserved areas stand to gain the most from AI compared to MNCs.\n\nWe're now looking to figure out which are the biggest pain points food trading companies face and 30 minutes of your time would make a huge difference.\n\nWe're a Cambridge led group, based in SG, and have a prototype, but this is in no way a sales call.\n\nIf you could just email or WhatsApp an AI assistant your export and import documents and get back an audit-ready reconciliation in Excel, would that be useful?\n\nWould you be open to a quick chat to point us in the right direction?\n\nBest,\nSeth\n\nP.S.           "body": "Hi Sharon,\n\nWe're building an AI assistant that's always one step ahead for SG food wholesalers.\n\nIt proactively checks in - running daily reconciliations of incoming wholesale orders against inventory, tracking missing batch records for traceability and sending follow-ups, or giving you morning updates on invoices awaiting dispatch approval - all without you having to ask.\n\nYou just WhatsApp or email it instructions and it does your back office work around the clock.\n\nWe're a Cambridge-backed group with a working prototype to demo, but this isn't a sales call.           "body": "Hi Ken,\n\nMy co-founder and I are building a startup in Singapore to support local businesses and we wanted to reach out because your expertise could save us a ton of mistakes.\n\nGiven your experience in food, I was hoping to get your opinion.\n\nFor some background, we spoke with senior government leaders last week at Smart Nation - they shared that SMEs in underserved areas stand to gain the most from AI compared to MNCs.\n\nWe're now looking to figure out which are the biggest pain points food trading companies face and 30 minutes of your time would make a huge difference.\n\nWe're a Cambridge led group, based in SG, and have a prototype, but this is in no way a sales call.\n\nIf you could just email or WhatsApp an AI assistant your export documents and get back audit-ready export documentation sets in PDF, would that be useful?\n\nWould you be open to a quick chat to point us in the right direction?\n\nBest,\nSeth\n\nP.S. Happy to drop by your office at Chin Bee Avenue if that's easier!",

        "email_1": {
          "subject": "quick question on Food Processor",
          "body": "Hi Jocelyn,\n\nWe're building an AI assistant that's always one step ahead for SG food processors.\n\nIt proactively checks in - running daily reconciliation of Commercial Invoices and Packing Lists, tracking pending Health Certificates and sending automated reminders, or giving you morning updates on critical export documents awaiting approval - all without you having to ask.\n\nYou just WhatsApp or email it instructions and it does your back office work around the clock.\n\nWe're a Cambridge-backed group with a working prototype to demo, but this isn't a sales call.           "ps_used": "Generic P.S. from Industry Context"
        },
        "email_2": {
          "subject": "Jocelyn <> Seth",
          "body": "Hi Jocelyn,\n\nI did some digging into JR Vending and had a few ideas on where we could save time:\n\n- Extract 99% accurate data from Purchase Orders for manufacturing.\n- Get audit-ready validation of export documents like COOs and Health Certs.\n- Flag discrepancies across shipment docs before SFA or bank submission for JR Vending.\n\nHave you solved for export documentation prep or is your team still doing it manually?\n\nIf we could help you do the same and save 10+ hours a week, automatically from WhatsApp, email or any chat app you already use, would that be interesting?\n\nBest,\nSeth",
          "ideas_used": [
            "Extract 99% accurate data from Purchase Orders for manufacturing.",
            "Get audit-ready validation of export documents like COOs and Health Certs.",
            "Flag discrepancies across shipment docs before SFA or bank submission for JR Vending."

\u043e\u0436\u0438\u0434\u0430\u044e\u0449\u0438\u0435 \u0441\u0435\u0440\u0442\u0438\u0444\u0438\u043a\u0430\u0442\u044b \u0437\u0434\u043e\u0440\u043e\u0432\u044c\u044f \u0438 \u043e\u0442\u043f\u0440\u0430\u0432\u043b\u044f\u0435\u0442 \u043d\u0430\u043f\u043e\u043c\u0438\u043d\u0430\u043d\u0438\u044f, \u0438\u043b\u0438 \u0434\u0430\u0435\u0442 \u0432\u0430\u043c \u0443\u0442\u0440\u0435\u043d\u043d\u0438\u0435 \u043e\u0431\u043d\u043e\u0432\u043b\u0435\u043d\u0438\u044f \u043e \u0441\u0442\u0430\u0442\u0443\u0441\u0430\u0445 \u043a\u0440\u0438\u0442\u0438\u0447\u0435\u0441\u043a\u0438 \u0432\u0430\u0436\u043d\u044b\u0445 \u044d\u043a\u0441\u043f\u043e\u0440\u0442\u043d\u044b\u0445 \u0434\u043e\u043a\u0443\u043c\u0435\u043d\u0442\u043e\u0432 \u2014 \u0438 \u0432\u0441\u0435 \u044d\u0442\u043e \u0431\u0435\u0437 \u0432\u0430\u0448\u0435\u0433\u043e \u0443\u0447\u0430\u0441\u0442\u0438\u044f. \u0412\u0430\u043c \u043f\u0440\u043e\u0441\u0442\u043e \u043d\u0443\u0436\u043d\u043e \u043e\u0442\u043f\u0440\u0430\u0432\u0438\u0442\u044c \u0438\u043d\u0441\u0442\u0440\u0443\u043a\u0446\u0438\u0438 \u043f\u043e WhatsApp \u0438\u043b\u0438 \u044d\u043b\u0435\u043a\u0442\u0440\u043e\u043d\u043d\u043e\u0439 \u043f\u043e\u0447\u0442\u0435, \u0438 \u043e\u043d \u0431\u0443\u0434\u0435\u0442 \u043a\u0440\u0443\u0433\u043b\u043e\u0441\u0443\u0442\u043e\u0447\u043d\u043e \u0432\u044b\u043f\u043e\u043b\u043d\u044f\u0442\u044c \u0432\u0430\u0448\u0443 \u0431\u044d\u043a-\u043e\u0444\u0438\u0441\u043d\u0443\u044e \u0440\u0430\u0431\u043e\u0442\u0443. \u041c\u044b \u2014 \u043a\u043e\u043c\u0430\u043d\u0434\u0430 \u0438\u0437 \u041a\u0435\u043c\u0431\u0440\u0438\u0434\u0436\u0430 \u0441 \u0440\u0430\u0431\u043e\u0447\u0438\u043c \u043f\u0440\u043e\u0442\u043e\u0442\u0438\u043f\u043e\u043c \u0434\u043b\u044f \u0434\u0435\u043c\u043e\u043d\u0441\u0442\u0440\u0430\u0446\u0438\u0438, \u043d\u043e \u044d\u0442\u043e \u043d\u0435 \u0442\u043e\u0440\u0433\u043e\u0432\u044b\u0439 \u0432\u0440\u0435\u043c\u0435\u043d\u0438 \u0438\u043c\u0435\u043b\u0438 \u0431\u044b \u043e\u0433\u0440\u043e\u043c\u043d\u043e\u0435 \u0437\u043d\u0430\u0447\u0435\u043d\u0438\u0435. \u042f \u0442\u0430\u043a \u0431\u0443\u0434\u0435\u0442 \u043f\u0440\u043e\u0449\u0435!",

          "value_line_source": "document_pain_analysis"

        "linkedin_message": {
          "message": "\u0421\u0435\u0442 \u0437\u0434\u0435\u0441\u044c. \u0423\u0447\u0438\u0442\u044b\u0432\u0430\u044f \u0432\u0430\u0448 20+ \u043b\u0435\u0442\u043d\u0438\u0439 \u043e\u043f\u044b\u0442 \u0432 \u043e\u0442\u0440\u0430\u0441\u043b\u0438, \u044f \u043d\u0430\u0434\u0435\u044f\u043b\u0441\u044f \u043f\u043e\u043b\u0443\u0447\u0438\u0442\u044c \u0432\u0430\u0448\u0435 \u043c\u043d\u0435\u043d\u0438\u0435. \u041e\u0442\u043f\u0440\u0430\u0432\u0438\u043b \u0432\u0430\u043c \u043f\u0438\u0441\u044c\u043c\u043e \u043e \u043d\u0430\u0448\u0435\u0439 \u0438\u0434\u0435\u0435 \u043f\u043e\u043c\u043e\u0449\u043d\u0438\u043a\u0430 \u0418\u0418 \u0432 WhatsApp, \u043a\u043e\u0442\u043e\u0440\u044b\u0439 \u043a\u0440\u0443\u0433\u043b\u043e\u0441\u0443\u0442\u043e\u0447\u043d\u043e \u0432\u044b\u043f\u043e\u043b\u043d\u044f\u0435\u0442 \u0431\u044d\u043a-\u043e\u0444\u0438\u0441\u043d\u0443\u044e \u0440\u0430\u0431\u043e\u0442\u0443 \u2014 \u043e\u0442\u043f\u0440\u0430\u0432\u043b\u044f\u044e \u0442\u0430\u043a\u0436\u0435 \u0433\u043e\u043b\u043e\u0441\u043e\u0432\u043e\u0435 \u0441\u043e\u043e\u0431\u0449\u0435\u043d\u0438\u0435 \u043d\u0430 \u0441\u043b\u0443\u0447\u0430\u0439, \u0435\u0441\u043b\u0438 \u0432\u044b \u0435\u0433\u043e \u043f\u0440\u043e\u043f\u0443\u0441\u0442\u0438\u043b\u0438!",
          "hook_used": "10+ years",
          "generated": true
        },
        "voice_note": {
          "script": "Hi Erman, I'm building an AI startup in Singapore focused on automating heavy back-office paperwork - a gap recently highlighted to us by government leaders in Smart Nation.           "location_used": "Jurong Logistics Hub",

        "company_name": "Culina",
        "contact_name": "Leelyne Yeo",
        "contact_email": "leelyne.yeo@culina.com.sg",
        "email_1": {
          "subject": "quick question on food",
          "body": "Hi Leelyne,\n\nWe're building an AI assistant that's always one step ahead for SG food wholesalers.\n\nIt proactively checks in - running daily reconciliation of invoices vs purchase orders, tracking missing health certificates and sending follow-ups, or giving you morning updates on incoming shipment documents - all without you having to ask.\n\nYou just WhatsApp or email it instructions and it does your back office work around the clock.\n\nWe're a Cambridge-backed group with a working prototype to demo, but this isn't a sales call. We're trying to learn what food teams actually find useful, what pain points keep coming up, and how you're thinking about future-proofing the business. 30 minutes of your time would make a big difference.\n\nI know you're busy, so let me know what time is best for a call or I can drop by your office at Senoko Way if that's easier!\n\nBest,\nSeth",
          "ps_used": "Happy to drop by your office at Senoko Way if that's easier!"
        },
        "email_2": {
          "subject": "Leelyne <> Seth",
          "body": "Hi Leelyne,\n\nI did some digging into Culina and had a few ideas on where we could save time:\n\n- Extract 99% accurate data from Culina's commercial invoices and packing lists.\n- Flag inconsistencies across your health certificates and shipment documents.\n- Generate audit-ready reconciliation reports for your fresh produce and wine.\n\nHave you solved for export documentation prep or is your team still doing it manually?\n\nIf we could help you do the same and save 10+ hours a week, automatically from WhatsApp, email or any chat app you already use, would that be interesting?\n\nBest,\nSeth",
          "ideas_used": [
            "Extract 99% accurate data from Culina's commercial invoices and packing lists.",
            "Flag inconsistencies across your health certificates and shipment documents.",
            "Generate audit-ready reconciliation reports for your fresh produce and wine."
          ]
        },
        "email_3": {
          "subject": "Re: quick question on food",
          "body": "Hi Leelyne,\n\nMy co-founder and I are building a startup in Singapore to support local businesses and we wanted to reach out because your expertise could save us a ton of mistakes.\n\nGiven your experience in food, I was hoping to get your opinion.\n\nFor some background, we spoke with senior government leaders last week at Smart Nation - they shared that SMEs in underserved areas stand to gain the most from AI compared to MNCs.\n\nWe're now looking to figure out which are the biggest pain points food trading companies face and 30 minutes of your time would make a huge difference.\n\nWe're a Cambridge led group, based in SG, and have a prototype, but this is in no way a sales call.\n\nIf you could just email or WhatsApp an AI assistant your invoices, packing lists, and health certificates and get back an audit-ready reconciliation in Excel showing all discrepancies, would that be useful?\n\nWould you be open to a quick chat to point us in the right direction?\n\nBest,\nSeth\n\nP.S. Happy to drop by your office at Senoko Way if that's easier!",
          "hook_used": "Fallback",
          "value_line": "just email or WhatsApp an AI assistant your invoices, packing lists, and health certificates and get back an audit-ready reconciliation in Excel showing all discrepancies",

    "38": {

      "stage2_status": "pending",
      "stage1_result": {
        "company_name": "Thong Siek Global",
        "contact_name": "Lim Boom Chay",
        "contact_email": "lbc@thongsiek.com",
        "email_1": {
          "subject": "quick question on food",
          "body": "Hi Boom Chay,\n\nWe're building an AI assistant that's always one step ahead for SG food trading companies.\n\nIt proactively checks in - running daily reconciliation of shipment details against financial records, tracking missing Halal or Health Certificates and sending follow-ups, or giving you morning updates on export documents awaiting approval - all without you having to ask.\n\nYou just WhatsApp or email it instructions and it does your back office work around the clock.\n\nWe're a Cambridge-backed group with a working prototype to demo, but this isn't a sales call. We're trying to learn what food teams actually find useful, what pain points keep coming up, and how you're thinking about future-proofing the business. 30 minutes of your time would make a big difference.\n\nI know you're busy, so let me know what time is best for a call or I can drop by your office at Senoko Way if that's easier!\n\nBest,\nSeth\n\nP.S. Before our call, I can train our AI on your export documents so you can see exactly what we'd catch for Thong Siek Global.",
          "ps_used": "Before our call, I can train our AI on your export documents so you can see exactly what we'd catch for Thong Siek Global."
        },
        "email_2": {
          "subject": "Boom Chay <> Seth",
          "body": "Hi Boom Chay,\n\nI did some digging into Thong Siek Global and had a few ideas on where we could save time:\n\n- Extract 99% accurate data from diverse export documents for Thong Siek Global.\n- Flag inconsistencies that humans miss across COOs and Health Certificates.\n- Generate audit-ready Commercial Invoices and Packing Lists in minutes.\n\nHave you solved for export documentation prep or is your team still doing it manually?\n\nIf we could help you do the same and save 10+ hours a week, automatically from WhatsApp, email or any chat app you already use, would that be interesting?\n\nBest,\nSeth",
          "ideas_used": [
            "Extract 99% accurate data from diverse export documents for Thong Siek Global.",
            "Flag inconsistencies that humans miss across COOs and Health Certificates.",
            "Generate audit-ready Commercial Invoices and Packing Lists in minutes."
          ]
        },
        "email_3": {
          "subject": "Re: quick question on food",
          "body": "Hi Boom Chay,\n\nMy co-founder and I are building a startup in Singapore to support local businesses and we wanted to reach out because your expertise could save us a ton of mistakes.\n\nGiven your experience in food, I was hoping to get your opinion.\n\nFor some background, we spoke with senior government leaders last week at Smart Nation - they shared that SMEs in underserved areas stand to gain the most from AI compared to MNCs.\n\nWe're now looking to figure out which are the biggest pain points food trading companies face and 30 minutes of your time would make a huge difference.\n\nWe're a Cambridge led group, based in SG, and have a prototype, but this is in no way a sales call.\n\nIf you could just email or WhatsApp an AI assistant your export documents and get back an audit-ready reconciliation of all your shipment details in Excel, would that be useful?\n\nWould you be open to a quick chat to point us in the right direction?\n\nBest,\nSeth\n\nP.S. Happy to drop by your office at Senoko Way if that's easier!",
          "hook_used": "Fallback (none)",
          "value_line": "just email or WhatsApp an AI assistant your export documents and get back an audit-ready reconciliation of all your shipment details in Excel",
          "value_line_source": "document_pain_analysis, company_profile"
        },
        "linkedin_message": {
          "message": "N/A",
          "hook_used": "none",
          "generated": false
        },
        "voice_note": {
          "script": "N/A",

\u043c\u0430\u043d\u0438\u0444\u0435\u0441\u0442\u0430\u043c\u0438, \u043e\u0442\u0441\u043b\u0435\u0436\u0438\u0432\u0430\u0435\u0442 \u043e\u0436\u0438\u0434\u0430\u044e\u0449\u0438\u0435 \u0437\u0430\u044f\u0432\u043a\u0438 \u043d\u0430 \u0441\u0435\u0440\u0442\u0438\u0444\u0438\u043a\u0430\u0442\u044b \u0438 \u043e\u0442\u043f\u0440\u0430\u0432\u043b\u044f\u0435\u0442 \u043d\u0430\u043f\u043e\u043c\u0438\u043d\u0430\u043d\u0438\u044f, \u0430 \u0442\u0430\u043a\u0436\u0435 \u043a\u0430\u0436\u0434\u043e\u0435 \u0443\u0442\u0440\u043e \u043f\u0440\u0435\u0434\u043e\u0441\u0442\u0430\u0432\u043b\u044f\u0435\u0442 \u043e\u0431\u043d\u043e\u0432\u043b\u0435\u043d\u0438\u044f \u043f\u043e \u043f\u043e\u0441\u0442\u0430\u0432\u043a\u0430\u043c, \u0442\u0440\u0435\u0431\u0443\u044e\u0449\u0438\u043c \u0441\u043e\u043e\u0442\u0432\u0435\u0442\u0441\u0442\u0432\u0443\u044e\u0449\u0435\u0439 \u0434\u043e\u043a\u0443\u043c\u0435\u043d\u0442\u0430\u0446\u0438\u0438 \u2014 \u0438 \u0432\u0441\u0435 \u044d\u0442\u043e \u0431\u0435\u0437 \u0432\u0430\u0448\u0435\u0433\u043e \u0437\u0430\u043f\u0440\u043e\u0441\u0430. \u0412\u044b \u043f\u0440\u043e\u0441\u0442\u043e \u043e\u0442\u043f\u0440\u0430\u0432\u043b\u044f\u0435\u0442\u0435 \u0435\u043c\u0443 \u0438\u043d\u0441\u0442\u0440\u0443\u043a\u0446\u0438\u0438 \u043f\u043e WhatsApp \u0438\u043b\u0438 \u044d\u043b\u0435\u043a\u0442\u0440\u043e\u043d\u043d\u043e\u0439 \u043f\u043e\u0447\u0442\u0435, \u0438 \u043e\u043d \u043a\u0440\u0443\u0433\u043b\u043e\u0441\u0443\u0442\u043e\u0447\u043d\u043e \u0432\u044b\u043f\u043e\u043b\u043d\u044f\u0435\u0442 \u0432\u0430\u0448\u0443 \u0431\u044d\u043a-\u043e\u0444\u0438\u0441\u043d\u0443\u044e \u0440\u0430\u0431\u043e\u0442\u0443. \u041c\u044b \u2014 \u043a\u043e\u043c\u0430\u043d\u0434\u0430 \u0438\u0437 \u041a\u0435\u043c\u0431\u0440\u0438\u0434\u0436\u0430 \u0441 \u0440\u0430\u0431\u043e\u0447\u0438\u043c \u043f\u0440\u043e\u0442\u043e\u0442\u0438\u043f\u043e\u043c \u0434\u043b\u044f \u0434\u0435\u043c\u043e\u043d\u0441\u0442\u0440\u0430\u0446\u0438\u0438, \u043d\u043e \u044d\u0442\u043e \u043d\u0435 \u043f\u0440\u043e\u0434\u0430\u0436\u043d\u044b\u0439 \u0437\u0432\u043e\u043d\u043e\u043a. \u041c\u044b \u043f\u044b\u0442\u0430\u0435\u043c\u0441\u044f \u0443\u0437\u043d\u0430\u0442\u044c, \u0447\u0442\u043e \u043a\u043e\u043c\u0430\u043d\u0434\u044b \u043f\u043e \u043f\u0438\u0449\u0435\u0432\u043e\u0439 \u043f\u0435\u0440\u0435\u0440\u0430\u0431\u043e\u0442\u043a\u0435 \u043d\u0430 \u0432\u0440\u0435\u043c\u0435\u043d\u0438 \u0438\u043c\u0435\u043b\u0438 \u0431\u044b \u043e\u0433\u0440\u043e\u043c\u043d\u043e\u0435 \u0437\u043d\u0430\u0447\u0435\u043d\u0438\u0435. \u042f         "email_1": {
          "subject": "quick question on food",
          "body": "Hi Yu Na,\n\nWe're building an AI assistant that's always one step ahead for SG food processors.\n\nIt proactively checks in - running daily reconciliation of ingredient purchase orders against supplier invoices, tracking pending import permits or health certificate applications and sending follow-ups, or giving you morning updates on critical ingredient inventory levels based on delivery documents - all without you having to ask.\n\nYou just WhatsApp or email it instructions and it does your back office work around the clock.\n\nWe're a Cambridge-backed group with a working prototype to demo, but this isn't a sales call. We're trying to learn what food teams actually find useful, what pain points keep coming up, and how you're thinking about future-proofing the business. 30 minutes of your time would make a big difference.\n\nI know you're busy, so let me know what time is best for a call or I can drop by your office at Chin Bee Drive if that's easier!\n\nBest,\nSeth\n\nP.S. Before our call, I can train our AI on your supply chain and export documents so you can see exactly what we'd catch for Alchemy Foodtech.",
          "ps_used": "Before our call, I can train our AI on your supply chain and export documents so you can see exactly what we'd catch for Alchemy Foodtech."
        },
        "email_2": {
          "subject": "Yu Na <> Seth",
          "body": "Hi Yu Na,\n\nI did some digging into Alchemy Foodtech and had a few ideas on where we could save time:\n\n- Extract 99% accurate data from ingredient supplier invoices for faster processing.\n- Generate audit-ready Commercial Invoices and Packing Lists for global shipments.\n- Flag discrepancies in test reports or health certificates before submission to SFA.\n\nHave you solved for export documentation prep or is your team still doing it manually?\n\nIf we could help you do the same and save 10+ hours a week, automatically from WhatsApp, email or any chat app you already use, would that be interesting?\n\nBest,\nSeth",
          "ideas_used": [
            "Extract 99% accurate data from ingredient supplier invoices for faster processing.",
            "Generate audit-ready Commercial Invoices and Packing Lists for global shipments.",
            "Flag discrepancies in test reports or health certificates before submission to SFA."

      "stage1_result": {
        "company_name": "Clouet Trading",
        "contact_name": "Kerina Kwek",
        "contact_email": "kerina.kwek@denis.com",
        "email_1": {
          "subject": "quick question on food",
          "body": "Hi Kerina,\n\nWe're building an AI assistant that's always one step ahead for SG food traders.\n\nIt proactively checks in - running daily reconciliation of supplier invoices against purchase orders, tracking missing Certificates of Origin and sending follow-ups, or giving you morning updates on pending Health Certificate applications - all without you having to ask.\n\nYou just WhatsApp or email it instructions and it does your back office work around the clock.\n\nWe're a Cambridge-backed group with a working prototype to demo, but this isn't a sales call. We're trying to learn what food teams actually find useful, what pain points keep coming up, and how you're thinking about future-proofing the business. 30 minutes of your time would make a big difference.\n\nI know you're busy, so let me know what time is best for a call or I can drop by your office at Tagore Lane if that's easier!\n\nBest,\nSeth\n\nP.S. Before our call, I can train our AI on your export documents so you can see exactly what we'd catch for Clouet Trading.",
          "ps_used": "Generic (export documents fallback for Email 1 P.S.)"
        },
        "email_2": {
          "subject": "Kerina <> Seth",
          "body": "Hi Kerina,\n\nI did some digging into Clouet Trading and had a few ideas on where we could save time:\n\n- Get audit-ready reconciliation of commercial invoices vs. packing lists for Clouet Trading.\n- Extract 99% accurate data from diverse export certificates in seconds.\n- Flag discrepancies across all shipment documents before SFA submission.\n\nHave you solved for export documentation prep or is your team still doing it manually?\n\nIf we could help you do the same and save 10+ hours a week, automatically from WhatsApp, email or any chat app you already use, would that be interesting?\n\nBest,\nSeth",
          "ideas_used": [
            "Get audit-ready reconciliation of commercial invoices vs. packing lists for Clouet Trading.",
            "Extract 99% accurate data from diverse export certificates in seconds.",
            "Flag discrepancies across all shipment documents before SFA submission."
          ]
        },
        "email_3": {
          "subject": "Re: quick question on food",
          "body": "Hi Kerina,\n\nMy co-founder and I are building a startup in Singapore to support local businesses and we wanted to reach out because your expertise could save us a ton of mistakes.\n\nGiven your experience in food, I was hoping to get your opinion.\n\nFor some background, we spoke with senior government leaders last week at Smart Nation - they shared that SMEs in underserved areas stand to gain the most from AI compared to MNCs.\n\nWe're now looking to figure out which are the biggest pain points food trading companies face and 30 minutes of your time would make a huge difference.\n\nWe're a Cambridge led group, based in SG, and have a prototype, but this is in no way a sales call.\n\nIf you could just email or WhatsApp an AI assistant your export documents and get back an audit-ready reconciliation of your shipment documents in Excel, would that be useful?\n\nWould you be open to a quick chat to point us in the right direction?\n\nBest,\nSeth\n\nP.S. Happy to drop by your office at Tagore Lane if that's easier!",
          "hook_used": "Fallback (none)",
          "value_line": "just email or WhatsApp an AI assistant your export documents and get back an audit-ready reconciliation of your shipment documents in Excel",

          "body": "Hi Kevin,We're building an AI assistant that's always one step ahead for SG food trading companies.It proactively checks in - running daily reconciliation of supplier invoices against customer orders, tracking missing health certificates and sending follow-ups, or giving you morning updates on export documents awaiting approval - all without you having to ask.You just WhatsApp or email it instructions and it does your back office work around the clock.We're a Cambridge-backed group with a working prototype to demo, but this isn't a sales call.           "body": "Hi Kevin,My co-founder and I are building a startup in Singapore to support local businesses and we wanted to reach out because your expertise could save us a ton of mistakes.Given your experience in food, I was hoping to get your opinion.For some background, we spoke with senior government leaders last week at Smart Nation - they shared that SMEs in underserved areas stand to gain the most from AI compared to MNCs.We're now looking to figure out which are the biggest pain points food trading companies face and 30 minutes of your time would make a huge difference.We're a Cambridge led group, based in SG, and have a prototype, but this is in no way a sales call.If you could just email or WhatsApp an AI assistant your export documents and origin certificates and get back an audit-ready reconciliation in Excel showing consistent product details, would that be useful?Would you be open to a quick chat to point us in the right direction?Best,SethP.S.     "64": {
      "company_name": "64",
      "stage1_status": "completed",
      "stage2_status": "pending",
      "stage1_result": {
        "company_name": "UNIVA AROMATICS PTE LTD",
        "contact_name": "Roselind Ng",
        "contact_email": "roselind@univa.com.sg",
        "email_1": {
          "subject": "quick question on food processing",
          "body": "Hi Roselind,\n\nWe're building an AI assistant that's always one step ahead for SG food processors.\n\nIt proactively checks in - running daily reconciliation of export documents against regulatory requirements, tracking inconsistent HS codes or quantities across your shipment documents and flagging discrepancies, or giving you morning updates on pending Health Certificate applications - all without you having to ask.\n\nYou just WhatsApp or email it instructions and it does your back office work around the clock.\n\nWe're a Cambridge-backed group with a working prototype to demo, but this isn't a sales call. We're trying to learn what food processing teams actually find useful, what pain points keep coming up, and how you're thinking about future-proofing the business. 30 minutes of your time would make a big difference.\n\nI know you're busy, so let me know what time is best for a call or I can drop by your office at Kaki Bukit Industrial Terrace if that's easier!\n\nBest,\nSeth\n\nP.S. Before our call, I can train our AI on your export documents so you can see exactly what we'd catch for Univa Aromatics.",
          "ps_used": "Generic: 'Before the call, I can train our AI on your export documents so you can see exactly what we'd catch for {company_name}.'"
        },
        "email_2": {
          "subject": "Roselind <> Seth",
          "body": "Hi Roselind,\n\nI did some digging into Univa Aromatics and had a few ideas on where we could save time:\n\n- Extract 99% accurate data from supplier invoices for finance.\n- Flag inconsistencies across commercial invoices for Univa Aromatics.\n- Generate audit-ready Certificates of Origin and Health Certificates fast.\n\nHave you solved for export documentation prep or is your team still doing it manually?\n\nIf we could help you do the same and save 10+ hours a week, automatically from WhatsApp, email or any chat app you already use, would that be interesting?\n\nBest,\nSeth",
          "ideas_used": [
            "Extract 99% accurate data from supplier invoices for finance.",
            "Flag inconsistencies across commercial invoices for Univa Aromatics.",
            "Generate audit-ready Certificates of Origin and Health Certificates fast."
          ]
        },
        "email_3": {
          "subject": "Re: quick question on food processing",
          "body": "Hi Roselind,\n\nMy co-founder and I are building a startup in Singapore to support local businesses and we wanted to reach out because your expertise could save us a ton of mistakes.\n\nGiven your experience in food, I was hoping to get your opinion.\n\nFor some background, we spoke with senior government leaders last week at Smart Nation - they shared that SMEs in underserved areas stand to gain the most from AI compared to MNCs.\n\nWe're now looking to figure out which are the biggest pain points food trading companies face and 30 minutes of your time would make a huge difference.\n\nWe're a Cambridge led group, based in SG, and have a prototype, but this is in no way a sales call.\n\nIf you could just email or WhatsApp an AI assistant your export documents and get back an audit-ready set of consistent export documents for SFA submissions in PDF, would that be useful?\n\nWould you be open to a quick chat to point us in the right direction?\n\nBest,\nSeth\n\nP.S. Happy to drop by your office at Kaki Bukit Industrial Terrace if that's easier!",
          "hook_used": "Fallback (no signals)",
          "value_line": "If you could just email or WhatsApp an AI assistant your export documents and get back an audit-ready set of consistent export documents for SFA submissions in PDF, would that be useful?",
          "value_line_source": "document_pain_analysis, company_profile"
        },
        "linkedin_message": {
          "message": "Seth here. Given your experience leading Univa Aromatics, I was hoping to get your opinion. Emailed you about our idea for a WhatsApp AI assistant that does back office work around the clock - sending a voice note too in case it missed you!",
          "hook_used": "C-suite",
          "generated": true
        },
        "voice_note": {
          "script": "Hi Roselind, I'm building an AI startup in Singapore focused on automating heavy back-office paperwork - a gap recently highlighted to us by government leaders in Smart Nation.\n\nWe're a Cambridge-led team with a working prototype, and I'd love 20 minutes of your time to ensure we're solving the right pain points for firms like Univa Aromatics.\n\nThis isn't a sales call - just looking for your perspective.\n\nHappy to buy you lunch near your office at Kaki Bukit Industrial Terrace as a thank you. Would you be open to a quick chat?",
          "location_used": "Kaki Bukit Industrial Terrace",
          "generated": true
        }
      },

        "email_1": {
          "subject": "quick question on food manufacturing",
          "body": "Hi Peter,\n\nWe're building an AI assistant that's always one step ahead for SG food manufacturing companies.\n\nIt proactively checks in - running daily reconciliation of Commercial Invoices against Packing Lists, tracking missing Health Certificates and sending automated follow-ups, or giving you morning updates on export documents awaiting approval - all without you having to ask.\n\nYou just WhatsApp or email it instructions and it does your back office work around the clock.\n\nWe're a Cambridge-backed group with a working prototype to demo, but this isn't a sales call.           "subject": "Peter <> Seth",
          "body": "Hi Peter,\n\nI did some digging into Oceanus Group and had a few ideas on where we could save time:\n\n- Get audit-ready validation of all shipment documents for consistency.\n- Extract 99% accurate data from supplier POs for faster processing.\n- Automate Health Cert and COO application prep for Oceanus Group.\n\nHave you solved for export documentation prep or is your team still doing it manually?\n\nIf we could help you do the same and save 10+ hours a week, automatically from WhatsApp, email or any chat app you already use, would that be interesting?\n\nBest,\nSeth",
          "ideas_used": [
            "Get audit-ready validation of all shipment documents for consistency.",
            "Extract 99% accurate data from supplier POs for faster processing.",
            "Automate Health Cert and COO application prep for Oceanus Group."

        },
        "email_3": {
          "subject": "Re: quick question on food manufacturing",
          "body": "Hi Peter,\n\nMy co-founder and I are building a startup in Singapore to support local businesses and we wanted to reach out because your expertise could save us a ton of mistakes.\n\nSaw your recognition for Best Food & Beverage Company - figured you'd have perspective on this.\n\nFor some background, we spoke with senior government leaders last week at Smart Nation - they shared that SMEs in underserved areas stand to gain the most from AI compared to MNCs.\n\nWe're now looking to figure out which are the biggest pain points food trading companies face and 30 minutes of your time would make a huge difference.\n\nWe're a Cambridge led group, based in SG, and have a prototype, but this is in no way a sales call.\n\nIf you could just email or WhatsApp an AI assistant your export documents and get back audit-ready reconciliation of all your export documents in Excel, would that be useful?\n\nWould you be open to a quick chat to point us in the right direction?\n\nBest,\nSeth\n\nP.S. Happy to drop by your office at UBIX if that's easier!",

    "77": {

      "stage1_result": {
        "company_name": "Phoon Huat",
        "contact_name": "Jean Wong",
        "contact_email": "jean@phoonhuat.com",
        "email_1": {
          "subject": "quick question on food processing",
          "body": "Hi Jean,\n\nWe're building an AI assistant that's always one step ahead for SG food processors.\n\nIt proactively checks in - running daily reconciliation of export documents against sales orders, tracking missing health certificates and sending follow-ups, or giving you morning updates on proforma invoices awaiting approval - all without you having to ask.\n\nYou just WhatsApp or email it instructions and it does your back office work around the clock.\n\nWe're a Cambridge-backed group with a working prototype to demo, but this isn't a sales call. We're trying to learn what food processing teams actually find useful, what pain points keep coming up, and how you're thinking about future-proofing the business. 30 minutes of your time would make a big difference.\n\nI know you're busy, so let me know what time is best for a call or I can drop by your office at Pandan Loop if that's easier!\n\nBest,\nSeth\n\nP.S. Before our call, I can train our AI on your export documents so you can see exactly what we'd catch for Phoon Huat.",
          "ps_used": "Generic for export documents for Phoon Huat"
        },
        "email_2": {
          "subject": "Jean <> Seth",
          "body": "Hi Jean,\n\nI did some digging into Phoon Huat and had a few ideas on where we could save time:\n\n- Generate audit-ready commercial invoices and packing lists in minutes.\n- Extract 99% accurate data from supplier invoices for Phoon Huat's inventory.\n- Flag inconsistencies across all export documents before submission.\n\nHave you solved for export documentation prep or is your team still doing it manually?\n\nIf we could help you do the same and save 10+ hours a week, automatically from WhatsApp, email or any chat app you already use, would that be interesting?\n\nBest,\nSeth",
          "ideas_used": [
            "Generate audit-ready commercial invoices and packing lists in minutes.",
            "Extract 99% accurate data from supplier invoices for Phoon Huat's inventory.",
            "Flag inconsistencies across all export documents before submission."
          ]
        },
        "email_3": {
          "subject": "Re: quick question on food processing",
          "body": "Hi Jean,\n\nMy co-founder and I are building a startup in Singapore to support local businesses and we wanted to reach out because your expertise could save us a ton of mistakes.\n\nNoticed you're hiring for an Export Operations Coordinator - figured you'd have perspective on where the bottlenecks are.\n\nFor some background, we spoke with senior government leaders last week at Smart Nation - they shared that SMEs in underserved areas stand to gain the most from AI compared to MNCs.\n\nWe're now looking to figure out which are the biggest pain points food trading companies face and 30 minutes of your time would make a huge difference.\n\nWe're a Cambridge led group, based in SG, and have a prototype, but this is in no way a sales call.\n\nIf you could just email or WhatsApp an AI assistant your export documents and get back audit-ready reconciliation of shipment data in Excel, would that be useful?\n\nWould you be open to a quick chat to point us in the right direction?\n\nBest,\nSeth\n\nP.S. Happy to drop by your office at Pandan Loop if that's easier!",
          "hook_used": "Hiring",
          "value_line": "If you could just email or WhatsApp an AI assistant your export documents and get back audit-ready reconciliation of shipment data in Excel, would that be useful?",
          "value_line_source": "document_types and company_profile"
        },
        "linkedin_message": {
          "message": "Seth here. Noticed you're hiring for an Export Operations Coordinator - figured you'd have perspective on where the bottlenecks are. Emailed you about our idea for a WhatsApp AI assistant that does back office work around the clock - sending a voice note too in case it missed you!",
          "hook_used": "Hiring",
          "generated": true
        },
        "voice_note": {
          "script": "Hi Jean, I'm building an AI startup in Singapore focused on automating heavy back-office paperwork - a gap recently highlighted to us by government leaders in Smart Nation.\nWe're a Cambridge-led team with a working prototype, and I'd love 20 minutes of your time to ensure we're solving the right pain points for firms like Phoon Huat.\nThis isn't a sales call - just looking for your perspective.\nHappy to buy you lunch near your office at Pandan Loop as a thank you. Would you be open to a quick chat?",
          "location_used": "Pandan Loop",
          "generated": true
        }

        "email_1": {
          "subject": "quick question on food",
          "body": "Hi Andrew,\n\nWe're building an AI assistant that's always one step ahead for SG food trading companies.\n\nIt proactively checks in - running daily reconciliation of shipment documents, tracking pending health certificate approvals and sending follow-ups, or giving you morning updates on critical export documents - all without you having to ask.\n\nYou just WhatsApp or email it instructions and it does your back office work around the clock.\n\nWe're a Cambridge-backed group with a working prototype to demo, but this isn't a sales call. We're trying to learn what food teams actually find useful, what pain points keep coming up, and how you're thinking about future-proofing the business. 30 minutes of your time would make a big difference.\n\nI know you're busy, so let me know what time is best for a call or I can drop by your office at Clarke Quay if that's easier!\n\nBest,\nSeth\n\nP.S. Before our call, I can train our AI on your export documents so you can see exactly what we'd catch for Teck Sang.",
          "ps_used": "Specific doc training demo"
        },
        "email_2": {
          "subject": "Andrew <> Seth",
          "body": "Hi Andrew,\n\nI did some digging into Teck Sang and had a few ideas on where we could save time:\n\n- Generate audit-ready export documents for Teck Sang's diverse product range, consistent across all forms.\n- Flag discrepancies that humans miss across shipment documents, preventing customs and LC issues.\n- Extract 99% accurate data from supplier certificates for quick SFA and TradeNet submissions.\n\nHave you solved for export documentation prep or is your team still doing it manually?\n\nIf we could help you do the same and save 10+ hours a week, automatically from WhatsApp, email or any chat app you already use, would that be interesting?\n\nBest,\nSeth",
          "ideas_used": [
            "Generate audit-ready export documents for Teck Sang's diverse product range, consistent across all forms.",
            "Flag discrepancies that humans miss across shipment documents, preventing customs and LC issues.",
            "Extract 99% accurate data from supplier certificates for quick SFA and TradeNet submissions."
          ]
        },
        "email_3": {
          "subject": "Re: quick question on food",
          "body": "Hi Andrew,\n\nMy co-founder and I are building a startup in Singapore to support local businesses and we wanted to reach out because your expertise could save us a ton of mistakes.\n\nGiven your experience in food, I was hoping to get your opinion.\n\nFor some background, we spoke with senior government leaders last week at Smart Nation - they shared that SMEs in underserved areas stand to gain the most from AI compared to MNCs.\n\nWe're now looking to figure out which are the biggest pain points food trading companies face and 30 minutes of your time would make a huge difference.\n\nWe're a Cambridge led group, based in SG, and have a prototype, but this is in no way a sales call.\n\nIf you could just email or WhatsApp an AI assistant your export documents and compliance certificates and get back an audit-ready reconciliation of all data in Excel, would that be useful?\n\nWould you be open to a quick chat to point us in the right direction?\n\nBest,\nSeth\n\nP.S. Happy to drop by your office at Clarke Quay if that's easier!",
          "hook_used": "Fallback",
          "value_line": "just email or WhatsApp an AI assistant your export documents and compliance certificates and get back an audit-ready reconciliation of all data in Excel",

          "body": "Hi Frank,\n\nWe're building an AI assistant that's always one step ahead for SG food trading companies.\n\nIt proactively checks in - running daily reconciliation of Commercial Invoices against Packing Lists, tracking pending Health Certificate applications and sending follow-ups, or giving you morning updates on export documents awaiting bank submission - all without you having to ask.\n\nYou just WhatsApp or email it instructions and it does your back office work around the clock.\n\nWe're a Cambridge-backed group with a working prototype to demo, but this isn't a sales call. We're trying to learn what food teams actually find useful, what pain points keep coming up, and how you're thinking about future-proofing the business. 30 minutes of your time would make a big difference.\n\nI know you're busy, so let me know what time is best for a call or I can drop by your office at Fishery Port Road if that's easier!\n\nBest,\nSeth\n\nP.S. Before our call, I can train our AI on your export documents so you can see exactly what we'd catch for Snorre Food.",
          "ps_used": "Before our call, I can train our AI on your export documents so you can see exactly what we'd catch for Snorre Food."
        },
        "email_2": {
          "subject": "Frank <> Seth",
          "body": "Hi Frank,\n\nI did some digging into Snorre Food and had a few ideas on where we could save time:\n\n- Generate audit-ready Commercial Invoices and Packing Lists from shipment data.\n- Flag inconsistent quantities or HS codes across all export documents for Snorre Food.\n- Extract 99% accurate data from supplier invoices for easier reconciliation.\n\nHave you solved for export documentation prep or is your team still doing it manually?\n\nIf we could help you do the same and save 10+ hours a week, automatically from WhatsApp, email or any chat app you already use, would that be interesting?\n\nBest,\nSeth",
          "ideas_used": [
            "Generate audit-ready Commercial Invoices and Packing Lists from shipment data.",
            "Flag inconsistent quantities or HS codes across all export documents for Snorre Food.",
            "Extract 99% accurate data from supplier invoices for easier reconciliation."
          ]
        },
        "email_3": {
          "subject": "Re: quick question on food",
          "body": "Hi Frank,\n\nMy co-founder and I are building a startup in Singapore to support local businesses and we wanted to reach out because your expertise could save us a ton of mistakes.\n\nGiven your experience in food, I was hoping to get your opinion.\n\nFor some background, we spoke with senior government leaders last week at Smart Nation - they shared that SMEs in underserved areas stand to gain the most from AI compared to MNCs.\n\nWe're now looking to figure out which are the biggest pain points food trading companies face and 30 minutes of your time would make a huge difference.\n\nWe're a Cambridge led group, based in SG, and have a prototype, but this is in no way a sales call.\n\nIf you could just email or WhatsApp an AI assistant your shipment documents and get back an audit-ready reconciliation in Excel showing consistency across all export documents, would that be useful?\n\nWould you be open to a quick chat to point us in the right direction?\n\nBest,\nSeth\n\nP.S. Happy to drop by your office at Fishery Port Road if that's easier!",
          "hook_used": "Fallback",
          "value_line": "If you could just email or WhatsApp an AI assistant your shipment documents and get back an audit-ready reconciliation in Excel showing consistency across all export documents, would that be useful?",

        "email_1": {
          "subject": "quick question on food",
          "body": "Hi Gautam,\n\nWe're building an AI assistant that's always one step ahead for SG food wholesalers.\n\nIt proactively checks in - running daily reconciliation of import clearances against received goods, tracking outstanding health certificates and sending follow-ups, or giving you morning updates on shipping documents awaiting approval - all without you having to ask.\n\nYou just WhatsApp or email it instructions and it does your back office work around the clock.\n\nWe're a Cambridge-backed group with a working prototype to demo, but this isn't a sales call. We're trying to learn what food teams actually find useful, what pain points keep coming up, and how you're thinking about future-proofing the business. 30 minutes of your time would make a big difference.\n\nI know you're busy, so let me know what time is best for a call or I can drop by your office at Pereira Road if that's easier!\n\nBest,\nSeth\n\nP.S.           "ps_used": "Value Demo P.S. (train AI on documents)"
        },
        "email_2": {
          "subject": "Gautam <> Seth",
          "body": "Hi Gautam,\n\nI did some digging into Bhavna and had a few ideas on where we could save time:\n\n- Generate complete, consistent sets of commercial invoices and packing lists for Bhavna's shipments.\n- Flag discrepancies that humans miss across all your shipment documents before submission.\n- Extract 99% accurate data from supplier invoices and test reports for SFA submission.\n\nHave you solved for export documentation prep or is your team still doing it manually?\n\nIf we could help you do the same and save 10+ hours a week, automatically from WhatsApp, email or any chat app you already use, would that be interesting?\n\nBest,\nSeth",
          "ideas_used": [
            "Generate complete, consistent sets of commercial invoices and packing lists for Bhavna's shipments.",
            "Flag discrepancies that humans miss across all your shipment documents before submission.",
            "Extract 99% accurate data from supplier invoices and test reports for SFA submission."
          ]

        "email_3": {
          "subject": "Re: quick question on food",
          "body": "Hi Gautam,\n\nMy co-founder and I are building a startup in Singapore to support local businesses and we wanted to reach out because your expertise could save us a ton of mistakes.\n\nGiven your 23+ years in the industry, I was hoping to get your opinion.\n\nFor some background, we spoke with senior government leaders last week at Smart Nation - they shared that SMEs in underserved areas stand to gain the most from AI compared to MNCs.\n\nWe're now looking to figure out which are the biggest pain points food trading companies face and 30 minutes of your time would make a huge difference.\n\nWe're a Cambridge led group, based in SG, and have a prototype, but this is in no way a sales call.\n\nIf you could just email or WhatsApp an AI assistant your export and import documents and get back audit-ready reconciliation of all your shipment documents in Excel, would that be useful?\n\nWould you be open to a quick chat to point us in the right direction?\n\nBest,\nSeth\n\nP.S.           "body": "Hi Edvin, We're building an AI assistant that's always one step ahead for SG food traders.       "stage1_result": {
        "company_name": "Bhavna",
        "contact_name": "Manuel Erni Cruzado",
        "contact_email": "manuel@bhavna.com",
        "email_1": {
          "subject": "quick question on food",
          "body": "Hi Manuel, We're building an AI assistant that's always one step ahead for SG food wholesalers. We proactively check in - running daily reconciliation of supplier invoices against purchase orders, tracking pending export documents and sending follow-ups, or giving you morning updates on health certificates awaiting approval - all without you having to ask. You just WhatsApp or email it instructions and it does your back office work around the clock. We're a Cambridge-backed group with a working prototype to demo, but this isn't a sales call. We're trying to learn what food teams actually find useful, what pain points keep coming up, and how you're thinking about future-proofing the business. 30 minutes of your time would make a big difference. I know you're busy, so let me know what time is best for a call or I can drop by your office at Asiawide Industrial Building if that's easier!\nBest,\nSeth\nP.S. Before our call, I can train our AI on your export documents so you can see exactly what we'd catch for Bhavna.",
          "ps_used": "Generic"
        },
        "email_2": {
          "subject": "Manuel <> Seth",
          "body": "Hi Manuel, I did some digging into Bhavna and had a few ideas on where we could save time:\n- Generate audit-ready Commercial Invoices and Packing Lists for Bhavna's shipments.\n- Extract 99% accurate data from supplier invoices to flag discrepancies.\n- Flag inconsistencies across all export documents before submission to SFA.\nHave you solved for export documentation prep or is your team still doing it manually? If we could help you do the same and save 10+ hours a week, automatically from WhatsApp, email or any chat app you already use, would that be interesting?\nBest,\nSeth",
          "ideas_used": [
            "Generate audit-ready Commercial Invoices and Packing Lists for Bhavna's shipments.",
            "Extract 99% accurate data from supplier invoices to flag discrepancies.",
            "Flag inconsistencies across all export documents before submission to SFA."
          ]
        },
        "email_3": {
          "subject": "Re: quick question on food",
          "body": "Hi Manuel, My co-founder and I are building a startup in Singapore to support local businesses and we wanted to reach out because your expertise could save us a ton of mistakes.\nGiven your experience in food, I was hoping to get your opinion.\nFor some background, we spoke with senior government leaders last week at Smart Nation - they shared that SMEs in underserved areas stand to gain the most from AI compared to MNCs.\nWe're now looking to figure out which are the biggest pain points food trading companies face and 30 minutes of your time would make a huge difference.\nWe're a Cambridge led group, based in SG, and have a prototype, but this is in no way a sales call.\nIf you could just email or WhatsApp an AI assistant your export documents and get back audit-ready reconciliation of all shipment details in Excel, would that be useful?\nWould you be open to a quick chat to point us in the right direction?\nBest,\nSeth\nP.S. Happy to drop by your office at Asiawide Industrial Building if that's easier!",
          "hook_used": "Fallback (none)",
          "value_line": "If you could just email or WhatsApp an AI assistant your export documents and get back audit-ready reconciliation of all shipment details in Excel, would that be useful?",

        "email_1": {
          "subject": "quick question on food processing",
          "body": "Hi Henry, We're building an AI assistant that's always one step ahead for SG food manufacturing companies. You just WhatsApp or email it instructions and it does your back office work around the clock. We're a Cambridge-backed group with a working prototype to demo, but this isn't a sales call. We're trying to learn what food teams actually find useful, what pain points keep coming up, and how you're thinking about future-proofing the business. 30 minutes of your time would make a big difference. I know you're busy, so let me know what time is best for a call or I can drop by your office at Woodlands if that's easier! Best,Seth P.S. Before our call, I can train our AI on your export documents so you can see exactly what we'd catch for HSC International.",
          "ps_used": "generic export documents for company specific context (HSC International)"
        },
        "email_2": {
          "subject": "Henry <> Seth",
          "body": "Hi Henry, I did some digging into HSC International and had a few ideas on where we could save time: - Extract 99% accurate data from HSC's import/export invoices to speed up processing. - Flag discrepancies in packing lists and health certificates that humans often miss. - Generate audit-ready Certificates of Origin and Halal Certs for your shipments. Have you solved for export documentation prep or is your team still doing it manually? If we could help you do the same and save 10+ hours a week, automatically from WhatsApp, email or any chat app you already use, would that be interesting? Best,Seth",
          "ideas_used": [
            "Extract 99% accurate data from HSC's import/export invoices to speed up processing.",
            "Flag discrepancies in packing lists and health certificates that humans often miss.",
            "Generate audit-ready Certificates of Origin and Halal Certs for your shipments."
          ]
        },
        "email_3": {
          "subject": "Re: quick question on food processing",
          "body": "Hi Henry, My co-founder and I are building a startup in Singapore to support local businesses and we wanted to reach out because your expertise could save us a ton of mistakes. Given your experience in food, I was hoping to get your opinion. For some background, we spoke with senior government leaders last week at Smart Nation - they shared that SMEs in underserved areas stand to gain the most from AI compared to MNCs.           "hook_used": "Fallback (Given your experience in {industry_short}, I was hoping to get your opinion.)",
          "value_line": "just email or WhatsApp an AI assistant your Commercial Invoices, Packing Lists, COOs, and Health Certificates and get back audit-ready export documentation in Excel",

          "message": "Seth here. Given your experience at HSC International, I was hoping to get your opinion. Emailed you about our idea for a WhatsApp AI assistant that does back office work around the clock - sending a voice note too in case it missed you!",

          "subject": "Re: quick question on food",
          "body": "Hi Thida,\n\nMy co-founder and I are building a startup in Singapore to support local businesses and we wanted to reach out because your expertise could save us a ton of mistakes.\n\nGiven your experience in food, I was hoping to get your opinion.\n\nFor some background, we spoke with senior government leaders last week at Smart Nation - they shared that SMEs in underserved areas stand to gain the most from AI compared to MNCs.\n\nWe're now looking to figure out which are the biggest pain points food trading companies face and 30 minutes of your time would make a huge difference.\n\nWe're a Cambridge led group, based in SG, and have a prototype, but this is in no way a sales call.\n\nIf you could just email or WhatsApp an AI assistant your trade documents and get back an audit-ready reconciliation in Excel, would that be useful?\n\nWould you be open to a quick chat to point us in the right direction?\n\nBest,\nSeth\n\nP.S. Happy to drop by your office at International Plaza if that's easier!",
