        "company_name": "Oceanus Group",
        "contact_name": "Daphne Lim",
        "contact_email": "daphne@oceanus.com.sg",
        "email_1": {
          "subject": "quick question on food",
          "body": "Hi Daphne,\n\nWe're building an AI assistant that's always one step ahead for SG food companies.\n\nIt proactively checks in - running daily reconciliation of Commercial Invoices against Packing Lists, tracking missing Halal or Health Certificates and sending automated reminders, or giving you morning updates on pending Cargo Clearance Permits or Bills of Lading - all without you having to ask.\n\nYou just WhatsApp or email it instructions and it does your back office work around the clock.\n\nWe're a Cambridge-backed group with a working prototype to demo, but this isn't a sales call. We're trying to learn what food teams actually find useful, what pain points keep coming up, and how you're thinking about future-proofing the business. 30 minutes of your time would make a big difference.\n\nI know you're busy, so let me know what time is best for a call or I can drop by your office at UBIX if that's easier!\n\nBest,\nSeth\n\nP.S. Before our call, I can train our AI on your export documents so you can see exactly what we'd catch for Oceanus Group.",
          "ps_used": "Generic"
        },
        "email_2": {
          "subject": "Daphne <> Seth",
          "body": "Hi Daphne,\n\nI did some digging into Oceanus Group and had a few ideas on where we could save time:\n\n- Extract 99% accurate data from supplier invoices and purchase orders for faster processing.\n- Flag inconsistencies that humans miss across Bills of Lading, Health Certificates, and Commercial Invoices.\n- Automate generation of audit-ready Certificates of Origin and Packing Lists from shipment data.\n\nHave you solved for export documentation prep or is your team still doing it manually?\n\nIf we could help you do the same and save 10+ hours a week, automatically from WhatsApp, email or any chat app you already use, would that be interesting?\n\nBest,\nSeth",
          "ideas_used": [
            "Extract 99% accurate data from supplier invoices and purchase orders for faster processing.",
            "Flag inconsistencies that humans miss across Bills of Lading, Health Certificates, and Commercial Invoices.",
            "Automate generation of audit-ready Certificates of Origin and Packing Lists from shipment data."
          ]
        },
        "email_3": {
          "subject": "Re: quick question on food",
          "body": "Hi Daphne,\n\nMy co-founder and I are building a startup in Singapore to support local businesses and we wanted to reach out because your expertise could save us a ton of mistakes.\n\nNoticed Oceanus Group announced a new logistics unit - figured you'd have perspective on how operations are scaling.\n\nFor some background, we spoke with senior government leaders last week at Smart Nation - they shared that SMEs in underserved areas stand to gain the most from AI compared to MNCs.\n\nWe're now looking to figure out which are the biggest pain points food trading companies face and 30 minutes of your time would make a huge difference.\n\nWe're a Cambridge led group, based in SG, and have a prototype, but this is in no way a sales call.\n\nIf you could just email or WhatsApp an AI assistant your export documents and get back audit-ready reconciliation of all your shipment documents against customs requirements in Excel, would that be useful?\n\nWould you be open to a quick chat to point us in the right direction?\n\nBest,\nSeth\n\nP.S. Happy to drop by your office at UBIX if that's easier!",

          "subject": "quick question on food",
          "body": "Hi Dorothy,\n\nWe're building an AI assistant that's always one step ahead for SG food wholesalers.\n\nIt proactively checks in - running daily reconciliation of customer orders against commercial invoices, tracking pending Health Certificates and sending follow-up reminders, or giving you morning updates on any unreconciled export documents - all without you having to ask.\n\nYou just WhatsApp or email it instructions and it does your back office work around the clock.\n\nWe're a Cambridge-backed group with a working prototype to demo, but this isn't a sales call. We're trying to learn what food teams actually find useful, what pain points keep coming up, and how you're thinking about future-proofing the business. 30 minutes of your time would make a big difference.\n\nI know you're busy, so let me know what time is best for a call or I can drop by your office at Fishery Port Road if that's easier!\n\nBest,\nSeth\n\nP.S. Before our call, I can train our AI on your export documents so you can see exactly what we'd catch for Song Fish Dealer.",
          "ps_used": "Before the call, I can train our AI on your [their_doc_type] so you can see exactly what we'd catch for [company]."
        },
        "email_2": {
          "subject": "Dorothy <> Seth",
          "body": "Hi Dorothy,\n\nI did some digging into Song Fish Dealer and had a few ideas on where we could save time:\n\n- Extract 99% accurate data from supplier invoices for faster processing.\n- Generate audit-ready Commercial Invoices and Packing Lists from one entry.\n- Flag inconsistent quantities or HS codes across all export documents.\n\nHave you solved for export documentation prep or is your team still doing it manually?\n\nIf we could help you do the same and save 10+ hours a week, automatically from WhatsApp, email or any chat app you already use, would that be interesting?\n\nBest,\nSeth",
          "ideas_used": [
            "Extract 99% accurate data from supplier invoices for faster processing.",
            "Generate audit-ready Commercial Invoices and Packing Lists from one entry.",
            "Flag inconsistent quantities or HS codes across all export documents."
          ]
        },
        "email_3": {
          "subject": "Re: quick question on food",
          "body": "Hi Dorothy,\n\nMy co-founder and I are building a startup in Singapore to support local businesses and we wanted to reach out because your expertise could save us a ton of mistakes.\n\nGiven your experience at Song Fish Dealer, I was hoping to get your opinion.\n\nFor some background, we spoke with senior government leaders last week at Smart Nation - they shared that SMEs in underserved areas stand to gain the most from AI compared to MNCs.\n\nWe're now looking to figure out which are the biggest pain points food trading companies face and 30 minutes of your time would make a huge difference.\n\nWe're a Cambridge led group, based in SG, and have a prototype, but this is in no way a sales call.\n\nIf you could just email or WhatsApp an AI assistant your export documents and get back an audit-ready reconciliation in Excel showing consistent shipment details, would that be useful?\n\nWould you be open to a quick chat to point us in the right direction?\n\nBest,\nSeth\n\nP.S. Happy to drop by your office at Fishery Port Road if that's easier!",
          "hook_used": "FALLBACK (no signals)",
          "value_line": "If you could just email or WhatsApp an AI assistant your export documents and get back an audit-ready reconciliation in Excel showing consistent shipment details, would that be useful?",
          "value_line_source": "document_pain_analysis and company_profile"
        },
        "linkedin_message": {
          "message": "Seth here. Given your experience at Song Fish Dealer, I was hoping to get your opinion. Emailed you about our idea for a WhatsApp AI assistant that does back office work around the clock - sending a voice note too in case it missed you!",
          "hook_used": "FALLBACK (no signals)",
          "generated": true

        "voice_note": {
          "script": "Hi Dorothy, I'm building an AI startup in Singapore focused on automating heavy back-office paperwork - a gap recently highlighted to us by government leaders in Smart Nation.\n\nWe're a Cambridge-led team with a working prototype, and I'd love 20 minutes of your time to ensure we're solving the right pain points for firms like Song Fish Dealer.\n\nThis isn't a sales call - just looking for your perspective.\n\nHappy to buy you lunch near your office at Fishery Port Road as a thank you.           "body": "Hi Kenneth,\n\nI did some digging into Shrimp Improvement Systems and had a few ideas on where we could save time:\n\n- Extract 99% accurate data from diverse supplier invoices for reconciliation.\n- Get audit-ready reconciliation of multi-country health certificates.\n- Flag inconsistent quantities in commercial invoices to prevent errors for Shrimp Improvement Systems.\n\nHave you solved for export documentation prep or is your team still doing it manually?\n\nIf we could help you do the same and save 10+ hours a week, automatically from WhatsApp, email or any chat app you already use, would that be interesting?\n\nBest,\nSeth",
          "ideas_used": [
            "Extract 99% accurate data from diverse supplier invoices for reconciliation.",
            "Get audit-ready reconciliation of multi-country health certificates.",
            "Flag inconsistent quantities in commercial invoices to prevent errors for Shrimp Improvement Systems."
          ]
        },
        "email_3": {
          "subject": "Re: quick question on food",
          "body": "Hi Kenneth,\n\nMy co-founder and I are building a startup in Singapore to support local businesses and we wanted to reach out because your expertise could save us a ton of mistakes.\n\nGiven your experience in food, I was hoping to get your opinion.\n\nFor some background, we spoke with senior government leaders last week at Smart Nation - they shared that SMEs in underserved areas stand to gain the most from AI compared to MNCs.\n\nWe're now looking to figure out which are the biggest pain points food trading companies face and 30 minutes of your time would make a huge difference.\n\nWe're a Cambridge led group, based in SG, and have a prototype, but this is in no way a sales call.\n\nIf you could just email or WhatsApp an AI assistant your export documents and get back audit-ready reconciliation of all shipment documents in Excel, would that be useful?\n\nWould you be open to a quick chat to point us in the right direction?\n\nBest,\nSeth\n\nP.S. Happy to drop by your office at Hudson TechnoCentre if that's easier!",
          "hook_used": "Fallback (no specific signals)",
          "value_line": "just email or WhatsApp an AI assistant your export documents and get back audit-ready reconciliation of all shipment documents in Excel",

          "body": "Hi Vikram,\n\nWe're building an AI assistant that's always one step ahead for SG food trading companies.\n\nIt proactively checks in - running daily reconciliation of supplier invoices against purchase orders, tracking missing health certificates and prompting for updates, or giving you morning updates on export documents awaiting approval - all without you having to ask.\n\nYou just WhatsApp or email it instructions and it does your back office work around the clock.\n\nWe're a Cambridge-backed group with a working prototype to demo, but this isn't a sales call.         "email_1": {
          "subject": "quick question on food",
          "body": "Hi Wai Weng,\n\nWe're building an AI assistant that's always one step ahead for SG food processors.\n\nIt proactively checks in - running daily reconciliation of Commercial Invoices and Packing Lists, tracking missing Health Certificates and COOs, or giving you morning updates on export documents awaiting approval - all without you having to ask.\n\nYou just WhatsApp or email it instructions and it does your back office work around the clock.\n\nWe're a Cambridge-backed group with a working prototype to demo, but this isn't a sales call. We're trying to learn what food teams actually find useful, what pain points keep coming up, and how you're thinking about future-proofing the business. 30 minutes of your time would make a big difference.\n\nI know you're busy, so let me know what time is best for a call or I can drop by your office if that's easier!\n\nBest,\nSeth\n\nP.S. Before our call, I can train our AI on your export documents so you can see exactly what we'd catch for Prime Agri.",
          "ps_used": "Train AI on their export documents P.S."
        },
        "email_2": {
          "subject": "Wai Weng <> Seth",
          "body": "Hi Wai Weng,\n\nI did some digging into Prime Agri and had a few ideas on where we could save time:\n\n- Flag discrepancies that humans miss across your export documents.\n- Extract 99% accurate data from all supplier invoices and test reports.\n- Generate audit-ready export documents for SFA and TradeNet submission.\n\nHave you solved for export documentation prep or is your team still doing it manually?\n\nIf we could help you do the same and save 10+ hours a week, automatically from WhatsApp, email or any chat app you already use, would that be interesting?\n\nBest,\nSeth",
          "ideas_used": [
            "Flag discrepancies that humans miss across your export documents.",
            "Extract 99% accurate data from all supplier invoices and test reports.",
            "Generate audit-ready export documents for SFA and TradeNet submission."
          ]
        },
        "email_3": {
          "subject": "Re: quick question on food",
          "body": "Hi Wai Weng,\n\nMy co-founder and I are building a startup in Singapore to support local businesses and we wanted to reach out because your expertise could save us a ton of mistakes.\n\nGiven your experience in food, I was hoping to get your opinion.\n\nFor some background, we spoke with senior government leaders last week at Smart Nation - they shared that SMEs in underserved areas stand to gain the most from AI compared to MNCs.\n\nWe're now looking to figure out which are the biggest pain points food trading companies face and 30 minutes of your time would make a huge difference.\n\nWe're a Cambridge led group, based in SG, and have a prototype, but this is in no way a sales call.\n\nIf you could just email or WhatsApp an AI assistant your shipment documents and get back audit-ready reconciliation of all shipment documents in Excel, would that be useful?\n\nWould you be open to a quick chat to point us in the right direction?\n\nBest,\nSeth\n\nP.S. Happy to drop by your office if that's easier!",
          "hook_used": "Fallback (no signals)",
          "value_line": "If you could just email or WhatsApp an AI assistant your shipment documents and get back audit-ready reconciliation of all shipment documents in Excel, would that be useful?",

          "body": "Hi Ying Ying,\n\nWe're building an AI assistant that's always one step ahead for SG food processors.\n\nIt proactively checks in - running daily reconciliation of commercial invoices against certificate data, tracking missing health certificates and sending follow-ups, or giving you morning updates on export documents awaiting approval - all without you having to ask.\n\nYou just WhatsApp or email it instructions and it does your back office work around the clock.\n\nWe're a Cambridge-backed group with a working prototype to demo, but this isn't a sales call. We're trying to learn what food processing teams actually find useful, what pain points keep coming up, and how you're thinking about future-proofing the business. 30 minutes of your time would make a big difference.\n\nI know you're busy, so let me know what time is best for a call or I can drop by your office at CapitaGreen if that's easier!\n\nBest,\nSeth\n\nP.S. Before our call, I can train our AI on your export documents so you can see exactly what we'd catch for Cargill Asia Pacific Holdings.",
          "ps_used": "Before our call, I can train our AI on your export documents so you can see exactly what we'd catch for Cargill Asia Pacific Holdings."
        },
        "email_2": {
          "subject": "Ying Ying <> Seth",
          "body": "Hi Ying Ying,\n\nI did some digging into Cargill Asia Pacific Holdings and had a few ideas on where we could save time:\n\n- Extract 99% accurate data from all your commercial invoices for compliance.\n- Flag discrepancies that humans miss across Cargill's multi-country shipment documents.\n- Generate audit-ready Health Certificates for diverse markets in minutes.\n\nHave you solved for export documentation prep or is your team still doing it manually?\n\nIf we could help you do the same and save 10+ hours a week, automatically from WhatsApp, email or any chat app you already use, would that be interesting?\n\nBest,\nSeth",
          "ideas_used": [
            "Extract 99% accurate data from all your commercial invoices for compliance.",
            "Flag discrepancies that humans miss across Cargill's multi-country shipment documents.",
            "Generate audit-ready Health Certificates for diverse markets in minutes."
          ]
        },
        "email_3": {
          "subject": "Re: quick question on food processing",
          "body": "Hi Ying Ying,\n\nMy co-founder and I are building a startup in Singapore to support local businesses and we wanted to reach out because your expertise could save us a ton of mistakes.\n\nGiven your experience in food, I was hoping to get your opinion.\n\nFor some background, we spoke with senior government leaders last week at Smart Nation - they shared that SMEs in underserved areas stand to gain the most from AI compared to MNCs.\n\nWe're now looking to figure out which are the biggest pain points food trading companies face and 30 minutes of your time would make a huge difference.\n\nWe're a Cambridge led group, based in SG, and have a prototype, but this is in no way a sales call.\n\nIf you could just email or WhatsApp an AI assistant your export documents and get back an audit-ready reconciliation of all your shipment data in Excel, would that be useful?\n\nWould you be open to a quick chat to point us in the right direction?\n\nBest,\nSeth\n\nP.S. Happy to drop by your office at CapitaGreen if that's easier!",
          "hook_used": "Fallback (none)",
          "value_line": "just email or WhatsApp an AI assistant your export documents and get back an audit-ready reconciliation of all your shipment data in Excel",

    "146": {
      "company_name": "146",
      "stage1_status": "completed",
      "stage2_status": "pending",
      "stage1_result": {
        "company_name": "Suntory Beverage & Food Asia",
        "contact_name": "Yuji Mori",
        "contact_email": "yuji_mori@suntory.co.jp",
        "email_1": {
          "subject": "quick question on food processors",
          "body": "Hi Yuji,\n\nWe're building an AI assistant that's always one step ahead for SG food processors.\n\nIt proactively checks in - running daily reconciliations of invoices against purchase orders, tracking missing Health Certificates and sending follow-ups, or giving you morning updates on Cargo Clearance Permits awaiting approval - all without you having to ask.\n\nYou just WhatsApp or email it instructions and it does your back office work around the clock.\n\nWe're a Cambridge-backed group with a working prototype to demo, but this isn't a sales call. We're trying to learn what food teams actually find useful, what pain points keep coming up, and how you're thinking about future-proofing the business. 30 minutes of your time would make a big difference.\n\nI know you're busy, so let me know what time is best for a call or I can drop by your office at Guoco Midtown if that's easier!\n\nBest,\nSeth\n\nP.S. Before our call, I can train our AI on your export documents so you can see exactly what we'd catch for Suntory Beverage & Food Asia.",
          "ps_used": "Customized value demo"
        },
        "email_2": {
          "subject": "Yuji <> Seth",
          "body": "Hi Yuji,\n\nI did some digging into Suntory Beverage & Food Asia and had a few ideas on where we could save time:\n\n- Generate a complete set of audit-ready export documents (CI, PL, COO).\n- Flag inconsistent quantities or HS codes across shipping documents.\n- Extract 99% accurate data from supplier invoices and test reports.\n\nHave you solved for export documentation prep or is your team still doing it manually?\n\nIf we could help you do the same and save 10+ hours a week, automatically from WhatsApp, email or any chat app you already use, would that be interesting?\n\nBest,\nSeth",
          "ideas_used": [
            "Generate a complete set of audit-ready export documents (CI, PL, COO).",
            "Flag inconsistent quantities or HS codes across shipping documents.",
            "Extract 99% accurate data from supplier invoices and test reports."
          ]
        },
        "email_3": {
          "subject": "Re: quick question on food",
          "body": "Hi Yuji,\n\nMy co-founder and I are building a startup in Singapore to support local businesses and we wanted to reach out because your expertise could save us a ton of mistakes.\n\nGiven your experience in food, I was hoping to get your opinion.\n\nFor some background, we spoke with senior government leaders last week at Smart Nation - they shared that SMEs in underserved areas stand to gain the most from AI compared to MNCs.\n\nWe're now looking to figure out which are the biggest pain points food trading companies face and 30 minutes of your time would make a huge difference.\n\nWe're a Cambridge led group, based in SG, and have a prototype, but this is in no way a sales call.\n\nIf you could just email or WhatsApp an AI assistant your export documents and get back an audit-ready reconciliation in Excel showing consistency across your shipment docs, would that be useful?\n\nWould you be open to a quick chat to point us in the right direction?\n\nBest,\nSeth\n\nP.S. Happy to drop by your office at Guoco Midtown if that's easier!",
          "hook_used": "Fallback",
          "value_line": "If you could just email or WhatsApp an AI assistant your export documents and get back an audit-ready reconciliation in Excel showing consistency across your shipment docs",
          "value_line_source": "document_pain_analysis, company_profile"
        },

          "subject": "Roland <> Seth",
          "body": "Hi Roland,\n\nI did some digging into Rosen International and had a few ideas on where we could save time:\n\n- Get 99% accurate data extraction from supplier invoices and purchase orders for Rosen International.\n- Generate complete, audit-ready Commercial Invoices and Packing Lists from single data entry.\n- Flag inconsistencies that humans miss across entire export document sets before submission.\n\nHave you solved for export documentation prep or is your team still doing it manually?\n\nIf we could help you do the same and save 10+ hours a week, automatically from WhatsApp, email or any chat app you already use, would that be interesting?\n\nBest,\nSeth",
          "ideas_used": [
            "Get 99% accurate data extraction from supplier invoices and purchase orders for Rosen International.",
            "Generate complete, audit-ready Commercial Invoices and Packing Lists from single data entry.",
            "Flag inconsistencies that humans miss across entire export document sets before submission."
          ]
        },
        "email_3": {
          "subject": "Re: quick question on food",
          "body": "Hi Roland,\n\nMy co-founder and I are building a startup in Singapore to support local businesses and we wanted to reach out because your expertise could save us a ton of mistakes.\n\nGiven your experience in food, I was hoping to get your opinion.\n\nFor some background, we spoke with senior government leaders last week at Smart Nation - they shared that SMEs in underserved areas stand to gain the most from AI compared to MNCs.\n\nWe're now looking to figure out which are the biggest pain points food trading companies face and 30 minutes of your time would make a huge difference.\n\nWe're a Cambridge led group, based in SG, and have a prototype, but this is in no way a sales call.\n\nIf you could just email or WhatsApp an AI assistant your export documents and get back an audit-ready reconciliation of your full set of export documents in Excel, would that be useful?\n\nWould you be open to a quick chat to point us in the right direction?\n\nBest,\nSeth\n\nP.S. Happy to drop by your office at Ubi Techpark if that's easier!",
          "hook_used": "Fallback",
          "value_line": "If you could just email or WhatsApp an AI assistant your export documents and get back an audit-ready reconciliation of your full set of export documents in Excel, would that be useful?",
          "value_line_source": "document_pain_analysis, company_profile"
        },
        "linkedin_message": {
          "message": "Seth here. Given your experience leading Rosen International, I was hoping to get your opinion. Emailed you about our idea for a WhatsApp AI assistant that does back office work around the clock - sending a voice note too in case it missed you!",

          "body": "Hi Basheer,\n\nI did some digging into Alfa Tradelinks and had a few ideas on where we could save time:\n\n- Extract 99% accurate data from all supplier invoices into clean Excel reports.\n- Validate consistency across Commercial Invoices and Packing Lists to prevent errors.\n- Automate generation of audit-ready Health Certificates for your food exports.\n\nHave you solved for export documentation prep or is your team still doing it manually?\n\nIf we could help you do the same and save 10+ hours a week, automatically from WhatsApp, email or any chat app you already use, would that be interesting?\n\nBest,\nSeth",
          "ideas_used": [
            "Extract 99% accurate data from all supplier invoices into clean Excel reports.",
            "Validate consistency across Commercial Invoices and Packing Lists to prevent errors.",
            "Automate generation of audit-ready Health Certificates for your food exports."
          ]
        },
        "email_3": {
          "subject": "Re: quick question on food",
          "body": "Hi Basheer,\n\nMy co-founder and I are building a startup in Singapore to support local businesses and we wanted to reach out because your expertise could save us a ton of mistakes.\n\nGiven your experience in food, I was hoping to get your opinion.\n\nFor some background, we spoke with senior government leaders last week at Smart Nation - they shared that SMEs in underserved areas stand to gain the most from AI compared to MNCs.\n\nWe're now looking to figure out which are the biggest pain points food trading companies face and 30 minutes of your time would make a huge difference.\n\nWe're a Cambridge led group, based in SG, and have a prototype, but this is in no way a sales call.\n\nIf you could just email or WhatsApp an AI assistant your export documents and get back an audit-ready reconciliation of all shipment documents in Excel, would that be useful?\n\nWould you be open to a quick chat to point us in the right direction?\n\nBest,\nSeth\n\nP.S. Happy to drop by your office at Eunos if that's easier!",
          "hook_used": "Fallback (General experience)",
          "value_line": "just email or WhatsApp an AI assistant your export documents and get back an audit-ready reconciliation of all shipment documents in Excel",
          "value_line_source": "document_pain_analysis"
        },
        "linkedin_message": {
          "message": "N/A",
          "hook_used": "none",
          "generated": false
        },
        "voice_note": {
          "script": "N/A",
          "location_used": "none",
          "generated": false

        "email_1": {
          "subject": "quick question on food",
          "body": "Hi George,\n\nWe're building an AI assistant that's always one step ahead for SG food trading companies.\n\nIt proactively checks in - running daily reconciliation of commercial invoices vs packing lists, tracking outstanding health certificates and sending automated follow-ups, or giving you morning updates on export documents awaiting approval - all without you having to ask.\n\nYou just WhatsApp or email it instructions and it does your back office work around the clock.\n\nWe're a Cambridge-backed group with a working prototype to demo, but this isn't a sales call. We're trying to learn what food teams actually find useful, what pain points keep coming up, and how you're thinking about future-proofing the business. 30 minutes of your time would make a big difference.\n\nI know you're busy, so let me know what time is best for a call or I can drop by your office at Woodlands if that's easier!\n\nBest,\nSeth\n\nP.S. Before our call, I can train our AI on your export documents so you can see exactly what we'd catch for Sun Kee.",

        "contact_name": "Colin Lee",
        "contact_email": "colin_lee@cargill.com",
        "email_1": {
          "subject": "quick question on food processing",
          "body": "Hi Colin,\n\nWe're building an AI assistant that's always one step ahead for SG food processors.\n\nIt proactively checks in - running daily reconciliation of commercial invoice data against certificate data, tracking pending Health Cert applications and sending follow-ups, or giving you morning updates on export documents awaiting approval - all without you having to ask.\n\nYou just WhatsApp or email it instructions and it does your back office work around the clock.\n\nWe're a Cambridge-backed group with a working prototype to demo, but this isn't a sales call. We're trying to learn what food processing teams actually find useful, what pain points keep coming up, and how you're thinking about future-proofing the business. 30 minutes of your time would make a big difference.\n\nI know you're busy, so let me know what time is best for a call or I can drop by your office at CapitaGreen if that's easier!\n\nBest,\nSeth\n\nP.S. Before our call, I can train our AI on your export documents so you can see exactly how it works for Cargill Asia Pacific Holdings.",
          "ps_used": "Generic P.S. for export documents (Email 1 specific, not to be confused with Email 2's ps_used field)"
        },
        "email_2": {
          "subject": "Colin <> Seth",
          "body": "Hi Colin,\n\nI did some digging into Cargill Asia Pacific Holdings and had a few ideas on where we could save time:\n\n- Flag discrepancies across all shipment documents before submission for Cargill.\n- Generate audit-ready export document sets from one data entry.\n- Extract 99% accurate data for SFA Health Cert portals in minutes.\n\nHave you solved for export documentation prep or is your team still doing it manually?\n\nIf we could help you do the same and save 10+ hours a week, automatically from WhatsApp, email or any chat app you already use, would that be interesting?\n\nBest,\nSeth",
          "ideas_used": [
            "Flag discrepancies across all shipment documents before submission for Cargill.",
            "Generate audit-ready export document sets from one data entry.",
            "Extract 99% accurate data for SFA Health Cert portals in minutes."
          ]
        },
        "email_3": {
          "subject": "Re: quick question on food processing",
          "body": "Hi Colin,\n\nMy co-founder and I are building a startup in Singapore to support local businesses and we wanted to reach out because your expertise could save us a ton of mistakes.\n\nGiven your experience in food, I was hoping to get your opinion.\n\nFor some background, we spoke with senior government leaders last week at Smart Nation - they shared that SMEs in underserved areas stand to gain the most from AI compared to MNCs.\n\nWe're now looking to figure out which are the biggest pain points food trading companies face and 30 minutes of your time would make a huge difference.\n\nWe're a Cambridge led group, based in SG, and have a prototype, but this is in no way a sales call.\n\nIf you could just email or WhatsApp an AI assistant your export documents and get back audit-ready reconciliation between invoice data and certificate data in Excel, would that be useful?\n\nWould you be open to a quick chat to point us in the right direction?\n\nBest,\nSeth\n\nP.S. Happy to drop by your office at CapitaGreen if that's easier!",
          "hook_used": "Fallback",
          "value_line": "If you could just email or WhatsApp an AI assistant your export documents and get back audit-ready reconciliation between invoice data and certificate data in Excel, would that be useful?",

        "email_2": {

          "body": "Hi Gaurav,\n\nI did some digging into Ferrero Asia Pacific and had a few ideas on where we could save time:\n\n- Audit-ready reconciliation of shipment documents to prevent errors.\n- Extract 99% accurate data from commercial invoices and packing lists.\n- Flag discrepancies across health and halal certificates for compliance.\n\nHave you solved for export documentation prep or is your team still doing it manually?\n\nIf we could help you do the same and save 10+ hours a week, automatically from WhatsApp, email or any chat app you already use, would that be interesting?\n\nBest,\nSeth",

          "body": "Hi Gaurav,\n\nMy co-founder and I are building a startup in Singapore to support local businesses and we wanted to reach out because your expertise could save us a ton of mistakes.\n\nGiven your experience in food, I was hoping to get your opinion.\n\nFor some background, we spoke with senior government leaders last week at Smart Nation - they shared that SMEs in underserved areas stand to gain the most from AI compared to MNCs.\n\nWe're now looking to figure out which are the biggest pain points food trading companies face and 30 minutes of your time would make a huge difference.\n\nWe're a Cambridge led group, based in SG, and have a prototype, but this is in no way a sales call.\n\nIf you could just email or WhatsApp an AI assistant your export documents and get back audit-ready commercial invoices and certificate applications in Excel, would that be useful?\n\nWould you be open to a quick chat to point us in the right direction?\n\nBest,\nSeth\n\nP.S.           "body": "Hi Masaaki,\n\nI did some digging into Yakult Singapore and had a few ideas on where we could save time:\n\n- Flag inconsistencies across Yakult's import invoices and packing lists.\n- Extract 99% accurate data from supplier test reports for compliance.\n- Generate complete, audit-ready health certificate applications for SFA.\n\nHave you solved for export documentation prep or is your team still doing it manually?\n\nIf we could help you do the same and save 10+ hours a week, automatically from WhatsApp, email or any chat app you already use, would that be interesting?\n\nBest,\nSeth",

          "subject": "Re: quick question on food",
          "body": "Hi Masaaki,\n\nMy co-founder and I are building a startup in Singapore to support local businesses and we wanted to reach out because your expertise could save us a ton of mistakes.\n\nGiven your experience in food, I was hoping to get your opinion.\n\nFor some background, we spoke with senior government leaders last week at Smart Nation - they shared that SMEs in underserved areas stand to gain the most from AI compared to MNCs.\n\nWe're now looking to figure out which are the biggest pain points food trading companies face and 30 minutes of your time would make a huge difference.\n\nWe're a Cambridge led group, based in SG, and have a prototype, but this is in no way a sales call.\n\nIf you could just email or WhatsApp an AI assistant your import documentation and health certificates and get back an audit-ready reconciliation of your import documentation in Excel, would that be useful?\n\nWould you be open to a quick chat to point us in the right direction?\n\nBest,\nSeth\n\nP.S.           "subject": "Re: quick question on food",
          "body": "Hi Andreas,My co-founder and I are building a startup in Singapore to support local businesses and we wanted to reach out because your expertise could save us a ton of mistakes.Given your experience in food, I was hoping to get your opinion.For some background, we spoke with senior government leaders last week at Smart Nation - they shared that SMEs in underserved areas stand to gain the most from AI compared to MNCs.We're now looking to figure out which are the biggest pain points food trading companies face and 30 minutes of your time would make a huge difference.We're a Cambridge led group, based in SG, and have a prototype, but this is in no way a sales call.If you could just email or WhatsApp an AI assistant your export documents and get back audit-ready reconciliation of all shipment documents in Excel, would that be useful?Would you be open to a quick chat to point us in the right direction?Best,SethP.S.         "email_1": {
          "subject": "quick question on food",
          "body": "Hi Munetaka,We're building an AI assistant that's always one step ahead for SG food manufacturing companies.It proactively checks in - running daily reconciliation of Commercial Invoices and Packing Lists, tracking missing Health Certificate applications and sending follow-ups, or giving you morning updates on Halal Certificates awaiting approval for specific markets - all without you having to ask.You just WhatsApp or email it instructions and it does your back office work around the clock.We're a Cambridge-backed group with a working prototype to demo, but this isn't a sales call. Before our call, I can train our AI on your export documents so you can see exactly what we'd catch for Suntory Beverage & Food Asia.",
          "ps_used": "Generic (train AI on export documents for company_name)"
        },
        "email_2": {
          "subject": "Munetaka <> Seth",
          "body": "Hi Munetaka,I did some digging into Suntory Beverage & Food Asia and had a few ideas on where we could save time:- Catch inconsistencies across all export documents for Suntory.- Extract 99% accurate data from Health Certificates for SFA portals.- Generate audit-ready COO applications for diverse APAC markets.Have you solved for export documentation prep or is your team still doing it manually?If we could help you do the same and save 10+ hours a week, automatically from WhatsApp, email or any chat app you already use, would that be interesting?Best,Seth",
          "ideas_used": [

            "- Generate audit-ready COO applications for diverse APAC markets."

    "192": {
      "company_name": "192",
      "stage1_status": "completed",
      "stage2_status": "pending",
      "stage1_result": {
        "company_name": "Elevate Foods",
        "contact_name": "Gayatri Bhatia",
        "contact_email": "gayatri@elevatefoods.org",
        "email_1": {
          "subject": "quick question on Food Processor",
          "body": "Hi Gayatri,\n\nWe're building an AI assistant that's always one step ahead for SG food processors.\n\nIt proactively checks in - running daily reconciliations of purchase orders against supplier invoices, tracking missing health certificates and sending follow-ups, or giving you morning updates on export documents awaiting approval - all without you having to ask.\n\nYou just WhatsApp or email it instructions and it does your back office work around the clock.\n\nWe're a Cambridge-backed group with a working prototype to demo, but this isn't a sales call. We're trying to learn what Food Processor teams actually find useful, what pain points keep coming up, and how you're thinking about future-proofing the business. 30 minutes of your time would make a big difference.\n\nI know you're busy, so let me know what time is best for a call or I can drop by your office at InterContinental Singapore Robertson Quay if that's easier!\n\nBest,\nSeth\n\nP.S. Before our call, I can train our AI on your export documents so you can see exactly what we'd catch for Elevate Foods.",
          "ps_used": "Before our call, I can train our AI on your export documents so you can see exactly what we'd catch for Elevate Foods."
        },
        "email_2": {
          "subject": "Gayatri <> Seth",
          "body": "Hi Gayatri,\n\nI did some digging into Elevate Foods and had a few ideas on where we could save time:\n\n- Extract 99% accurate data from all your commercial invoices in seconds.\n- Generate audit-ready packing lists and COOs from one data entry for Elevate Foods.\n- Flag inconsistencies across purchase orders and export certificates before submission.\n\nHave you solved for export documentation prep or is your team still doing it manually?\n\nIf we could help you do the same and save 10+ hours a week, automatically from WhatsApp, email or any chat app you already use, would that be interesting?\n\nBest,\nSeth",
          "ideas_used": [
            "Extract 99% accurate data from all your commercial invoices in seconds.",
            "Generate audit-ready packing lists and COOs from one data entry for Elevate Foods.",
            "Flag inconsistencies across purchase orders and export certificates before submission."
          ]
        },
        "email_3": {
          "subject": "quick question on food",
          "body": "Hi Gayatri,\n\nMy co-founder and I are building a startup in Singapore to support local businesses and we wanted to reach out because your expertise could save us a ton of mistakes.\n\nGiven your experience in food, I was hoping to get your opinion.\n\nFor some background, we spoke with senior government leaders last week at Smart Nation - they shared that SMEs in underserved areas stand to gain the most from AI compared to MNCs.\n\nWe're now looking to figure out which are the biggest pain points food trading companies face and 30 minutes of your time would make a huge difference.\n\nWe're a Cambridge led group, based in SG, and have a prototype, but this is in no way a sales call.\n\nIf you could just email or WhatsApp an AI assistant your export documents and get back an audit-ready set of consistent export documents, generated automatically in Excel, would that be useful?\n\nWould you be open to a quick chat to point us in the right direction?\n\nBest,\nSeth\n\nP.S. Happy to drop by your office at InterContinental Singapore Robertson Quay if that's easier!",
          "hook_used": "Fallback",
          "value_line": "just email or WhatsApp an AI assistant your export documents and get back an audit-ready set of consistent export documents, generated automatically in Excel",
          "value_line_source": "document_pain_analysis"
        },
        "linkedin_message": {
          "message": "N/A",
          "hook_used": "none",
          "generated": false
        },
        "voice_note": {
          "script": "N/A",
          "location_used": "none",
          "generated": false
        }
      },

          "body": "Hi Marc,\n\nI did some digging into C S Tay Foods and had a few ideas on where we could save time:\n\n- Extract 99% accurate data from diverse supplier invoices for faster processing.\n- Generate audit-ready Health Certificates and COOs for different export markets.\n- Flag inconsistencies across Commercial Invoices and Packing Lists to prevent customs delays.\n\nHave you solved for export documentation prep or is your team still doing it manually?\n\nIf we could help you do the same and save 10+ hours a week, automatically from WhatsApp, email or any chat app you already use, would that be interesting?\n\nBest,\nSeth",

          "body": "Hi Marc,\n\nMy co-founder and I are building a startup in Singapore to support local businesses and we wanted to reach out because your expertise could save us a ton of mistakes.\n\nGiven your experience in food, I was hoping to get your opinion.\n\nFor some background, we spoke with senior government leaders last week at Smart Nation - they shared that SMEs in underserved areas stand to gain the most from AI compared to MNCs.\n\nWe're now looking to figure out which are the biggest pain points food trading companies face and 30 minutes of your time would make a huge difference.\n\nWe're a Cambridge led group, based in SG, and have a prototype, but this is in no way a sales call.\n\nIf you could just email or WhatsApp an AI assistant your shipment documents and get back an audit-ready reconciliation of all your shipment documents in Excel, would that be useful?\n\nWould you be open to a quick chat to point us in the right direction?\n\nBest,\nSeth\n\nP.S.           "body": "Hi Jasmond,\n\nJust wanted to check in again in case this missed your inbox.\n\nWe're building an AI assistant that's always one step ahead. Before the call, I can train our AI on your health cert applications so you can see exactly how it handles seafood export docs for Global Oceanlink.",

          "subject": "Re: quick question on food",
          "body": "Hi Jasmond,\n\nMy co-founder and I are building a startup in Singapore to support local businesses and we wanted to reach out because your expertise could save us a ton of mistakes.\n\nGiven your experience in food, I was hoping to get your opinion.\n\nFor some background, we spoke with senior government leaders last week at Smart Nation - they shared that SMEs in underserved areas stand to gain the most from AI compared to MNCs.\n\nWe're now looking to figure out which are the biggest pain points food trading companies face and 30 minutes of your time would make a huge difference.\n\nWe're a Cambridge led group, based in SG, and have a prototype, but this is in no way a sales call.\n\nIf you could just email or WhatsApp an AI assistant your shipment documents and get back audit-ready reconciliation in Excel showing consistency across all your export papers, would that be useful?\n\nWould you be open to a quick chat to point us in the right direction?\n\nBest,\nSeth\n\nP.S.           "subject": "quick question on food processing",
          "body": "Hi Hadas,\n\nWe're building an AI assistant that's always one step ahead for SG food processors.\n\nIt proactively checks in - running daily reconciliation of customer invoices and packing slips, tracking discrepancies between online orders and fulfillment records, or giving you morning updates on new orders and inventory levels - all without you having to ask.\n\nYou just WhatsApp or email it instructions and it does your back office work around the clock.\n\nWe're a Cambridge-backed group with a working prototype to demo, but this isn't a sales call.     "205": {
      "company_name": "205",
      "stage1_status": "completed",
      "stage2_status": "pending",
      "stage1_result": {
        "company_name": "IRVINS",
        "contact_name": "Irvin Gunawan",
        "contact_email": "irvin@irvinsaltedegg.com",
        "email_1": {
          "subject": "quick question on food",
          "body": "Hi Irvin,\n\nWe're building an AI assistant that's always one step ahead for SG food processing companies.\n\nIt proactively checks in - running daily reconciliations of export documents against sales orders, tracking missing health certificates and sending automated follow-ups, or giving you morning updates on inbound ingredient customs clearances - all without you having to ask.\n\nYou just WhatsApp or email it instructions and it does your back office work around the clock.\n\nWe're a Cambridge-backed group with a working prototype to demo, but this isn't a sales call. We're trying to learn what food teams actually find useful, what pain points keep coming up, and how you're thinking about future-proofing the business. 30 minutes of your time would make a big difference.\n\nI know you're busy, so let me know what time is best for a call or I can drop by your office at Tagore Industrial Avenue if that's easier!\n\nBest,\nSeth\n\nP.S. Before our call, I can train our AI on your Halal + health cert stack so you can see exactly what we'd catch for IRVINS.",
          "ps_used": "Halal + health cert stack"
        },
        "email_2": {
          "subject": "Irvin <> Seth",
          "body": "Hi Irvin,\n\nI did some digging into IRVINS and had a few ideas on where we could save time:\n\n- Extract 99% accurate data from supplier invoices and test reports for IRVINS.\n- Generate audit-ready Commercial Invoices and Packing Lists consistent across channels.\n- Flag discrepancies across your export document sets that humans miss.\n\nHave you solved for export documentation prep or is your team still doing it manually?\n\nIf we could help you do the same and save 10+ hours a week, automatically from WhatsApp, email or any chat app you already use, would that be interesting?\n\nBest,\nSeth",
          "ideas_used": [
            "Extract 99% accurate data from supplier invoices and test reports for IRVINS.",
            "Generate audit-ready Commercial Invoices and Packing Lists consistent across channels.",
            "Flag discrepancies across your export document sets that humans miss."
          ]
        },
        "email_3": {
          "subject": "Re: quick question on food",
          "body": "Hi Irvin,\n\nMy co-founder and I are building a startup in Singapore to support local businesses and we wanted to reach out because your expertise could save us a ton of mistakes.\n\nGiven your experience in food, I was hoping to get your opinion.\n\nFor some background, we spoke with senior government leaders last week at Smart Nation - they shared that SMEs in underserved areas stand to gain the most from AI compared to MNCs.\n\nWe're now looking to figure out which are the biggest pain points food trading companies face and 30 minutes of your time would make a huge difference.\n\nWe're a Cambridge led group, based in SG, and have a prototype, but this is in no way a sales call.\n\nIf you could just email or WhatsApp an AI assistant your export document sets and get back an audit-ready reconciliation of all export document details in Excel, would that be useful?\n\nWould you be open to a quick chat to point us in the right direction?\n\nBest,\nSeth\n\nP.S. Happy to drop by your office at Tagore Industrial Avenue if that's easier!",
          "hook_used": "Fallback (no signals)",
          "value_line": "If you could just email or WhatsApp an AI assistant your export document sets and get back an audit-ready reconciliation of all export document details in Excel, would that be useful?",
          "value_line_source": "document_pain_analysis"
        },
        "linkedin_message": {
          "message": "N/A",
          "hook_used": "none",
          "generated": false
        },
        "voice_note": {
          "script": "N/A",
          "location_used": "none",
          "generated": false
        }
      },

      "stage2_error": null,

        "email_1": {
          "subject": "quick question on food",
          "body": "Hi Zachary,\n\nMy co-founder and I are building a startup in Singapore to support local businesses and we wanted to reach out because your expertise could save us a ton of mistakes.\n\nGiven your experience in food, I was hoping to get your opinion.\n\nFor some background, we spoke with senior government leaders last week at Smart Nation - they shared that SMEs in underserved areas stand to gain the most from AI compared to MNCs.\n\nWe're now looking to figure out which are the biggest pain points food trading companies face and 30 minutes of your time would make a huge difference.\n\nWe're a Cambridge led group, based in SG, and have a prototype, but this is in no way a sales call.\n\nIf you could just email or WhatsApp an AI assistant your Commercial Invoices, Packing Lists, COOs, and Health Certificates and get back 99% accurate, audit-ready data in Excel for your export compliance and finance teams, would that be useful?\n\nWould you be open to a quick chat to point us in the right direction?\n\nBest,\nSeth\n\nP.S. Happy to drop by your office at Pandan Loop if that's easier!",
          "ps_used": "P.S. Happy to drop by your office at Pandan Loop if that's easier! (from research location: Pandan Loop)"

          "body": "Hi Zachary,\n\nJust wanted to check in again in case this missed your inbox.\n\nWe're building an AI assistant that's always one step ahead. Before the call, I can train our AI on your health cert applications so you can see exactly how it handles seafood export docs for Seawaves Frozen Food.",
          "ideas_used": [
            "Generate complete, audit-ready Commercial Invoices and Packing Lists from order data for Seawaves.",

          ]
        },
        "email_3": {
          "subject": "Zachary <> Seth",
          "body": "Hi Zachary,\n\nI did some digging into Seawaves Frozen Food and had a few ideas on where we could save time:\n\n- Generate complete, audit-ready Commercial Invoices and Packing Lists from order data for Seawaves.\n- Extract 99% accurate data from all your export documents for seamless TradeNet CCP submissions.\n- Flag inconsistencies that humans miss across HS codes and quantities in your full shipment doc set.\n\nHave you solved for export documentation prep or is your team still doing it manually?\n\nIf we could help you do the same and save 10+ hours a week, automatically from WhatsApp, email or any chat app you already use, would that be interesting?\n\nBest,\nSeth",

          "script": "Hi Jason, I'm building an AI startup in Singapore focused on automating heavy back-office paperwork - a gap recently highlighted to us by government leaders in Smart Nation.We're a Cambridge-led team with a working prototype, and I'd love 20 minutes of your time to ensure we're solving the right pain points for firms like Big Catch.This isn't a sales call - just looking for your perspective.Happy to buy you lunch near your office at One Fullerton as a thank you. Would you be open to a quick chat?",
          "location_used": "One Fullerton",
          "generated": true
        }

    "211": {
      "company_name": "211",
      "stage1_status": "completed",
      "stage2_status": "pending",
      "stage1_result": {
        "company_name": "Fish Soup Paradise",
        "contact_name": "Jerry Wu",
        "contact_email": "jerry@fishsoupparadise.com",
        "email_1": {
          "subject": "quick question on food",
          "body": "Hi Jerry,\n\nWe're building an AI assistant that's always one step ahead for SG food manufacturing companies.\n\nIt proactively checks in - running daily reconciliation of commercial invoices and packing lists, tracking overdue health certificates and sending reminders, or giving you morning updates on export document status - all without you having to ask.\n\nYou just WhatsApp or email it instructions and it does your back office work around the clock.\n\nWe're a Cambridge-backed group with a working prototype to demo, but this isn't a sales call. We're trying to learn what food teams actually find useful, what pain points keep coming up, and how you're thinking about future-proofing the business. 30 minutes of your time would make a big difference.\n\nI know you're busy, so let me know what time is best for a call or I can drop by your office at Mactaggart Road if that's easier!\n\nBest,\nSeth\n\nP.S. Before our call, I can train our AI on your health cert applications so you can see exactly what we'd catch for Fish Soup Paradise.",
          "ps_used": "Before our call, I can train our AI on your {their_doc_type} so you can see exactly what we'd catch for {company}."
        },
        "email_2": {
          "subject": "Jerry <> Seth",
          "body": "Hi Jerry,\n\nI did some digging into Fish Soup Paradise and had a few ideas on where we could save time:\n\n- Get audit-ready reconciliation of your commercial invoices and packing lists.\n- Extract 99% accurate data from health certificates and COOs for compliance.\n- Flag discrepancies that humans miss across delivery notes and invoices.\n\nHave you solved for export documentation prep or is your team still doing it manually?\n\nIf we could help you do the same and save 10+ hours a week, automatically from WhatsApp, email or any chat app you already use, would that be interesting?\n\nBest,\nSeth",
          "ideas_used": [
            "Get audit-ready reconciliation of your commercial invoices and packing lists.",
            "Extract 99% accurate data from health certificates and COOs for compliance.",
            "Flag discrepancies that humans miss across delivery notes and invoices."
          ]
        },
        "email_3": {
          "subject": "Re: quick question on food",
          "body": "Hi Jerry,\n\nMy co-founder and I are building a startup in Singapore to support local businesses and we wanted to reach out because your expertise could save us a ton of mistakes.\n\nGiven your experience in food, I was hoping to get your opinion.\n\nFor some background, we spoke with senior government leaders last week at Smart Nation - they shared that SMEs in underserved areas stand to gain the most from AI compared to MNCs.\n\nWe're now looking to figure out which are the biggest pain points food trading companies face and 30 minutes of your time would make a huge difference.\n\nWe're a Cambridge led group, based in SG, and have a prototype, but this is in no way a sales call.\n\nIf you could just email or WhatsApp an AI assistant your commercial invoices and packing lists and get back audit-ready reconciliation in Excel, would that be useful?\n\nWould you be open to a quick chat to point us in the right direction?\n\nBest,\nSeth\n\nP.S. Happy to drop by your office at Mactaggart Road if that's easier!",
          "hook_used": "Fallback",
          "value_line": "just email or WhatsApp an AI assistant your commercial invoices and packing lists and get back audit-ready reconciliation in Excel",
          "value_line_source": "document_pain_analysis, company_profile"
        },
        "linkedin_message": {
          "message": "N/A",
          "hook_used": "none",
          "generated": false
        },

        "email_1": {
          "subject": "quick question on food wholesalers",
          "body": "Hi Paco,\n\nWe're building an AI assistant that's always one step ahead for SG food wholesalers.\n\nIt proactively checks in - running daily reconciliation of purchase orders against invoices, tracking missing supplier certifications and sending follow-ups, or giving you morning updates on invoices awaiting approval - all without you having to ask.\n\nYou just WhatsApp or email it instructions and it does your back office work around the clock.\n\nWe're a Cambridge-backed group with a working prototype to demo, but this isn't a sales call.         "email_2": {

          "body": "Hi Paco,\n\nI did some digging into Farmio and had a few ideas on where we could save time:\n\n- Extract 99% accurate data from supplier invoices for faster processing.\n- Get audit-ready reconciliation of Farmio's purchase orders against delivery notes.\n- Flag inconsistencies across packing lists and invoices that humans miss.\n\nHave you solved for export documentation prep or is your team still doing it manually?\n\nIf we could help you do the same and save 10+ hours a week, automatically from WhatsApp, email or any chat app you already use, would that be interesting?\n\nBest,\nSeth",

        "email_3": {
          "subject": "Re: quick question on food wholesalers",
          "body": "Hi Paco,\n\nMy co-founder and I are building a startup in Singapore to support local businesses and we wanted to reach out because your expertise could save us a ton of mistakes.\n\nNoticed you're hiring for a General Manager - figured you'd have perspective on where the bottlenecks are.\n\nFor some background, we spoke with senior government leaders last week at Smart Nation - they shared that SMEs in underserved areas stand to gain the most from AI compared to MNCs.\n\nWe're now looking to figure out which are the biggest pain points food trading companies face and 30 minutes of your time would make a huge difference.\n\nWe're a Cambridge led group, based in SG, and have a prototype, but this is in no way a sales call.\n\nIf you could just email or WhatsApp an AI assistant your supplier invoices and purchase orders and get back clean, ready to import data in Excel, would that be useful?\n\nWould you be open to a quick chat to point us in the right direction?\n\nBest,\nSeth\n\nP.S.     "218": {
      "company_name": "218",
      "stage1_status": "completed",
      "stage2_status": "pending",
      "stage1_result": {
        "company_name": "At Fresh",
        "contact_name": "Lim Ai Ling",
        "contact_email": "limailing@atfresh.com.sg",
        "email_1": {
          "subject": "quick question on food",
          "body": "Hi Ai Ling,\n\nWe're building an AI assistant that's always one step ahead for SG food companies.\n\nIt proactively checks in - running daily reconciliations of Commercial Invoices and Packing Lists, tracking missing Health Certificates and sending follow-ups, or giving you morning updates on export documents awaiting approval - all without you having to ask.\n\nYou just WhatsApp or email it instructions and it does your back office work around the clock.\n\nWe're a Cambridge-backed group with a working prototype to demo, but this isn't a sales call. We're trying to learn what food teams actually find useful, what pain points keep coming up, and how you're thinking about future-proofing the business. 30 minutes of your time would make a big difference.\n\nI know you're busy, so let me know what time is best for a call or I can drop by your office at Chin Bee Road if that's easier!\n\nBest,\nSeth\n\nP.S. Before our call, I can train our AI on your Halal + health cert stack so you can see exactly what we'd catch for At Fresh.",
          "ps_used": "Before our call, I can train our AI on your [their_doc_type] so you can see exactly what we'd catch for [company] with [their_doc_type] as 'Halal + health cert stack'"
        },
        "email_2": {
          "subject": "Ai Ling <> Seth",
          "body": "Hi Ai Ling,\n\nI did some digging into At Fresh and had a few ideas on where we could save time:\n\n- Extract 99% accurate data from your purchase orders and supplier invoices.\n- Generate complete, consistent Commercial Invoices and Packing Lists for At Fresh.\n- Flag inconsistencies across your export documentation before submission.\n\nHave you solved for export documentation prep or is your team still doing it manually?\n\nIf we could help you do the same and save 10+ hours a week, automatically from WhatsApp, email or any chat app you already use, would that be interesting?\n\nBest,\nSeth",
          "ideas_used": [
            "Extract 99% accurate data from your purchase orders and supplier invoices.",
            "Generate complete, consistent Commercial Invoices and Packing Lists for At Fresh.",
            "Flag inconsistencies across your export documentation before submission."
          ]
        },
        "email_3": {
          "subject": "Re: quick question on food",
          "body": "Hi Ai Ling,\n\nMy co-founder and I are building a startup in Singapore to support local businesses and we wanted to reach out because your expertise could save us a ton of mistakes.\n\nGiven your experience in food, I was hoping to get your opinion.\n\nFor some background, we spoke with senior government leaders last week at Smart Nation - they shared that SMEs in underserved areas stand to gain the most from AI compared to MNCs.\n\nWe're now looking to figure out which are the biggest pain points food trading companies face and 30 minutes of your time would make a huge difference.\n\nWe're a Cambridge led group, based in SG, and have a prototype, but this is in no way a sales call.\n\nIf you could just email or WhatsApp an AI assistant your export documents and get back an audit-ready export documentation pack in Excel, would that be useful?\n\nWould you be open to a quick chat to point us in the right direction?\n\nBest,\nSeth\n\nP.S. Happy to drop by your office at Chin Bee Road if that's easier!",
          "hook_used": "Fallback (none)",
          "value_line": "If you could just email or WhatsApp an AI assistant your export documents and get back an audit-ready export documentation pack in Excel, would that be useful?",
          "value_line_source": "document_pain_analysis, company_profile"
        },
        "linkedin_message": {
          "message": "N/A",
          "hook_used": "none",
          "generated": false
        },
        "voice_note": {
          "script": "N/A",
          "location_used": "none",
          "generated": false
        }

          "body": "Hi Edgar,EWe're building an AI assistant that's always one step ahead for SG food processors.EIt proactively checks in - running daily reconciliations of raw milk quality data against origin documents, tracking pending Health Certificate applications and sending follow-ups, or giving you morning updates on raw milk batch statuses and corresponding export document readiness - all without you having to ask.EYou just WhatsApp or email it instructions and it does your back office work around the clock.EWe're a Cambridge-backed group with a working prototype to demo, but this isn't a sales call. We're trying to learn what food teams actually find useful, what pain points keep coming up, and how you're thinking about future-proofing the business. 30 minutes of your time would make a big difference.EI know you're busy, so let me know what time is best for a call or I can drop by your office at Horne Road if that's easier!EBest,ESethEP.S.           "ps_used": "Email 1 specific P.S."

        "email_2": {

          "body": "Hi Edgar,EPI did some digging into Austasia Food and had a few ideas on where we could save time:E- Extract 99% accurate data from supplier invoices and test reports for consistent ingredient traceability.E- Generate audit-ready Commercial Invoices and Packing Lists for all dairy product shipments.E- Flag inconsistencies across your Health Certificates and Bills of Lading before submission to SFA.EPHave you solved for export documentation prep or is your team still doing it manually?EPIf we could help you do the same and save 10+ hours a week, automatically from WhatsApp, email or any chat app you already use, would that be interesting?EBest,ESeth",
          "ideas_used": [

          "subject": "Re: quick question on food",
          "body": "Hi Edgar,EMy co-founder and I are building a startup in Singapore to support local businesses and we wanted to reach out because your expertise could save us a ton of mistakes.EPGiven your experience leading Austasia Food, I was hoping to get your opinion.EFor some background, we spoke with senior government leaders last week at Smart Nation - they shared that SMEs in underserved areas stand to gain the most from AI compared to MNCs.EWe're now looking to figure out which are the biggest pain points food trading companies face and 30 minutes of your time would make a huge difference.EWe're a Cambridge led group, based in SG, and have a prototype, but this is in no way a sales call.EIf you could just email or WhatsApp an AI assistant your export documentation and get back an audit-ready reconciliation of product origin and quality data in Excel, would that be useful?EWould you be open to a quick chat to point us in the right direction?EBest,ESethEP.S. Happy to drop by your office at Horne Road if that's easier!",
          "hook_used": "C-suite",

        "linkedin_message": {
          "message": "Seth here. Given your experience leading Austasia Food, I was hoping to get your opinion. Emailed you about our idea for a WhatsApp AI assistant that does back office work around the clock - sending a voice note too in case it missed you!",

          "script": "Hi Edgar, I'm building an AI startup in Singapore focused on automating heavy back-office paperwork - a gap recently highlighted to us by government leaders in Smart Nation.           "body": "Hi Richard,\n\nMy co-founder and I are building a startup in Singapore to support local businesses and we wanted to reach out because your expertise could save us a ton of mistakes.\n\nGiven your experience in food, I was hoping to get your opinion.\n\nFor some background, we spoke with senior government leaders last week at Smart Nation - they shared that SMEs in underserved areas stand to gain the most from AI compared to MNCs.\n\nWe're now looking to figure out which are the biggest pain points food trading companies face and 30 minutes of your time would make a huge difference.\n\nWe're a Cambridge led group, based in SG, and have a prototype, but this is in no way a sales call.\n\nIf you could just email or WhatsApp an AI assistant your production manifests and get back clean, ready to import structured data in Excel, would that be useful?\n\nWould you be open to a quick chat to point us in the right direction?\n\nBest,\nSeth\n\nP.S.         "email_1": {
          "subject": "quick question on food manufacturing",
          "body": "Hi Kaiyu,\n\nWe're building an AI assistant that's always one step ahead for SG food manufacturing.\n\nIt proactively checks in - running daily reconciliation of export documents for consistency, tracking pending Health Cert applications and sending follow-ups, or giving you morning updates on shipments requiring COO applications - all without you having to ask.\n\nYou just WhatsApp or email it instructions and it does your back office work around the clock.\n\nWe're a Cambridge-backed group with a working prototype to demo, but this isn't a sales call.         },

          "body": "Hi Kaiyu,\n\nI did some digging into Chia Khim Lee Food Industries and had a few ideas on where we could save time:\n\n- Get audit-ready reconciliation of Commercial Invoices versus Packing Lists.\n- Flag inconsistent HS codes or quantities across your export documents.\n- Extract 99% accurate data for SFA Health Cert and Halal applications.\n\nHave you solved for export documentation prep or is your team still doing it manually?\n\nIf we could help you do the same and save 10+ hours a week, automatically from WhatsApp, email or any chat app you already use, would that be interesting?\n\nBest,\nSeth",

          "subject": "quick question on food",
          "body": "Hi Serene,\n\nWe're building an AI assistant that's always one step ahead for SG food wholesalers.\n\nIt proactively checks in - running daily reconciliation of supplier invoices against purchase orders, tracking pending health certificate applications and sending automated follow-ups, or giving you morning updates on critical export documentation statuses for perishable goods - all without you having to ask.\n\nYou just WhatsApp or email it instructions and it does your back office work around the clock.\n\nWe're a Cambridge-backed group with a working prototype to demo, but this isn't a sales call. We're trying to learn what food teams actually find useful, what pain points keep coming up, and how you're thinking about future-proofing the business. 30 minutes of your time would make a big difference.\n\nI know you're busy, so let me know what time is best for a call or I can drop by your office at Jalan Senang if that's easier!\n\nBest,\nSeth\n\nP.S. Before our call, I can train our AI on your health cert applications so you can see exactly how it handles seafood export docs for Kirin Seafood Supply.",
          "ps_used": "Seafood exporter (health certs) P.S. option used from industry context P.S. options table, with their_doc_type as health cert applications and company as Kirin Seafood Supply"
        },
        "email_2": {
          "subject": "Serene <> Seth",
          "body": "Hi Serene,\n\nI did some digging into Kirin Seafood Supply and had a few ideas on where we could save time:\n\n- Flagging inconsistencies across live mud crab shipment documents before SFA submission.\n- Generate audit-ready Health Certificates and COOs for different export markets quickly.\n- Extract 99% accurate data from supplier invoices and test reports for faster processing.\n\nHave you solved for export documentation prep or is your team still doing it manually?\n\nIf we could help you do the same and save 10+ hours a week, automatically from WhatsApp, email or any chat app you already use, would that be interesting?\n\nBest,\nSeth",
          "ideas_used": [
            "Flagging inconsistencies across live mud crab shipment documents before SFA submission.",
            "Generate audit-ready Health Certificates and COOs for different export markets quickly.",
            "Extract 99% accurate data from supplier invoices and test reports for faster processing."
          ]
        },
        "email_3": {
          "subject": "Re: quick question on food",
          "body": "Hi Serene,\n\nMy co-founder and I are building a startup in Singapore to support local businesses and we wanted to reach out because your expertise could save us a ton of mistakes.\n\nGiven your experience in food, I was hoping to get your opinion.\n\nFor some background, we spoke with senior government leaders last week at Smart Nation - they shared that SMEs in underserved areas stand to gain the most from AI compared to MNCs.\n\nWe're now looking to figure out which are the biggest pain points food trading companies face and 30 minutes of your time would make a huge difference.\n\nWe're a Cambridge led group, based in SG, and have a prototype, but this is in no way a sales call.\n\nIf you could just email or WhatsApp an AI assistant your export documents and get back audit-ready reconciliations in Excel showing all shipment details, would that be useful?\n\nWould you be open to a quick chat to point us in the right direction?\n\nBest,\nSeth\n\nP.S. Happy to drop by your office at Jalan Senang if that's easier!",
          "hook_used": "Fallback (no signals) - Given your experience in {industry_short}, I was hoping to get your opinion.",
          "value_line": "If you could just email or WhatsApp an AI assistant your export documents and get back audit-ready reconciliations in Excel showing all shipment details, would that be useful?",
          "value_line_source": "document_pain_analysis, company_profile"
        },

          "body": "Hi Cynthia,\n\nWe're building an AI assistant that's always one step ahead for SG food processors.\n\nIt proactively checks in - running daily reconciliation of commercial invoices vs packing lists, tracking missing Halal certificates and sending follow-ups, or giving you morning updates on health cert applications awaiting approval - all without you having to ask.\n\nYou just WhatsApp or email it instructions and it does your back office work around the clock.\n\nWe're a Cambridge-backed group with a working prototype to demo, but this isn't a sales call.     "238": {
      "company_name": "238",
      "stage1_status": "completed",
      "stage2_status": "pending",
      "stage1_result": {
        "company_name": "QAF Limited",
        "contact_name": "Norman Ip",
        "contact_email": "ipnorman@qaf.com.sg",
        "email_1": {
          "subject": "quick question on food processing",
          "body": "Hi Norman,\n\nWe're building an AI assistant that's always one step ahead for SG food processors.\n\nIt proactively checks in - running daily reconciliation of shipment documents against regulatory requirements, tracking missing Halal or Health Certificates and sending follow-ups, or giving you morning updates on export documents awaiting approval - all without you having to ask.\n\nYou just WhatsApp or email it instructions and it does your back office work around the clock.\n\nWe're a Cambridge-backed group with a working prototype to demo, but this isn't a sales call. We're trying to learn what food processing teams actually find useful, what pain points keep coming up, and how you're thinking about future-proofing the business. 30 minutes of your time would make a big difference.\n\nI know you're busy, so let me know what time is best for a call or I can drop by your office at South Bridge Road if that's easier!\n\nBest,\nSeth\n\nP.S. Before our call, I can train our AI on your export documents so you can see exactly what we'd catch for QAF Limited.",
          "ps_used": "Generic option for export documents"
        },
        "email_2": {
          "subject": "Norman <> Seth",
          "body": "Hi Norman,\n\nI did some digging into QAF Limited and had a few ideas on where we could save time:\n\n- Extract 99% accurate data from your daily Commercial Invoices and Packing Lists.\n- Flag discrepancies across QAF's regulatory certificates that humans miss.\n- Generate complete, audit-ready COO and Health Certificates in minutes.\n\nHave you solved for export documentation prep or is your team still doing it manually?\n\nIf we could help you do the same and save 10+ hours a week, automatically from WhatsApp, email or any chat app you already use, would that be interesting?\n\nBest,\nSeth",
          "ideas_used": [
            "Extract 99% accurate data from your daily Commercial Invoices and Packing Lists.",
            "Flag discrepancies across QAF's regulatory certificates that humans miss.",
            "Generate complete, audit-ready COO and Health Certificates in minutes."
          ]
        },
        "email_3": {
          "subject": "Re: quick question on food processing",
          "body": "Hi Norman,\n\nMy co-founder and I are building a startup in Singapore to support local businesses and we wanted to reach out because your expertise could save us a ton of mistakes.\n\nNoticed QAF Limited's Director Lin Kejian acquired shares - figured you'd have perspective on how operations are scaling.\n\nFor some background, we spoke with senior government leaders last week at Smart Nation - they shared that SMEs in underserved areas stand to gain the most from AI compared to MNCs.\n\nWe're now looking to figure out which are the biggest pain points food trading companies face and 30 minutes of your time would make a huge difference.\n\nWe're a Cambridge led group, based in SG, and have a prototype, but this is in no way a sales call.\n\nIf you could just email or WhatsApp an AI assistant your cross-border shipment documents and get back audit-ready reconciliations in Excel, would that be useful?\n\nWould you be open to a quick chat to point us in the right direction?\n\nBest,\nSeth\n\nP.S. Happy to drop by your office at South Bridge Road if that's easier!",
          "hook_used": "News (Noticed {company} {news} - figured you'd have perspective on how operations are scaling.)",
          "value_line": "If you could just email or WhatsApp an AI assistant your cross-border shipment documents and get back audit-ready reconciliations in Excel, would that be useful?",
          "value_line_source": "document_pain_analysis, company_profile"
        },
        "linkedin_message": {
          "message": "N/A",
          "hook_used": "none",
          "generated": false
        },
        "voice_note": {
          "script": "N/A",
          "location_used": "none",
          "generated": false
