        "email_1": {
          "subject": "quick question on Food Processor",
          "body": "Hi Christian, We're building an AI assistant that's always one step ahead for SG food processors. It proactively checks in - running daily reconciliation of invoices and packing lists, tracking missing or outdated certificates and sending follow-ups, or giving you morning updates on your export document status - all without you having to ask. You just WhatsApp or email it instructions and it does your back office work around the clock. We're a Cambridge-backed group with a working prototype to demo, but this isn't a sales call. We're trying to learn what Food Processor teams actually find useful, what pain points keep coming up, and how you're thinking about future-proofing the business. 30 minutes of your time would make a big difference. I know you're busy, so let me know what time is best for a call or I can drop by your office at Science Park Road if that's easier!\n\nBest,\nSeth\n\nP.S. Before our call, I can train our AI on your export documents so you can see exactly what we'd catch for Beneo Asia Pacific.",
          "ps_used": "train AI on export documents"
        },
        "email_2": {
          "subject": "Christian <> Seth",
          "body": "Hi Christian, I did some digging into Beneo Asia Pacific and had a few ideas on where we could save time:\n\n- Extract 99% accurate data from Beneo's supplier invoices for faster processing.\n- Flag inconsistencies across your export docs like COO and Health Certificates.\n- Generate complete, ready-to-review Packing Lists and Commercial Invoices.\n\nHave you solved for export documentation prep or is your team still doing it manually?\n\nIf we could help you do the same and save 10+ hours a week, automatically from WhatsApp, email or any chat app you already use, would that be interesting?\n\nBest,\nSeth",
          "ideas_used": [
            "Extract 99% accurate data from Beneo's supplier invoices for faster processing",
            "Flag inconsistencies across your export docs like COO and Health Certificates",
            "Generate complete, ready-to-review Packing Lists and Commercial Invoices"
          ]
        },
        "email_3": {
          "subject": "Re: quick question on Food Processor",
          "body": "Hi Christian,\n\nMy co-founder and I are building a startup in Singapore to support local businesses and we wanted to reach out because your expertise could save us a ton of mistakes.\n\nGiven your 19+ years in the industry, I was hoping to get your opinion.\n\nFor some background, we spoke with senior government leaders last week at Smart Nation - they shared that SMEs in underserved areas stand to gain the most from AI compared to MNCs.\n\nWe're now looking to figure out which are the biggest pain points food trading companies face and 30 minutes of your time would make a huge difference.\n\nWe're a Cambridge led group, based in SG, and have a prototype, but this is in no way a sales call.\n\nIf you could just email or WhatsApp an AI assistant your export document sets and get back a complete, ready to review export document package in Excel, would that be useful?\n\nWould you be open to a quick chat to point us in the right direction?\n\nBest,\nSeth\n\nP.S. Happy to drop by your office at Science Park Road if that's easier!",
          "hook_used": "10+ years experience",
          "value_line": "just email or WhatsApp an AI assistant your export document sets and get back a complete, ready to review export document package in Excel",
          "value_line_source": "document_pain_analysis"
        },
        "linkedin_message": {
          "message": "Seth here. Given your 19+ years in the industry, I was hoping to get your opinion. Emailed you about our idea for a WhatsApp AI assistant that does back office work around the clock - sending a voice note too in case it missed you!",
          "hook_used": "10+ years",
          "generated": true
        },
        "voice_note": {
          "script": "Hi Christian, I'm building an AI startup in Singapore focused on automating heavy back-office paperwork - a gap recently highlighted to us by government leaders in Smart Nation.           "body": "Hi Michael,\n\nWe're building an AI assistant that's always one step ahead for SG food processors.\n\nIt proactively checks in - running audit-ready reconciliation of export documents for each shipment, tracking status of COO and Health Cert applications and sending reminders, or giving you morning updates on critical export document approvals - all without you having to ask.\n\nYou just WhatsApp or email it instructions and it does your back office work around the clock.\n\nWe're a Cambridge-backed group with a working prototype to demo, but this isn't a sales call.         "email_2": {

          "body": "Hi Michael,\n\nI did some digging into QAF Limited and had a few ideas on where we could save time:\n\n- Extract 99% accurate data from purchase orders to generate consistent Commercial Invoices and Packing Lists.\n- Flag discrepancies across your full set of export documents before submitting, catching what humans miss.\n- Get clean, ready to import data for TradeNet CCP and SFA Health Cert portals for QAF.\n\nHave you solved for export documentation prep or is your team still doing it manually?\n\nIf we could help you do the same and save 10+ hours a week, automatically from WhatsApp, email or any chat app you already use, would that be interesting?\n\nBest,\nSeth",
          "ideas_used": [
            "Extract 99% accurate data from purchase orders to generate consistent Commercial Invoices and Packing Lists.",
            "Flag discrepancies across your full set of export documents before submitting, catching what humans miss.",
            "Get clean, ready to import data for TradeNet CCP and SFA Health Cert portals for QAF."
          ]
        },
        "email_3": {
          "subject": "Re: quick question on food processing",
          "body": "Hi Michael,\n\nMy co-founder and I are building a startup in Singapore to support local businesses and we wanted to reach out because your expertise could save us a ton of mistakes.\n\nNoticed QAF Limited had a Director and CEO acquire shares in January 2026 - figured you'd have perspective on how operations are scaling.\n\nFor some background, we spoke with senior government leaders last week at Smart Nation - they shared that SMEs in underserved areas stand to gain the most from AI compared to MNCs.\n\nWe're now looking to figure out which are the biggest pain points food trading companies face and 30 minutes of your time would make a huge difference.\n\nWe're a Cambridge led group, based in SG, and have a prototype, but this is in no way a sales call.\n\nIf you could just email or WhatsApp an AI assistant your shipment documents and get back an audit-ready reconciliation of all shipment documents in Excel, catching inconsistencies that humans miss, would that be useful?\n\nWould you be open to a quick chat to point us in the right direction?\n\nBest,\nSeth\n\nP.S.           "body": "Hi Mustafa,\n\nWe're building an AI assistant that's always one step ahead for SG food trading companies.\n\nIt proactively checks in - running daily reconciliations of all inbound shipment documents, tracking missing Halal and Health Certificates and automating follow-ups, or giving you morning updates on export documentation status - all without you having to ask.\n\nYou just WhatsApp or email it instructions and it does your back office work around the clock.\n\nWe're a Cambridge-backed group with a working prototype to demo, but this isn't a sales call. We're trying to learn what food teams actually find useful, what pain points keep coming up, and how you're thinking about future-proofing the business. 30 minutes of your time would make a big difference.\n\nI know you're busy, so let me know what time is best for a call or I can drop by your office at Chin Bee Rd if that's easier!\n\nBest,\nSeth\n\nP.S. Before our call, I can train our AI on your Halal + health cert stack so you can see exactly what we'd catch for MW Impex.",
          "ps_used": "Halal certified"
        },
        "email_2": {
          "subject": "Mustafa <> Seth",
          "body": "Hi Mustafa,\n\nI did some digging into MW Impex and had a few ideas on where we could save time:\n\n- Extract 99% accurate data from supplier invoices and test reports.\n- Generate complete, audit-ready Commercial Invoices and Packing Lists automatically.\n- Flag inconsistencies across Halal and Health Certificates to prevent delays.\n\nHave you solved for export documentation prep or is your team still doing it manually?\n\nIf we could help you do the same and save 10+ hours a week, automatically from WhatsApp, email or any chat app you already use, would that be interesting?\n\nBest,\nSeth",
          "ideas_used": [
            "Extract 99% accurate data from supplier invoices and test reports.",
            "Generate complete, audit-ready Commercial Invoices and Packing Lists automatically.",
            "Flag inconsistencies across Halal and Health Certificates to prevent delays."
          ]
        },
        "email_3": {
          "subject": "Re: quick question on food",
          "body": "Hi Mustafa,\n\nMy co-founder and I are building a startup in Singapore to support local businesses and we wanted to reach out because your expertise could save us a ton of mistakes.\n\nGiven your 10+ years in the industry, I was hoping to get your opinion.\n\nFor some background, we spoke with senior government leaders last week at Smart Nation - they shared that SMEs in underserved areas stand to gain the most from AI compared to MNCs.\n\nWe're now looking to figure out which are the biggest pain points food trading companies face and 30 minutes of your time would make a huge difference.\n\nWe're a Cambridge led group, based in SG, and have a prototype, but this is in no way a sales call.\n\nIf you could just email or WhatsApp an AI assistant your export documents and get back audit-ready, consistent export documentation in Excel, would that be useful?\n\nWould you be open to a quick chat to point us in the right direction?\n\nBest,\nSeth\n\nP.S. Happy to drop by your office at Chin Bee Rd if that's easier!",
          "hook_used": "10+ years",
          "value_line": "If you could just email or WhatsApp an AI assistant your export documents and get back audit-ready, consistent export documentation in Excel, would that be useful?",
          "value_line_source": "document_pain_analysis, company_profile"
        },
        "linkedin_message": {
          "message": "Seth here. Given your 10+ years in the industry, I was hoping to get your opinion. Emailed you about our idea for a WhatsApp AI assistant that does back office work around the clock - sending a voice note too in case it missed you!",

          "script": "Hi Mustafa, I'm building an AI startup in Singapore focused on automating heavy back-office paperwork - a gap recently highlighted to us by government leaders in Smart Nation.\n\nWe're a Cambridge-led team with a working prototype, and I'd love 20 minutes of your time to ensure we're solving the right pain points for firms like MW Impex.\n\nThis isn't a sales call - just looking for your perspective.\n\nHappy to buy you lunch near your office at Chin Bee Rd as a thank you. \u0442\u0430\u043a \u0443\u0434\u043e\u0431\u043d\u0435\u0435! \u0421 \u0443\u0432\u0430\u0436\u0435\u043d\u0438\u0435\u043c, \u0421\u0435\u0442 P.S. \u041f\u0435\u0440\u0435\u0434 \u043d\u0430\u0448\u0438\u043c \u0437\u0432\u043e\u043d\u043a\u043e\u043c \u044f \u043c\u043e\u0433\u0443 \u043e\u0431\u0443\u0447\u0438\u0442\u044c \u043d\u0430\u0448 \u0418\u0418 \u043d\u0430 \u0432\u0430\u0448\u0438\u0445 \u044d\u043a\u0441\u043f\u043e\u0440\u0442\u043d\u044b\u0445 \u0434\u043e\u043a\u0443\u043c\u0435\u043d\u0442\u0430\u0445, \u0447\u0442\u043e\u0431\u044b \u0432\u044b \u043e\u0431\u043d\u0430\u0440\u0443\u0436\u0438\u0442\u044c \u0434\u043b\u044f Del Monte Asia.",
          "ps_used": "Generic: \"Before the call, I can train our AI on your export documents so you can see exactly how it works for {company_name}.\""
        },
        "email_2": {
          "subject": "Toshio <> Seth",
          "body": "Hi Toshio, I did some digging into Del Monte Asia and had a few ideas on where we could save time:\n\n- Extract 99% accurate data from supplier invoices for faster reconciliation.\n- Generate audit-ready Commercial Invoices and Packing Lists in minutes.\n- Flag inconsistencies across all export documents before submission to SFA.\n\nHave you solved for export documentation prep or is your team still doing it manually?\n\nIf we could help you do the same and save 10+ hours a week, automatically from WhatsApp, email or any chat app you already use, would that be interesting?\n\nBest,\nSeth",
          "ideas_used": [
            "Extract 99% accurate data from supplier invoices for faster reconciliation.",
            "Generate audit-ready Commercial Invoices and Packing Lists in minutes.",
            "Flag inconsistencies across all export documents before submission to SFA."
          ]
        },
        "email_3": {
          "subject": "Re: quick question on food",
          "body": "Hi Toshio,\n\nMy co-founder and I are building a startup in Singapore to support local businesses and we wanted to reach out because your expertise could save us a ton of mistakes.\n\nNoticed Del Monte Asia announced an exclusive partnership with DKSH Taiwan to launch Whole Kernel Corn - figured you'd have perspective on how operations are scaling.\n\nFor some background, we spoke with senior government leaders last week at Smart Nation - they shared that SMEs in underserved areas stand to gain the most from AI compared to MNCs.\n\nWe're now looking to figure out which are the biggest pain points food trading companies face and 30 minutes of your time would make a huge difference.\n\nWe're a Cambridge led group, based in SG, and have a prototype, but this is in no way a sales call.\n\nIf you could just email or WhatsApp an AI assistant your export and import shipment documents and get back an audit-ready validation report flagging all inconsistencies in Excel, would that be useful?\n\nWould you be open to a quick chat to point us in the right direction?\n\nBest,\nSeth\n\nP.S. Happy to drop by your office at Parkview Square if that's easier!",
          "hook_used": "News",
          "value_line": "If you could just email or WhatsApp an AI assistant your export and import shipment documents and get back an audit-ready validation report flagging all inconsistencies in Excel, would that be useful?",
          "value_line_source": "document_pain_analysis and company_profile"
        },
        "linkedin_message": {
          "message": "Seth here. Given your experience leading Del Monte Asia, I was hoping to get your opinion. Emailed you about our idea for a WhatsApp AI assistant that does back office work around the clock - sending a voice note too in case it missed you!",
          "hook_used": "C-suite",
          "generated": true
        },
        "voice_note": {
          "script": "Hi Toshio, I'm building an AI startup in Singapore focused on automating heavy back-office paperwork - a gap recently highlighted to us by government leaders in Smart Nation. We're a Cambridge-led team with a working prototype, and I'd love 20 minutes of your time to ensure we're solving the right pain points for firms like Del Monte Asia.           "location_used": "Parkview Square",
          "generated": true
        }

          "body": "Hi Kenneth,\n\nWe're building an AI assistant that's always one step ahead for SG food manufacturing companies.\n\nIt proactively checks in - running daily reconciliation of commercial invoices against packing lists, tracking missing Halal certificates and sending follow-ups, or giving you morning updates on health certificates awaiting approval - all without you having to ask.\n\nYou just WhatsApp or email it instructions and it does your back office work around the clock.\n\nWe're a Cambridge-backed group with a working prototype to demo, but this isn't a sales call.     "256": {
      "company_name": "256",
      "stage1_status": "completed",
      "stage2_status": "pending",
      "stage1_result": {
        "company_name": "KAIMAY TRADING PTE LTD",
        "contact_name": "Desmond Tan",
        "contact_email": "desmond@kaimay.com.sg",
        "email_1": {
          "subject": "quick question on Food Wholesaler",
          "body": "Hi Desmond,\n\nWe're building an AI assistant that's always one step ahead for SG food wholesalers.\n\nIt proactively checks in - running daily reconciliations of supplier invoices against purchase orders, tracking missing Health Cert applications and sending follow-ups, or giving you morning updates on Commercial Invoices awaiting approval - all without you having to ask.\n\nYou just WhatsApp or email it instructions and it does your back office work around the clock.\n\nWe're a Cambridge-backed group with a working prototype to demo, but this isn't a sales call. We're trying to learn what Food Wholesaler teams actually find useful, what pain points keep coming up, and how you're thinking about future-proofing the business. 30 minutes of your time would make a big difference.\n\nI know you're busy, so let me know what time is best for a call or I can drop by your office at Penjuru Lane if that's easier!\n\nBest,\nSeth\n\nP.S. Before our call, I can train our AI on your export documents so you can see exactly what we'd catch for Kaimay Trading.",
          "ps_used": "Before our call, I can train our AI on your export documents so you can see exactly what we'd catch for Kaimay Trading."
        },
        "email_2": {
          "subject": "Desmond <> Seth",
          "body": "Hi Desmond,\n\nI did some digging into Kaimay Trading Pte Ltd and had a few ideas on where we could save time:\n\n- Generate audit-ready Commercial Invoices and Packing Lists in minutes.\n- Extract 99% accurate data from supplier invoices for Kaimay Trading.\n- Flag inconsistencies across your shipment documents that humans miss.\n\nHave you solved for export documentation prep or is your team still doing it manually?\n\nIf we could help you do the same and save 10+ hours a week, automatically from WhatsApp, email or any chat app you already use, would that be interesting?\n\nBest,\nSeth",
          "ideas_used": [
            "Generate audit-ready Commercial Invoices and Packing Lists in minutes.",
            "Extract 99% accurate data from supplier invoices for Kaimay Trading.",
            "Flag inconsistencies across your shipment documents that humans miss."
          ]
        },
        "email_3": {
          "subject": "Re: quick question on Food Wholesaler",
          "body": "Hi Desmond,\n\nMy co-founder and I are building a startup in Singapore to support local businesses and we wanted to reach out because your expertise could save us a ton of mistakes.\n\nGiven your experience in food, I was hoping to get your opinion.\n\nFor some background, we spoke with senior government leaders last week at Smart Nation - they shared that SMEs in underserved areas stand to gain the most from AI compared to MNCs.\n\nWe're now looking to figure out which are the biggest pain points food trading companies face and 30 minutes of your time would make a huge difference.\n\nWe're a Cambridge led group, based in SG, and have a prototype, but this is in no way a sales call.\n\nIf you could just email or WhatsApp an AI assistant your export documents and get back 99% accurate data ready for submission, would that be useful?\n\nWould you be open to a quick chat to point us in the right direction?\n\nBest,\nSeth\n\nP.S. Happy to drop by your office at Penjuru Lane if that's easier!",
          "hook_used": "Fallback",
          "value_line": "If you could just email or WhatsApp an AI assistant your export documents and get back 99% accurate data ready for submission, would that be useful?",
          "value_line_source": "document_pain_analysis"
        },
        "linkedin_message": {
          "message": "N/A",
          "hook_used": "none",

        "email_1": {
          "subject": "quick question on Food Processor",
          "body": "Hi Chee Leong,\n\nWe're building an AI assistant that's always one step ahead for SG food processors.\n\nIt proactively checks in - running daily reconciliation of multi-channel order data against warehouse picks, tracking expiry dates for Halal and vegan certifications and sending renewal reminders, or giving you morning updates on any inconsistent packaging weights or SKUs across documents - all without you having to ask.\n\nYou just WhatsApp or email it instructions and it does your back office work around the clock.\n\nWe're a Cambridge-backed group with a working prototype to demo, but this isn't a sales call.           "ps_used": "Halal certified"

        "email_2": {

          "body": "Hi Chee Leong,\n\nI did some digging into 2NUTGUYS and had a few ideas on where we could save time:\n\n- Audit-ready reconciliation of multi-channel orders against inventory.\n- Extract 99% accurate data from supplier invoices for finance.\n- Flag inconsistencies in product weights and SKUs across documents.\n\nHave you solved for export documentation prep or is your team still doing it manually?\n\nIf we could help you do the same and save 10+ hours a week, automatically from WhatsApp, email or any chat app you already use, would that be interesting?\n\nBest,\nSeth",

            "Audit-ready reconciliation of multi-channel orders against inventory.",
            "Extract 99% accurate data from supplier invoices for finance.",
            "Flag inconsistencies in product weights and SKUs across documents."

        "email_3": {
          "subject": "Re: quick question on Food Processor",
          "body": "Hi Chee Leong,\n\nMy co-founder and I are building a startup in Singapore to support local businesses and we wanted to reach out because your expertise could save us a ton of mistakes.\n\nGiven your experience in food, I was hoping to get your opinion.\n\nFor some background, we spoke with senior government leaders last week at Smart Nation - they shared that SMEs in underserved areas stand to gain the most from AI compared to MNCs.\n\nWe're now looking to figure out which are the biggest pain points food trading companies face and 30 minutes of your time would make a huge difference.\n\nWe're a Cambridge led group, based in SG, and have a prototype, but this is in no way a sales call.\n\nIf you could just email or WhatsApp an AI assistant your invoices, packing lists, and certs and get back an audit-ready reconciliation in Excel showing all shipment data consistency, would that be useful?\n\nWould you be open to a quick chat to point us in the right direction?\n\nBest,\nSeth\n\nP.S.           "body": "Hi John,\n\nI did some digging into Seasonal Produce and had a few ideas on where we could save time:\n\n- Extract 99% accurate data from Seasonal Produce's purchase orders and test reports.\n- Generate audit-ready Commercial Invoices and Packing Lists from a single data entry.\n- Flag inconsistencies in HS codes and quantities across all export documents before submission.\n\nHave you solved for export documentation prep or is your team still doing it manually?\n\nIf we could help you do the same and save 10+ hours a week, automatically from WhatsApp, email or any chat app you already use, would that be interesting?\n\nBest,\nSeth",
          "ideas_used": [
            "Extract 99% accurate data from Seasonal Produce's purchase orders and test reports.",
            "Generate audit-ready Commercial Invoices and Packing Lists from a single data entry.",
            "Flag inconsistencies in HS codes and quantities across all export documents before submission."
          ]
        },
        "email_3": {
          "subject": "Re: quick question on food",
          "body": "Hi John,\n\nMy co-founder and I are building a startup in Singapore to support local businesses and we wanted to reach out because your expertise could save us a ton of mistakes.\n\nGiven your experience in food, I was hoping to get your opinion.\n\nFor some background, we spoke with senior government leaders last week at Smart Nation - they shared that SMEs in underserved areas stand to gain the most from AI compared to MNCs.\n\nWe're now looking to figure out which are the biggest pain points food trading companies face and 30 minutes of your time would make a huge difference.\n\nWe're a Cambridge led group, based in SG, and have a prototype, but this is in no way a sales call.\n\nIf you could just email or WhatsApp an AI assistant your Commercial Invoices, Packing Lists, COOs, and Health Certificates and get back audit-ready, consistent export document sets in Excel, ready for submission, would that be useful?\n\nWould you be open to a quick chat to point us in the right direction?\n\nBest,\nSeth\n\nP.S. Happy to drop by your office at Cendex Centre if that's easier!",
          "hook_used": "Fallback (Given your experience in food, I was hoping to get your opinion.)",
          "value_line": "just email or WhatsApp an AI assistant your Commercial Invoices, Packing Lists, COOs, and Health Certificates and get back audit-ready, consistent export document sets in Excel, ready for submission",
          "value_line_source": "document_pain_analysis, company_profile"
        },
        "linkedin_message": {
          "message": "N/A",
          "hook_used": "none",
          "generated": false

        "email_1": {
          "subject": "quick question on Food Processor",
          "body": "Hi Chris, We're building an AI assistant that's always one step ahead for SG food processing companies. It proactively checks in - running daily reconciliations of Commercial Invoices against Packing Lists, tracking pending Health Certificates and sending follow-ups to certifying bodies, or giving you morning updates on export documents awaiting approval or submission - all without you having to ask. You just WhatsApp or email it instructions and it does your back office work around the clock. We're a Cambridge-backed group with a working prototype to demo, but this isn't a sales call. We're trying to learn what Food Processor teams actually find useful, what pain points keep coming up, and how you're thinking about future-proofing the business. 30 minutes of your time would make a big difference. I know you're busy, so let me know what time is best for a call or I can drop by your office at Senoko South Road if that's easier! Best,Seth P.S. Before our call, I can train our AI on your export documents so you can see exactly what we'd catch for Vitasoy International Holdings.",
          "ps_used": "AI training on their documents"
        },
        "email_2": {

          "body": "Hi Chris, I did some digging into Vitasoy International Holdings and had a few ideas on where we could save time: - Extract 99% accurate data from diverse supplier invoices for AP. - Flag inconsistencies in Commercial Invoices and Packing Lists for audit-ready exports. - Generate complete, audit-ready COO and Health Cert applications for global markets. Have you solved for export documentation prep or is your team still doing it manually?           "ideas_used": [

            "Flag inconsistencies in Commercial Invoices and Packing Lists for audit-ready exports.",

          "body": "Hi Chris, My co-founder and I are building a startup in Singapore to support local businesses and we wanted to reach out because your expertise could save us a ton of mistakes.     "269": {
      "company_name": "269",
      "stage1_status": "completed",
      "stage2_status": "pending",
      "stage1_result": {
        "company_name": "Aerospring Hydroponics",
        "contact_name": "Mark Newton",
        "contact_email": "mark@aerospringgardens.com",
        "email_1": {
          "subject": "quick question on food",
          "body": "Hi Mark,\n\nWe're building an AI assistant that's always one step ahead for SG food processors.\n\nIt proactively checks in - running daily reconciliation of sales orders against export documents, tracking missing Certificates of Origin and sending follow-ups, or giving you morning updates on shipments awaiting export document generation - all without you having to ask.\n\nYou just WhatsApp or email it instructions and it does your back office work around the clock.\n\nWe're a Cambridge-backed group with a working prototype to demo, but this isn't a sales call. We're trying to learn what food teams actually find useful, what pain points keep coming up, and how you're thinking about future-proofing the business. 30 minutes of your time would make a big difference.\n\nI know you're busy, so let me know what time is best for a call or I can drop by your office at B&D Building if that's easier!\n\nBest,\nSeth\n\nP.S. Before our call, I can train our AI on your export documents so you can see exactly what we'd catch for Aerospring Hydroponics.",
          "ps_used": "Before our call, I can train our AI on your export documents so you can see exactly what we'd catch for Aerospring Hydroponics."
        },
        "email_2": {
          "subject": "Mark <> Seth",
          "body": "Hi Mark,\n\nI did some digging into Aerospring Hydroponics and had a few ideas on where we could save time:\n\n- Extract 99% accurate order details from all sales channels for Aerospring.\n- Flag inconsistencies across Commercial Invoices and Packing Lists automatically.\n- Generate audit-ready Certificates of Origin and other export docs quickly.\n\nHave you solved for export documentation prep or is your team still doing it manually?\n\nIf we could help you do the same and save 10+ hours a week, automatically from WhatsApp, email or any chat app you already use, would that be interesting?\n\nBest,\nSeth",
          "ideas_used": [
            "Extract 99% accurate order details from all sales channels for Aerospring.",
            "Flag inconsistencies across Commercial Invoices and Packing Lists automatically.",
            "Generate audit-ready Certificates of Origin and other export docs quickly."
          ]
        },
        "email_3": {
          "subject": "Re: quick question on food",
          "body": "Hi Mark,\n\nMy co-founder and I are building a startup in Singapore to support local businesses and we wanted to reach out because your expertise could save us a ton of mistakes.\n\nGiven your experience in food, I was hoping to get your opinion.\n\nFor some background, we spoke with senior government leaders last week at Smart Nation - they shared that SMEs in underserved areas stand to gain the most from AI compared to MNCs.\n\nWe're now looking to figure out which are the biggest pain points food trading companies face and 30 minutes of your time would make a huge difference.\n\nWe're a Cambridge led group, based in SG, and have a prototype, but this is in no way a sales call.\n\nIf you could just email or WhatsApp an AI assistant your export documents and get back an audit-ready reconciliation in Excel showing all shipment data consistency, would that be useful?\n\nWould you be open to a quick chat to point us in the right direction?\n\nBest,\nSeth\n\nP.S. Happy to drop by your office at B&D Building if that's easier!",
          "hook_used": "Fallback",
          "value_line": "If you could just email or WhatsApp an AI assistant your export documents and get back an audit-ready reconciliation in Excel showing all shipment data consistency, would that be useful?",
          "value_line_source": "document_pain_analysis, company_profile"
        },
        "linkedin_message": {
          "message": "N/A",
          "hook_used": "none",
          "generated": false
        },
        "voice_note": {
          "script": "N/A",
          "location_used": "none",
          "generated": false
        }
      },

      "stage2_error": null,

        "email_1": {
          "subject": "quick question on food",
          "body": "Hi Harris,\n\nWe're building an AI assistant that's always one step ahead for SG food traders.\n\nIt proactively checks in - generating daily inventory reports for broodstock across facilities, tracking overdue health certificates for export shipments and sending reminders, or giving you morning updates on incoming supplier test reports awaiting review - all without you having to ask.\n\nYou just WhatsApp or email it instructions and it does your back office work around the clock.\n\nWe're a Cambridge-backed group with a working prototype to demo, but this isn't a sales call. We're trying to learn what food teams actually find useful, what pain points keep coming up, and how you're thinking about future-proofing the business. 30 minutes of your time would make a big difference.\n\nI know you're busy, so let me know what time is best for a call or I can drop by your office at Hudson TechnoCentre if that's easier!\n\nBest,\nSeth\n\nP.S. Before our call, I can train our AI on your export and regulatory documentation so you can see exactly what we'd catch for Shrimp Improvement Systems.",
          "ps_used": "P.S. Before our call, I can train our AI on your [their_doc_type] so you can see exactly what we'd catch for [company]. From document_pain_analysis: export and regulatory documentation. Company: Shrimp Improvement Systems."
        },
        "email_2": {
          "subject": "Harris <> Seth",
          "body": "Hi Harris,\n\nI did some digging into Shrimp Improvement Systems and had a few ideas on where we could save time:\n\n- Extract 99% accurate data from supplier test reports for faster QA.\n- Generate audit-ready Health Cert applications, consistent across all your markets.\n- Flag inconsistencies across broodstock shipment documents that humans miss for compliance.\n\nHave you solved for export documentation prep or is your team still doing it manually?\n\nIf we could help you do the same and save 10+ hours a week, automatically from WhatsApp, email or any chat app you already use, would that be interesting?\n\nBest,\nSeth",
          "ideas_used": [
            "Extract 99% accurate data from supplier test reports for faster QA.",
            "Generate audit-ready Health Cert applications, consistent across all your markets.",
            "Flag inconsistencies across broodstock shipment documents that humans miss for compliance."
          ]
        },
        "email_3": {
          "subject": "Re: quick question on food",
          "body": "Hi Harris,\n\nMy co-founder and I are building a startup in Singapore to support local businesses and we wanted to reach out because your expertise could save us a ton of mistakes.\n\nGiven your 34+ years in the industry, I was hoping to get your opinion.\n\nFor some background, we spoke with senior government leaders last week at Smart Nation - they shared that SMEs in underserved areas stand to gain the most from AI compared to MNCs.\n\nWe're now looking to figure out which are the biggest pain points food trading companies face and 30 minutes of your time would make a huge difference.\n\nWe're a Cambridge led group, based in SG, and have a prototype, but this is in no way a sales call.\n\nIf you could just email or WhatsApp an AI assistant your Health Certificates and get back an audit-ready reconciliation in Excel showing consistency across all your markets, would that be useful?\n\nWould you be open to a quick chat to point us in the right direction?\n\nBest,\nSeth\n\nP.S. Happy to drop by your office at Hudson TechnoCentre if that's easier!",
          "hook_used": "10+ years",
          "value_line": "just email or WhatsApp an AI assistant your Health Certificates and get back an audit-ready reconciliation in Excel showing consistency across all your markets",
          "value_line_source": "document_pain_analysis, company_profile"
        },
        "linkedin_message": {
          "message": "Seth here. Given your 34+ years in the industry, I was hoping to get your opinion. Emailed you about our idea for a WhatsApp AI assistant that does back office work around the clock - sending a voice note too in case it missed you!",

          "script": "Hi Harris, I'm building an AI startup in Singapore focused on automating heavy back-office paperwork - a gap recently highlighted to us by government leaders in Smart Nation.\n\nWe're a Cambridge-led team with a working prototype, and I'd love 20 minutes of your time to ensure we're solving the right pain points for firms like Shrimp Improvement Systems.\n\nThis isn't a sales call - just looking for your perspective.\n\nHappy to buy you lunch near your office at Hudson TechnoCentre as a thank you.           "body": "Hi Wee Beng,\n\nWe're building an AI assistant that's always one step ahead for SG food trading companies.\n\nIt proactively checks in - running daily reconciliation of Commercial Invoices against Packing Lists, tracking pending Health Certificate applications and sending follow-ups for approval, or giving you morning updates on new shipment orders awaiting document preparation - all without you having to ask.\n\nYou just WhatsApp or email it instructions and it does your back office work around the clock.\n\nWe're a Cambridge-backed group with a working prototype to demo, but this isn't a sales call. You just WhatsApp or email it instructions and it does your back office work around the clock. We're a Cambridge-backed group with a working prototype to demo, but this isn't a sales call. We're trying to learn what food teams actually find useful, what pain points keep coming up, and how you're thinking about future-proofing the business. 30 minutes of your time would make a big difference. I know you're busy, so let me know what time is best for a call or I can drop by your office at Kallang Way if that's easier! Best,Seth P.S. Before our call, I can train our AI on your export documents so you can see exactly what we'd catch for Kewpie Singapore.",
          "ps_used": "Generic (for no specific docs or signals for P.S.)"
        },
        "email_2": {
          "subject": "Toshihiko <> Seth",
          "body": "Hi Toshihiko, I did some digging into Kewpie Singapore and had a few ideas on where we could save time: - Extract 99% accurate data from supplier invoices for faster processing. - Generate audit-ready Commercial Invoices and Packing Lists automatically. - Flag inconsistencies across import documents before SFA submission. Have you solved for export documentation prep or is your team still doing it manually? If we could help you do the same and save 10+ hours a week, automatically from WhatsApp, email or any chat app you already use, would that be interesting? Best,Seth",
          "ideas_used": [
            "Extract 99% accurate data from supplier invoices for faster processing.",
            "Generate audit-ready Commercial Invoices and Packing Lists automatically.",
            "Flag inconsistencies across import documents before SFA submission."
          ]
        },
        "email_3": {
          "subject": "Re: quick question on food",
          "body": "Hi Toshihiko, My co-founder and I are building a startup in Singapore to support local businesses and we wanted to reach out because your expertise could save us a ton of mistakes. Given your experience in food, I was hoping to get your opinion. For some background, we spoke with senior government leaders last week at Smart Nation - they shared that SMEs in underserved areas stand to gain the most from AI compared to MNCs. We're now looking to figure out which are the biggest pain points food trading companies face and 30 minutes of your time would make a huge difference. We're a Cambridge led group, based in SG, and have a prototype, but this is in no way a sales call. If you could just email or WhatsApp an AI assistant your import documents and get back audit-ready reconciliation reports in Excel showing any discrepancies across your shipments, would that be useful? Would you be open to a quick chat to point us in the right direction? Best,Seth P.S. Happy to drop by your office at Kallang Way if that's easier!",
          "hook_used": "Fallback (no specific signals)",

        "email_1": {
          "subject": "quick question on food",
          "body": "Hi Vincent,\n\nWe're building an AI assistant that's always one step ahead for SG food manufacturers.\n\nIt proactively checks in - running daily reconciliations of supplier invoices against production records, tracking outstanding Halal or Health Certificates and sending follow-ups, or giving you morning updates on Commercial Invoices awaiting approval - all without you having to ask.\n\nYou just WhatsApp or email it instructions and it does your back office work around the clock.\n\nWe're a Cambridge-backed group with a working prototype to demo, but this isn't a sales call. We're trying to learn what food teams actually find useful, what pain points keep coming up, and how you're thinking about future-proofing the business. 30 minutes of your time would make a big difference.\n\nI know you're busy, so let me know what time is best for a call or I can drop by your office at Bedok Food City if that's easier!\n\nBest,\nSeth\n\nP.S. Before our call, I can train our AI on your Halal and Health Certificates so you can see exactly what we'd catch for Savory Origin.",
          "ps_used": "Before our call, I can train our AI on your [their_doc_type] so you can see exactly what we'd catch for [company]. Halal and Health Certificates used for doc type. Savory Origin used for company name."
        },
        "email_2": {
          "subject": "Vincent <> Seth",
          "body": "Hi Vincent,\n\nI did some digging into Savory Origin and had a few ideas on where we could save time:\n\n- Automate 99% accurate extraction from supplier invoices for production.\n- Get audit-ready reconciliation of export docs like COOs and Packing Lists.\n- Flag inconsistencies across Halal and Health Certificates before submission.\n\nHave you solved for export documentation prep or is your team still doing it manually?\n\nIf we could help you do the same and save 10+ hours a week, automatically from WhatsApp, email or any chat app you already use, would that be interesting?\n\nBest,\nSeth",
          "ideas_used": [
            "Automate 99% accurate extraction from supplier invoices for production.",
            "Get audit-ready reconciliation of export docs like COOs and Packing Lists.",
            "Flag inconsistencies across Halal and Health Certificates before submission."
          ]
        },
        "email_3": {
          "subject": "Re: quick question on food",
          "body": "Hi Vincent,\n\nMy co-founder and I are building a startup in Singapore to support local businesses and we wanted to reach out because your expertise could save us a ton of mistakes.\n\nGiven your experience in food, I was hoping to get your opinion.\n\nFor some background, we spoke with senior government leaders last week at Smart Nation - they shared that SMEs in underserved areas stand to gain the most from AI compared to MNCs.\n\nWe're now looking to figure out which are the biggest pain points food trading companies face and 30 minutes of your time would make a huge difference.\n\nWe're a Cambridge led group, based in SG, and have a prototype, but this is in no way a sales call.\n\nIf you could just email or WhatsApp an AI assistant your Halal and Health Certificates and get back audit-ready consistency reports in Excel, would that be useful?\n\nWould you be open to a quick chat to point us in the right direction?\n\nBest,\nSeth\n\nP.S. Happy to drop by your office at Bedok Food City if that's easier!",

          "body": "Hi Manmeet,\n\nMy co-founder and I are building a startup in Singapore to support local businesses and we wanted to reach out because your expertise could save us a ton of mistakes.\n\nNoticed you're hiring for a Quality Control Manager - figured you'd have perspective on where the bottlenecks are.\n\nFor some background, we spoke with senior government leaders last week at Smart Nation - they shared that SMEs in underserved areas stand to gain the most from AI compared to MNCs.\n\nWe're now looking to figure out which are the biggest pain points food trading companies face and 30 minutes of your time would make a huge difference.\n\nWe're a Cambridge led group, based in SG, and have a prototype, but this is in no way a sales call.\n\nIf you could just email or WhatsApp an AI assistant your export documents and product certifications and get back an audit-ready reconciliation of all your export documents and product certifications in Excel, would that be useful?\n\nWould you be open to a quick chat to point us in the right direction?\n\nBest,\nSeth\n\nP.S. Happy to drop by your office at Woodlands Terrace if that's easier!",
          "hook_used": "Hiring",
          "value_line": "just email or WhatsApp an AI assistant your export documents and product certifications and get back an audit-ready reconciliation of all your export documents and product certifications in Excel",
          "value_line_source": "document_pain_analysis and company_profile"

    "297": {
      "company_name": "297",

      "stage2_status": "pending",
      "stage1_result": {
        "company_name": "Cargill Asia Pacific Holdings",
        "contact_name": "Bruce W. Blakeman",
        "contact_email": "bruce_blakeman@cargill.com",
        "email_1": {
          "subject": "quick question on food processing",
          "body": "Hi Bruce,\n\nWe're building an AI assistant that's always one step ahead for SG food processors.\n\nIt proactively checks in - running daily reconciliations of invoice data against certificate data, tracking missing health certificates and sending follow-ups, or giving you morning updates on export documents awaiting approval - all without you having to ask.\n\nYou just WhatsApp or email it instructions and it does your back office work around the clock.\n\nWe're a Cambridge-backed group with a working prototype to demo, but this isn't a sales call. We're trying to learn what food processing teams actually find useful, what pain points keep coming up, and how you're thinking about future-proofing the business. 30 minutes of your time would make a big difference.\n\nI know you're busy, so let me know what time is best for a call or I can drop by your office at CapitaGreen if that's easier!\n\nBest,\nSeth\n\nP.S. Before our call, I can train our AI on your health cert applications so you can see exactly how it handles seafood export docs for Cargill Asia Pacific Holdings.",
          "ps_used": "Seafood exporter"
        },
        "email_2": {
          "subject": "Bruce <> Seth",
          "body": "Hi Bruce,\n\nI did some digging into Cargill Asia Pacific Holdings and had a few ideas on where we could save time:\n\n- Extract 99% accurate data from diverse supplier invoices.\n- Flag inconsistencies that humans miss across your export doc set.\n- Generate audit-ready Certificates of Origin and Health Certificates.\n\nHave you solved for export documentation prep or is your team still doing it manually?\n\nIf we could help you do the same and save 10+ hours a week, automatically from WhatsApp, email or any chat app you already use, would that be interesting?\n\nBest,\nSeth",
          "ideas_used": [
            "Extract 99% accurate data from diverse supplier invoices.",
            "Flag inconsistencies that humans miss across your export doc set.",
            "Generate audit-ready Certificates of Origin and Health Certificates."
          ]
        },
        "email_3": {
          "subject": "Re: quick question on food processing",
          "body": "Hi Bruce,\n\nMy co-founder and I are building a startup in Singapore to support local businesses and we wanted to reach out because your expertise could save us a ton of mistakes.\n\nGiven your experience in food, I was hoping to get your opinion.\n\nFor some background, we spoke with senior government leaders last week at Smart Nation - they shared that SMEs in underserved areas stand to gain the most from AI compared to MNCs.\n\nWe're now looking to figure out which are the biggest pain points food trading companies face and 30 minutes of your time would make a huge difference.\n\nWe're a Cambridge led group, based in SG, and have a prototype, but this is in no way a sales call.\n\nIf you could just email or WhatsApp an AI assistant your export documents and get back an audit-ready reconciliation of invoice data and certificate data in Excel, would that be useful?\n\nWould you be open to a quick chat to point us in the right direction?\n\nBest,\nSeth\n\nP.S. Happy to drop by your office at CapitaGreen if that's easier!",
          "hook_used": "Fallback",
          "value_line": "just email or WhatsApp an AI assistant your export documents and get back an audit-ready reconciliation of invoice data and certificate data in Excel",

          "body": "Hi Raymond,\n\nWe're building an AI assistant that's always one step ahead for SG food wholesalers.\n\nIt proactively checks in - running daily reconciliation of customer invoices against delivery notes, tracking inconsistent quantities or SKUs across orders and packing lists, or giving you morning updates on orders awaiting invoice generation - all without you having to ask.\n\nYou just WhatsApp or email it instructions and it does your back office work around the clock.\n\nWe're a Cambridge-backed group with a working prototype to demo, but this isn't a sales call.         "email_2": {

          "body": "Hi Raymond,\n\nI did some digging into San Food Industries and had a few ideas on where we could save time:\n\n- Generate audit-ready invoices and packing lists for San Food Industries in minutes.\n- Flag inconsistencies across purchase orders and delivery notes that humans miss.\n- Get 99% accurate data from diverse supplier documents ready for production.\n\nHave you solved for export documentation prep or is your team still doing it manually?\n\nIf we could help you do the same and save 10+ hours a week, automatically from WhatsApp, email or any chat app you already use, would that be interesting?\n\nBest,\nSeth",

    "304": {
      "company_name": "304",
      "stage1_status": "completed",
      "stage2_status": "pending",
      "stage1_result": {
        "company_name": "Beneo Asia Pacific",
        "contact_name": "Diana",
        "contact_email": "diana.koh@beneo.com",
        "email_1": {
          "subject": "quick question on Food Processor",
          "body": "Hi Diana,\n\nWe're building an AI assistant that's always one step ahead for SG food processors.\n\nIt proactively checks in - running daily reconciliations of commercial invoices against packing lists, tracking missing health certificates and sending follow-ups for key markets, or giving you morning updates on export documents awaiting approval - all without you having to ask.\n\nYou just WhatsApp or email it instructions and it does your back office work around the clock.\n\nWe're a Cambridge-backed group with a working prototype to demo, but this isn't a sales call. We're trying to learn what Food Processor teams actually find useful, what pain points keep coming up, and how you're thinking about future-proofing the business. 30 minutes of your time would make a big difference.\n\nI know you're busy, so let me know what time is best for a call or I can drop by your office at Science Park Road if that's easier!\n\nBest,\nSeth\n\nP.S. Before our call, I can train our AI on your export documents so you can see exactly what we'd catch for Beneo Asia Pacific.",
          "ps_used": "Before our call, I can train our AI on your [their_doc_type] so you can see exactly what we'd catch for [company].\n\n[their_doc_type]: export documents\n[company]: Beneo Asia Pacific"
        },
        "email_2": {
          "subject": "Diana <> Seth",
          "body": "Hi Diana,\n\nI did some digging into Beneo Asia Pacific and had a few ideas on where we could save time:\n\n- Extract 99% accurate data from diverse supplier documents for compliance.\n- Generate audit-ready, consistent export document sets for Beneo Asia Pacific.\n- Flag discrepancies in Health and Halal Certificates that humans miss.\n\nHave you solved for export documentation prep or is your team still doing it manually?\n\nIf we could help you do the same and save 10+ hours a week, automatically from WhatsApp, email or any chat app you already use, would that be interesting?\n\nBest,\nSeth",
          "ideas_used": [
            "Extract 99% accurate data from diverse supplier documents for compliance.",
            "Generate audit-ready, consistent export document sets for Beneo Asia Pacific.",
            "Flag discrepancies in Health and Halal Certificates that humans miss."
          ]
        },
        "email_3": {
          "subject": "Re: quick question on Food Processor",
          "body": "Hi Diana,\n\nMy co-founder and I are building a startup in Singapore to support local businesses and we wanted to reach out because your expertise could save us a ton of mistakes.\n\nNoticed Beneo Asia Pacific showcased weight-management solutions at Fi Europe 2025 - figured you'd have perspective on how operations are scaling.\n\nFor some background, we spoke with senior government leaders last week at Smart Nation - they shared that SMEs in underserved areas stand to gain the most from AI compared to MNCs.\n\nWe're now looking to figure out which are the biggest pain points food trading companies face and 30 minutes of your time would make a huge difference.\n\nWe're a Cambridge led group, based in SG, and have a prototype, but this is in no way a sales call.\n\nIf you could just email or WhatsApp an AI assistant your export documents and get back audit-ready reconciliations between commercial invoices and packing lists in Excel, would that be useful?\n\nWould you be open to a quick chat to point us in the right direction?\n\nBest,\nSeth\n\nP.S. Happy to drop by your office at Science Park Road if that's easier!",
          "hook_used": "News",
          "value_line": "If you could just email or WhatsApp an AI assistant your export documents and get back audit-ready reconciliations between commercial invoices and packing lists in Excel, would that be useful?",
          "value_line_source": "document_pain_analysis + company_profile"
        },
        "linkedin_message": {
          "message": "Seth here. Given your experience leading Beneo Asia Pacific, I was hoping to get your opinion. Emailed you about our idea for a WhatsApp AI assistant that does back office work around the clock - sending a voice note too in case it missed you!",
          "hook_used": "C-suite",
          "generated": true
        },
        "voice_note": {
          "script": "Hi Diana, I'm building an AI startup in Singapore focused on automating heavy back-office paperwork - a gap recently highlighted to us by government leaders in Smart Nation.We're a Cambridge-led team with a working prototype, and I'd love 20 minutes of your time to ensure we're solving the right pain points for firms like Beneo Asia Pacific.This isn't a sales call - just looking for your perspective.Happy to buy you lunch near your office at Science Park Road as a thank you. Would you be open to a quick chat?",
          "location_used": "Science Park Road",
          "generated": true
        }

        "contact_name": "Riccarda Zullig",

        "email_1": {
          "subject": "quick question on food",
          "body": "Hi Riccarda,\n\nWe're building an AI assistant that's always one step ahead for SG food manufacturing companies.\n\nIt proactively checks in - running daily reconciliation of product details across export documents, tracking missing certification approvals and sending follow-ups, or giving you morning updates on export document readiness - all without you having to ask.\n\nYou just WhatsApp or email it instructions and it does your back office work around the clock.\n\nWe're a Cambridge-backed group with a working prototype to demo, but this isn't a sales call. We're trying to learn what food teams actually find useful, what pain points keep coming up, and how you're thinking about future-proofing the business. 30 minutes of your time would make a big difference.\n\nI know you're busy, so let me know what time is best for a call or I can drop by your office at Buroh Lane if that's easier!\n\nBest,\nSeth\n\nP.S. Before our call, I can train our AI on your Halal + health cert stack so you can see exactly how it handles the compliance docs for SGProtein.",
          "ps_used": "Halal certified"
        },
        "email_2": {
          "subject": "Riccarda <> Seth",
          "body": "Hi Riccarda,\n\nI did some digging into SGProtein and had a few ideas on where we could save time:\n- Extract 99% accurate data from your purchase orders for efficient inventory management.\n- Generate audit-ready Commercial Invoices and Packing Lists consistent with your production data.\n- Flag discrepancies in Health Certs and COOs before submission to avoid delays for SGProtein.\n\nHave you solved for export documentation prep or is your team still doing it manually?\n\nIf we could help you do the same and save 10+ hours a week, automatically from WhatsApp, email or any chat app you already use, would that be interesting?\n\nBest,\nSeth",
          "ideas_used": [
            "Extract 99% accurate data from your purchase orders for efficient inventory management.",
            "Generate audit-ready Commercial Invoices and Packing Lists consistent with your production data.",
            "Flag discrepancies in Health Certs and COOs before submission to avoid delays for SGProtein."
          ]
        },
        "email_3": {
          "subject": "Re: quick question on food",
          "body": "Hi Riccarda,\n\nMy co-founder and I are building a startup in Singapore to support local businesses and we wanted to reach out because your expertise could save us a ton of mistakes.\n\nGiven your experience in food, I was hoping to get your opinion.\n\nFor some background, we spoke with senior government leaders last week at Smart Nation - they shared that SMEs in underserved areas stand to gain the most from AI compared to MNCs.\n\nWe're now looking to figure out which are the biggest pain points food trading companies face and 30 minutes of your time would make a huge difference.\n\nWe're a Cambridge led group, based in SG, and have a prototype, but this is in no way a sales call.\n\nIf you could just email or WhatsApp an AI assistant your export documents and get back an audit-ready reconciliation of all shipment details in Excel, would that be useful?\n\nWould you be open to a quick chat to point us in the right direction?\n\nBest,\nSeth\n\nP.S. Happy to drop by your office at Buroh Lane if that's easier!",
          "hook_used": "Fallback (no signal)",
          "value_line": "just email or WhatsApp an AI assistant your export documents and get back an audit-ready reconciliation of all shipment details in Excel",

          "body": "Hi Daniel,\n\nI did some digging into Woah Group and had a few ideas on where we could save time:\n\n- Extract 99% accurate data from supplier invoices for MyProtein and Woah! brands.\n- Get audit-ready reconciliation of purchase orders against incoming shipment documents.\n- Flag inconsistencies across Commercial Invoices, Packing Lists, and regulatory certificates.\n\nHave you solved for export documentation prep or is your team still doing it manually?\n\nIf we could help you do the same and save 10+ hours a week, automatically from WhatsApp, email or any chat app you already use, would that be interesting?\n\nBest,\nSeth",
          "ideas_used": [
            "Extract 99% accurate data from supplier invoices for MyProtein and Woah! brands.",
            "Get audit-ready reconciliation of purchase orders against incoming shipment documents.",
            "Flag inconsistencies across Commercial Invoices, Packing Lists, and regulatory certificates."
          ]
        },
        "email_3": {
          "subject": "Re: quick question on food wholesaler",
          "body": "Hi Daniel,\n\nMy co-founder and I are building a startup in Singapore to support local businesses and we wanted to reach out because your expertise could save us a ton of mistakes.\n\nGiven your experience in food, I was hoping to get your opinion.\n\nFor some background, we spoke with senior government leaders last week at Smart Nation - they shared that SMEs in underserved areas stand to gain the most from AI compared to MNCs.\n\nWe're now looking to figure out which are the biggest pain points food trading companies face and 30 minutes of your time would make a huge difference.\n\nWe're a Cambridge led group, based in SG, and have a prototype, but this is in no way a sales call.\n\nIf you could just email or WhatsApp an AI assistant your commercial invoices and health certificates and get back audit-ready reconciliation for all your brands, would that be useful?\n\nWould you be open to a quick chat to point us in the right direction?\n\nBest,\nSeth\n\nP.S. Happy to drop by your office at Upper Aljunied Link if that's easier!",
          "hook_used": "Fallback",
          "value_line": "If you could just email or WhatsApp an AI assistant your commercial invoices and health certificates and get back audit-ready reconciliation for all your brands, would that be useful?",
          "value_line_source": "document_pain_analysis"

          "body": "Hi Takashi,\n\nWe're building an AI assistant that's always one step ahead for SG food processors.\n\nIt proactively checks in - running daily reconciliation of commercial invoices against packing lists, tracking missing Health Certificate applications and sending automated follow-ups, or giving you morning updates on export documents awaiting approval - all without you having to ask.\n\nYou just WhatsApp or email it instructions and it does your back office work around the clock.\n\nWe're a Cambridge-backed group with a working prototype to demo, but this isn't a sales call.           "body": "Hi Takashi,\n\nI did some digging into Suntory Beverage & Food Asia and had a few ideas on where we could save time:\n\n- Get audit-ready reconciliation of Commercial Invoices and Packing Lists.\n- Extract 99% accurate data from Health Certificates for SFA submission.\n- Flag discrepancies across all shipment documents for Suntory Beverage & Food Asia.\n\nHave you solved for export documentation prep or is your team still doing it manually?\n\nIf we could help you do the same and save 10+ hours a week, automatically from WhatsApp, email or any chat app you already use, would that be interesting?\n\nBest,\nSeth",

          "subject": "Re: quick question on food",
          "body": "Hi Takashi,\n\nMy co-founder and I are building a startup in Singapore to support local businesses and we wanted to reach out because your expertise could save us a ton of mistakes.\n\nGiven your experience in food, I was hoping to get your opinion.\n\nFor some background, we spoke with senior government leaders last week at Smart Nation - they shared that SMEs in underserved areas stand to gain the most from AI compared to MNCs.\n\nWe're now looking to figure out which are the biggest pain points food trading companies face and 30 minutes of your time would make a huge difference.\n\nWe're a Cambridge led group, based in SG, and have a prototype, but this is in no way a sales call.\n\nIf you could just email or WhatsApp an AI assistant your export documents and get back audit-ready export documentation in Excel, would that be useful?\n\nWould you be open to a quick chat to point us in the right direction?\n\nBest,\nSeth\n\nP.S.           "body": "Hi Rohit, We're building an AI assistant that's always one step ahead for SG food processors. Have you solved for export documentation prep or is your team still doing it manually?           "body": "Hi Phil,\n\nI did some digging into Tri-Marine International and had a few ideas on where we could save time:\n\n- Extract 99% accurate data from Bills of Lading for global shipments.\n- Flag inconsistencies across Tri-Marine's Commercial Invoices and Packing Lists.\n- Generate audit-ready Certificates of Origin for multiple markets automatically.\n\nHave you solved for export documentation prep or is your team still doing it manually?\n\nIf we could help you do the same and save 10+ hours a week, automatically from WhatsApp, email or any chat app you already use, would that be interesting?\n\nBest,\nSeth",

          "body": "Hi Phil,\n\nMy co-founder and I are building a startup in Singapore to support local businesses and we wanted to reach out because your expertise could save us a ton of mistakes.\n\nGiven your 12+ years in the industry, I was hoping to get your opinion.\n\nFor some background, we spoke with senior government leaders last week at Smart Nation - they shared that SMEs in underserved areas stand to gain the most from AI compared to MNCs.\n\nWe're now looking to figure out which are the biggest pain points food trading companies face and 30 minutes of your time would make a huge difference.\n\nWe're a Cambridge led group, based in SG, and have a prototype, but this is in no way a sales call.\n\nIf you could just email or WhatsApp an AI assistant your Commercial Invoices, Packing Lists, and Health Certificates and get back an audit-ready reconciliation showing any discrepancies, would that be useful?\n\nWould you be open to a quick chat to point us in the right direction?\n\nBest,\nSeth\n\nP.S. \u043d\u0430\u0448\u0438\u043c \u0437\u0432\u043e\u043d\u043a\u043e\u043c \u044f \u043c\u043e\u0433\u0443 \u043e\u0431\u0443\u0447\u0438\u0442\u044c \u043d\u0430\u0448 \u0418\u0418 \u0432\u0430\u0448\u0438\u043c \u044d\u043a\u0441\u043f\u043e\u0440\u0442\u043d\u044b\u043c \u0434\u043e\u043a\u0443\u043c\u0435\u043d\u0442\u0430\u043c, \u0447\u0442\u043e\u0431\u044b \u0432\u044b \u043c\u043e\u0433\u043b\u0438 \u0443\u0432\u0438\u0434\u0435\u0442\u044c, \u0447\u0442\u043e \u0438\u043c\u0435\u043d\u043d\u043e \u043c\u044b \u043e\u0431\u043d\u0430\u0440\u0443\u0436\u0438\u043c \u0434\u043b\u044f Alternative Selection.",
          "ps_used": "Generic: export documents"
        },
        "email_2": {
          "subject": "Wendy <> Seth",
          "body": "Hi Wendy,\n\nI did some digging into Alternative Selection and had a few ideas on where we could save time:\n\n- Extract 99% accurate data from supplier invoices for finance reconciliation.\n- Generate audit-ready COO and Health Certificates from consistent data.\n- Flag inconsistencies across your export documentation pack that humans miss.\n\nHave you solved for export documentation prep or is your team still doing it manually?\n\nIf we could help you do the same and save 10+ hours a week, automatically from WhatsApp, email or any chat app you already use, would that be interesting?\n\nBest,\nSeth",
          "ideas_used": [
            "Extract 99% accurate data from supplier invoices for finance reconciliation.",
            "Generate audit-ready COO and Health Certificates from consistent data.",
            "Flag inconsistencies across your export documentation pack that humans miss."
          ]
        },
        "email_3": {
          "subject": "Re: quick question on food wholesaler",
          "body": "Hi Wendy,\n\nMy co-founder and I are building a startup in Singapore to support local businesses and we wanted to reach out because your expertise could save us a ton of mistakes.\n\nGiven your experience in food, I was hoping to get your opinion.\n\nFor some background, we spoke with senior government leaders last week at Smart Nation - they shared that SMEs in underserved areas stand to gain the most from AI compared to MNCs.\n\nWe're now looking to figure out which are the biggest pain points food trading companies face and 30 minutes of your time would make a huge difference.\n\nWe're a Cambridge led group, based in SG, and have a prototype, but this is in no way a sales call.\n\nIf you could just email or WhatsApp an AI assistant your export documentation pack and get back an audit-ready reconciliation of your export documentation pack in Excel, would that be useful?\n\nWould you be open to a quick chat to point us in the right direction?\n\nBest,\nSeth\n\nP.S. Happy to drop by your office at Golden Agri Plaza if that's easier!",
          "hook_used": "Fallback: Given your {X}+ years in the industry",
          "value_line": "just email or WhatsApp an AI assistant your export documentation pack and get back an audit-ready reconciliation of your export documentation pack in Excel",
          "value_line_source": "document_pain_analysis, company_profile"
        },
        "linkedin_message": {
          "message": "N/A",
          "hook_used": "none",
          "generated": false
        },
        "voice_note": {
          "script": "N/A",
          "location_used": "none",
          "generated": false
        }

    "341": {
      "company_name": "341",
      "stage1_status": "completed",
      "stage2_status": "pending",
      "stage1_result": {
        "company_name": "Maxwill Asia",
        "contact_name": "Davis Tan",
        "contact_email": "davis@daviscl.com",
        "email_1": {
          "subject": "quick question on food",
          "body": "Hi Davis, \u041c\u044b \u0441\u0442\u0440\u043e\u0438\u043c \u0441\u0442\u0430\u0440\u0442\u0430\u043f \u0432 \u0421\u0438\u043d\u0433\u0430\u043f\u0443\u0440\u0435.\n\nWe're building an AI assistant that's always one step ahead for SG food traders.\n\nIt proactively checks in - running daily reconciliation of Commercial Invoices and Packing Lists against shipment records, tracking overdue Health Certificates and sending automated follow-ups, or giving you morning updates on critical export documents awaiting approval - all without you having to ask.\n\nYou just WhatsApp or email it instructions and it does your back office work around the clock.\n\nWe're a Cambridge-backed group with a working prototype to demo, but this isn't a sales call. We're trying to learn what food teams actually find useful, what pain points keep coming up, and how you're thinking about future-proofing the business. 30 minutes of your time would make a big difference.\n\nI know you're busy, so let me know what time is best for a call or I can drop by your office at The Spire if that's easier!\n\nBest,\nSeth\n\nP.S. Before our call, I can train our AI on your Halal and health certificates so you can see exactly what we'd catch for Maxwill Asia.",
          "ps_used": "Halal and health certificates for Maxwill Asia"
        },
        "email_2": {
          "subject": "Davis <> Seth",
          "body": "Hi Davis,\n\nI did some digging into Maxwill Asia and had a few ideas on where we could save time:\n\n- Generate audit-ready Commercial Invoices and Packing Lists in minutes.\n- Flag inconsistencies across B/Ls, COOs, and Health Certs that humans miss.\n- Extract 99% accurate data from all export documents for portal submission.\n\nHave you solved for export documentation prep or is your team still doing it manually?\n\nIf we could help you do the same and save 10+ hours a week, automatically from WhatsApp, email or any chat app you already use, would that be interesting?\n\nBest,\nSeth",
          "ideas_used": [
            "Generate audit-ready Commercial Invoices and Packing Lists in minutes.",
            "Flag inconsistencies across B/Ls, COOs, and Health Certs that humans miss.",
            "Extract 99% accurate data from all export documents for portal submission."
          ]
        },
        "email_3": {
          "subject": "Re: quick question on food",
          "body": "Hi Davis,\n\nMy co-founder and I are building a startup in Singapore to support local businesses and we wanted to reach out because your expertise could save us a ton of mistakes.\n\nNoticed Maxwill Asia is evaluating a China & North Asia scale-up strategy - figured you'd have perspective on how operations are scaling.\n\nFor some background, we spoke with senior government leaders last week at Smart Nation - they shared that SMEs in underserved areas stand to gain the most from AI compared to MNCs.\n\nWe're now looking to figure out which are the biggest pain points food trading companies face and 30 minutes of your time would make a huge difference.\n\nWe're a Cambridge led group, based in SG, and have a prototype, but this is in no way a sales call.\n\nIf you could just email or WhatsApp an AI assistant your export documents and get back an audit-ready reconciliation of your full export document set in Excel, would that be useful?\n\nWould you be open to a quick chat to point us in the right direction?\n\nBest,\nSeth\n\nP.S. Happy to drop by your office at The Spire if that's easier!",
          "hook_used": "News",
          "value_line": "just email or WhatsApp an AI assistant your export documents and get back an audit-ready reconciliation of your full export document set in Excel",
          "value_line_source": "document_pain_analysis, company_profile"
        },
        "linkedin_message": {
          "message": "Seth here. Noticed Maxwill Asia is evaluating a China & North Asia scale-up strategy - figured you'd have perspective on how operations are scaling. Emailed you about our idea for a WhatsApp AI assistant that does back office work around the clock - sending a voice note too in case it missed you!",
          "hook_used": "News",
          "generated": true
        },
        "voice_note": {
          "script": "Hi Davis, I'm building an AI startup in Singapore focused on automating heavy back-office paperwork - a gap recently highlighted to us by government leaders in Smart Nation. We're a Cambridge-led team with a working prototype, and I'd love 20 minutes of your time to ensure we're solving the right pain points for firms like Maxwill Asia. This isn't a sales call - just looking for your perspective. Happy to buy you lunch near your office at The Spire as a thank you. Would you be open to a quick chat?",
          "location_used": "The Spire",
          "generated": true
        }

          "subject": "quick question on food",
          "body": "Hi Simon,\n\nWe're building an AI assistant that's always one step ahead for SG food trading companies.\n\nIt proactively checks in - running daily reconciliation of invoices vs. shipment data, tracking pending Health Certificates and sending follow-ups to authorities, or giving you morning updates on export documents awaiting approval - all without you having to ask.\n\nYou just WhatsApp or email it instructions and it does your back office work around the clock.\n\nWe're a Cambridge-backed group with a working prototype to demo, but this isn't a sales call. We're trying to learn what food teams actually find useful, what pain points keep coming up, and how you're thinking about future-proofing the business. 30 minutes of your time would make a big difference.\n\nI know you're busy, so let me know what time is best for a call or I can drop by your office at Fishery Port Road if that's easier!\n\nBest,\nSeth\n\nP.S. Before our call, I can train our AI on your health cert applications so you can see exactly what we'd catch for Grand Atlantic Fishery.",
          "ps_used": "health cert applications"
        },
        "email_2": {
          "subject": "Simon <> Seth",
          "body": "Hi Simon,\n\nI did some digging into Grand Atlantic Fishery and had a few ideas on where we could save time:\n\n- Extract 99% accurate data from Purchase Orders to auto-populate invoices.\n- Flag inconsistencies in quantities or HS codes across shipment docs.\n- Generate audit-ready Certificates of Origin and Health Certificates from one data entry.\n\nHave you solved for export documentation prep or is your team still doing it manually?\n\nIf we could help you do the same and save 10+ hours a week, automatically from WhatsApp, email or any chat app you already use, would that be interesting?\n\nBest,\nSeth",
          "ideas_used": [
            "Extract 99% accurate data from Purchase Orders to auto-populate invoices.",
            "Flag inconsistencies in quantities or HS codes across shipment docs.",
            "Generate audit-ready Certificates of Origin and Health Certificates from one data entry."
          ]
        },
        "email_3": {
          "subject": "Re: quick question on food",
          "body": "Hi Simon,\n\nMy co-founder and I are building a startup in Singapore to support local businesses and we wanted to reach out because your expertise could save us a ton of mistakes.\n\nGiven your experience in food, I was hoping to get your opinion.\n\nFor some background, we spoke with senior government leaders last week at Smart Nation - they shared that SMEs in underserved areas stand to gain the most from AI compared to MNCs.\n\nWe're now looking to figure out which are the biggest pain points food trading companies face and 30 minutes of your time would make a huge difference.\n\nWe're a Cambridge led group, based in SG, and have a prototype, but this is in no way a sales call.\n\nIf you could just email or WhatsApp an AI assistant your shipment details and get back audit-ready export document packages in Excel, would that be useful?\n\nWould you be open to a quick chat to point us in the right direction?\n\nBest,\nSeth\n\nP.S. Happy to drop by your office at Fishery Port Road if that's easier!",

          "value_line": "If you could just email or WhatsApp an AI assistant your shipment details and get back audit-ready export document packages in Excel, would that be useful?",

          "body": "Hi Thomas,\n\nMy co-founder and I are building a startup in Singapore to support local businesses and we wanted to reach out because your expertise could save us a ton of mistakes.\n\nGiven your experience in food, I was hoping to get your opinion.\n\nFor some background, we spoke with senior government leaders last week at Smart Nation - they shared that SMEs in underserved areas stand to gain the most from AI compared to MNCs.\n\nWe're now looking to figure out which are the biggest pain points food trading companies face and 30 minutes of your time would make a huge difference.\n\nWe're a Cambridge led group, based in SG, and have a prototype, but this is in no way a sales call.\n\nIf you could just email or WhatsApp an AI assistant your commercial invoices and packing lists and get back audit-ready reconciliation of all your shipment documents in Excel, would that be useful?\n\nWould you be open to a quick chat to point us in the right direction?\n\nBest,\nSeth\n\nP.S. Happy to drop by your office if that's easier!",

          "body": "Hi Eric,Seth here.           "body": "Hi Hachiro,\n\nWe're building an AI assistant that's always one step ahead for SG food processors.\n\nIt proactively checks in - running daily reconciliation of export documents against LCs, tracking missing Health Certificates and sending automated follow-ups, or giving you morning updates on critical export documents awaiting approval - all without you having to ask.\n\nYou just WhatsApp or email it instructions and it does your back office work around the clock.\n\nWe're a Cambridge-backed group with a working prototype to demo, but this isn't a sales call.
