        "email_1": {
          "subject": "quick question on Food Processor",
          "body": "Hi Stephanie,\n\nWe're building an AI assistant that's always one step ahead for SG food processors.\n\nIt proactively checks in - running daily reconciliations of invoices and packing lists, tracking missing Health Certificates and following up with agencies, or giving you morning updates on new wholesale orders awaiting document generation - all without you having to ask.\n\nYou just WhatsApp or email it instructions and it does your back office work around the clock.\n\nWe're a Cambridge-backed group with a working prototype to demo, but this isn't a sales call. We're trying to learn what Food Processor teams actually find useful, what pain points keep coming up, and how you're thinking about future-proofing the business. 30 minutes of your time would make a big difference.\n\nI know you're busy, so let me know what time is best for a call or I can drop by your office at Ang Mo Kio Industrial Park 2 if that's easier!\n\nBest,\nSeth\n\nP.S.           "ps_used": "Email 1's fixed P.S. referencing export documents"
        },
        "email_2": {
          "subject": "Stephanie <> Seth",
          "body": "Hi Stephanie,\n\nI did some digging into SG Homemade and had a few ideas on where we could save time:\n\n- Extract 99% accurate data from wholesale orders for quick processing.\n- Flag inconsistent quantities on packing lists that humans miss for audit-ready compliance.\n- Generate complete, ready-to-review COO and Health Certificates in minutes for SG Homemade.\n\nHave you solved for export documentation prep or is your team still doing it manually?\n\nIf we could help you do the same and save 10+ hours a week, automatically from WhatsApp, email or any chat app you already use, would that be interesting?\n\nBest,\nSeth",
          "ideas_used": [
            "Extract 99% accurate data from wholesale orders for quick processing.",
            "Flag inconsistent quantities on packing lists that humans miss for audit-ready compliance.",
            "Generate complete, ready-to-review COO and Health Certificates in minutes for SG Homemade."
          ]
        },
        "email_3": {
          "subject": "Re: quick question on Food Processor",
          "body": "Hi Stephanie,\n\nMy co-founder and I are building a startup in Singapore to support local businesses and we wanted to reach out because your expertise could save us a ton of mistakes.\n\nGiven your experience in food, I was hoping to get your opinion.\n\nFor some background, we spoke with senior government leaders last week at Smart Nation - they shared that SMEs in underserved areas stand to gain the most from AI compared to MNCs.\n\nWe're now looking to figure out which are the biggest pain points food trading companies face and 30 minutes of your time would make a huge difference.\n\nWe're a Cambridge led group, based in SG, and have a prototype, but this is in no way a sales call.\n\nIf you could just email or WhatsApp an AI assistant your export documents and get back audit-ready reconciliation of your export documents in Excel, would that be useful?\n\nWould you be open to a quick chat to point us in the right direction?\n\nBest,\nSeth\n\nP.S. Happy to drop by your office at Ang Mo Kio Industrial Park 2 if that's easier!",
          "hook_used": "Fallback (no signals)",
          "value_line": "If you could just email or WhatsApp an AI assistant your export documents and get back audit-ready reconciliation of your export documents in Excel, would that be useful?",
          "value_line_source": "document_pain_analysis, company_profile"

        "linkedin_message": {
          "message": "Seth here. Given your experience at SG Homemade, I was hoping to get your opinion. Emailed you about our idea for a WhatsApp AI assistant that does back office work around the clock - sending a voice note too in case it missed you!",

          "body": "Hi Henry,\n\nWe're building an AI assistant that's always one step ahead for SG food processors.\n\nIt proactively checks in - running daily reconciliation of export documents against shipping manifests, tracking outstanding health certificates and sending automated follow-ups, or giving you morning updates on cargo clearance permits awaiting approval - all without you having to ask.\n\nYou just WhatsApp or email it instructions and it does your back office work around the clock.\n\nWe're a Cambridge-backed group with a working prototype to demo, but this isn't a sales call.           "body": "Hi Anne-Marie,\n\nMy co-founder and I are building a startup in Singapore to support local businesses and we wanted to reach out because your expertise could save us a ton of mistakes.\n\nGiven your experience in food, I was hoping to get your opinion.\n\nFor some background, we spoke with senior government leaders last week at Smart Nation - they shared that SMEs in underserved areas stand to gain the most from AI compared to MNCs.\n\nWe're now looking to figure out which are the biggest pain points food trading companies face and 30 minutes of your time would make a huge difference.\n\nWe're a Cambridge led group, based in SG, and have a prototype, but this is in no way a sales call.\n\nIf you could just email or WhatsApp an AI assistant your supplier invoices and get back an audit-ready reconciliation in Excel showing unmatched items and discrepancies, would that be useful?\n\nWould you be open to a quick chat to point us in the right direction?\n\nBest,\nSeth\n\nP.S. Happy to drop by your office at Robinson Road if that's easier!",
          "hook_used": "Fallback (no signals)",
          "value_line": "If you could just email or WhatsApp an AI assistant your supplier invoices and get back an audit-ready reconciliation in Excel showing unmatched items and discrepancies, would that be useful?",
          "value_line_source": "document_pain_analysis and company_profile"
        },
        "linkedin_message": {
          "message": "Seth here. Given your experience at The Whole Kitchen, I was hoping to get your opinion. Emailed you about our idea for a WhatsApp AI assistant that does back office work around the clock - sending a voice note too in case it missed you!",
          "hook_used": "FALLBACK (no signals)",
          "generated": true
        },
        "voice_note": {
          "script": "Hi Anne-Marie, I'm building an AI startup in Singapore focused on automating heavy back-office paperwork - a gap recently highlighted to us by government leaders in Smart Nation. We're a Cambridge-led team with a working prototype, and I'd love 20 minutes of your time to ensure we're solving the right pain points for firms like The Whole Kitchen. This isn't a sales call - just looking for your perspective. Happy to buy you lunch near your office at Robinson Road as a thank you. Would you be open to a quick chat?",
          "location_used": "Robinson Road",
          "generated": true
        }

\u043f\u043e\u044d\u0442\u043e\u043c\u0443 \u0434\u0430\u0439\u0442\u0435 \u043c\u043d\u0435 \u0437\u043d\u0430\u0442\u044c, \u043a\u0430\u043a\u043e\u0435 \u0432\u0440\u0435\u043c\u044f \u043b\u0443\u0447\u0448\u0435 \u0432\u0441\u0435\u0433\u043e \u0434\u043b\u044f \u0437\u0432\u043e\u043d\u043a\u0430, \u0438\u043b\u0438 \u044f \u043c\u043e\u0433\u0443 \u0437\u0430\u0435\u0445\u0430\u0442\u044c \u043a \u0432\u0430\u043c \u0432 \u043e\u0444\u0438\u0441 \u043d\u0430 Woodlands Loop, \u0435\u0441\u043b\u0438 \u044d\u0442\u043e \u043f\u0440\u043e\u0449\u0435! Best, Seth P.S. \u041f\u0435\u0440\u0435\u0434 \u043d\u0430\u0448\u0438\u043c \u0437\u0432\u043e\u043d\u043a\u043e\u043c \u044f \u043c\u043e\u0433\u0443 \u043e\u0431\u0443\u0447\u0438\u0442\u044c \u043d\u0430\u0448 AI \u0440\u0430\u0431\u043e\u0442\u0435 \u0441 \u0432\u0430\u0448\u0438\u043c\u0438 \u0437\u0430\u044f\u0432\u043a\u0430\u043c\u0438 \u043d\u0430 \u043c\u0435\u0434\u0438\u0446\u0438\u043d\u0441\u043a\u0438\u0435 \u0441\u0435\u0440\u0442\u0438\u0444\u0438\u043a\u0430\u0442\u044b, \u0447\u0442\u043e\u0431\u044b \u0432\u044b \u043c\u043e\u0433\u043b\u0438 \u0442\u043e\u0447\u043d\u043e \u0443\u0432\u0438\u0434\u0435\u0442\u044c, \u0447\u0442\u043e \u043c\u044b \u043e\u0431\u043d\u0430\u0440\u0443\u0436\u0438\u043c \u0434\u043b\u044f Yew Hwa Foodstuff Enterprise.",
          "ps_used": "P.S. Before our call, I can train our AI on your health cert applications so you can see exactly what we'd catch for Yew Hwa Foodstuff Enterprise."
        },
        "email_2": {
          "subject": "Aggie <> Seth",
          "body": "Hi Aggie, I did some digging into Yew Hwa Foodstuff Enterprise and had a few ideas on where we could save time:\n- Extract 99% accurate data from diverse supplier invoices and test reports.\n- Generate audit-ready Commercial Invoices and Packing Lists, cross-checked for consistency.\n- Flag critical discrepancies in Health Certs before SFA submission, catching what humans miss.\n\nHave you solved for export documentation prep or is your team still doing it manually?\n\nIf we could help you do the same and save 10+ hours a week, automatically from WhatsApp, email or any chat app you already use, would that be interesting?\n\nBest,\nSeth",
          "ideas_used": [
            "Extract 99% accurate data from diverse supplier invoices and test reports.",
            "Generate audit-ready Commercial Invoices and Packing Lists, cross-checked for consistency.",
            "Flag critical discrepancies in Health Certs before SFA submission, catching what humans miss."
          ]
        },
        "email_3": {
          "subject": "Re: quick question on food",
          "body": "Hi Aggie,\n\nMy co-founder and I are building a startup in Singapore to support local businesses and we wanted to reach out because your expertise could save us a ton of mistakes.\n\nGiven your experience in food, I was hoping to get your opinion.\n\nFor some background, we spoke with senior government leaders last week at Smart Nation - they shared that SMEs in underserved areas stand to gain the most from AI compared to MNCs.\n\nWe're now looking to figure out which are the biggest pain points food trading companies face and 30 minutes of your time would make a huge difference.\n\nWe're a Cambridge led group, based in SG, and have a prototype, but this is in no way a sales call.\n\nIf you could just email or WhatsApp an AI assistant your export documents and get back a complete, audit-ready export document set in Excel, would that be useful?\n\nWould you be open to a quick chat to point us in the right direction?\n\nBest,\nSeth\n\nP.S. Happy to drop by your office at Woodlands Loop if that's easier!",
          "hook_used": "Fallback",
          "value_line": "just email or WhatsApp an AI assistant your export documents and get back a complete, audit-ready export document set in Excel",
          "value_line_source": "document_pain_analysis and company_profile"
        },
        "linkedin_message": {
          "message": "N/A",
          "hook_used": "none",
          "generated": false
        },
        "voice_note": {
          "script": "N/A",
          "location_used": "none",
          "generated": false
        }

        "email_1": {
          "subject": "quick question on food",
          "body": "Hi Annie,\n\nWe're building an AI assistant that's always one step ahead for SG food processors.\n\nIt proactively checks in - running daily reconciliations of purchase orders against supplier invoices, tracking missing health certificates for export shipments and sending follow-ups, or giving you morning updates on critical export documents awaiting approval - all without you having to ask.\n\nYou just WhatsApp or email it instructions and it does your back office work around the clock.\n\nWe're a Cambridge-backed group with a working prototype to demo, but this isn't a sales call. We're trying to learn what food teams actually find useful, what pain points keep coming up, and how you're thinking about future-proofing the business. 30 minutes of your time would make a big difference.\n\nI know you're busy, so let me know what time is best for a call or I can drop by your office at Senoko Way if that's easier!\n\nBest,\nSeth\n\nP.S. Before our call, I can train our AI on your health cert applications so you can see exactly how it handles seafood export docs for Ken Ken Food Mfg.",

        },
        "email_2": {

          "ideas_used": [

        "contact_email": "fiona.lee@foodplant.com.sg",
        "email_1": {
          "subject": "quick question on food",
          "body": "Hi Fiona,\n\nWe're building an AI assistant that's always one step ahead for SG food manufacturing companies.\n\nIt proactively checks in - running daily reconciliation of batch production records against client orders, tracking missing quality control checklists and sending follow-ups, or giving you morning updates on pending compliance documentation - all without you having to ask.\n\nYou just WhatsApp or email it instructions and it does your back office work around the clock.\n\nWe're a Cambridge-backed group with a working prototype to demo, but this isn't a sales call. We're trying to learn what food teams actually find useful, what pain points keep coming up, and how you're thinking about future-proofing the business. 30 minutes of your time would make a big difference.\n\nI know you're busy, so let me know what time is best for a call or I can drop by your office at JTC Food Hub if that's easier!\n\nBest,\nSeth\n\nP.S. Before our call, I can train our AI on your batch production records and compliance documentation so you can see exactly what we'd catch for FoodPlant.",
          "ps_used": "generic based on identified document types"
        },
        "email_2": {
          "subject": "Fiona <> Seth",
          "body": "Hi Fiona,\n\nI did some digging into FoodPlant and had a few ideas on where we could save time:\n\n- Extract 99% accurate data from client booking requests for production scheduling.\n- Get audit-ready reconciliation of batch production records against quality control checklists.\n- Flag inconsistencies across all FoodPlant compliance documentation before submission.\n\nHave you solved for export documentation prep or is your team still doing it manually?\n\nIf we could help you do the same and save 10+ hours a week, automatically from WhatsApp, email or any chat app you already use, would that be interesting?\n\nBest,\nSeth",
          "ideas_used": [
            "Extract 99% accurate data from client booking requests for production scheduling.",
            "Get audit-ready reconciliation of batch production records against quality control checklists.",
            "Flag inconsistencies across all FoodPlant compliance documentation before submission."
          ]
        },
        "email_3": {
          "subject": "Re: quick question on food",
          "body": "Hi Fiona,\n\nMy co-founder and I are building a startup in Singapore to support local businesses and we wanted to reach out because your expertise could save us a ton of mistakes.\n\nGiven your experience in food, I was hoping to get your opinion.\n\nFor some background, we spoke with senior government leaders last week at Smart Nation - they shared that SMEs in underserved areas stand to gain the most from AI compared to MNCs.\n\nWe're now looking to figure out which are the biggest pain points food trading companies face and 30 minutes of your time would make a huge difference.\n\nWe're a Cambridge led group, based in SG, and have a prototype, but this is in no way a sales call.\n\nIf you could just email or WhatsApp an AI assistant your batch production records and compliance documentation and get back an audit-ready reconciliation in Excel showing consistent batch data and client orders, would that be useful?\n\nWould you be open to a quick chat to point us in the right direction?\n\nBest,\nSeth\n\nP.S. Happy to drop by your office at JTC Food Hub if that's easier!",

          "value_line": "just email or WhatsApp an AI assistant your batch production records and compliance documentation and get back an audit-ready reconciliation in Excel showing consistent batch data and client orders",

          "message": "Seth here. Given your experience at FoodPlant, I was hoping to get your opinion. Emailed you about our idea for a WhatsApp AI assistant that does back office work around the clock - sending a voice note too in case it missed you!",

          "body": "Hi James,\n\nMy co-founder and I are building a startup in Singapore to support local businesses and we wanted to reach out because your expertise could save us a ton of mistakes.\n\nGiven your experience in food, I was hoping to get your opinion.\n\nFor some background, we spoke with senior government leaders last week at Smart Nation - they shared that SMEs in underserved areas stand to gain the most from AI compared to MNCs.\n\nWe're now looking to figure out which are the biggest pain points food trading companies face and 30 minutes of your time would make a huge difference.\n\nWe're a Cambridge led group, based in SG, and have a prototype, but this is in no way a sales call.\n\nIf you could just email or WhatsApp an AI assistant your export documents and get back audit-ready reconciliation reports showing all aligned shipment details in Excel, would that be useful?\n\nWould you be open to a quick chat to point us in the right direction?\n\nBest,\nSeth\n\nP.S. Happy to drop by your office at Food Xchange @ Admiralty if that's easier!",
          "hook_used": "Fallback",
          "value_line": "If you could just email or WhatsApp an AI assistant your export documents and get back audit-ready reconciliation reports showing all aligned shipment details in Excel, would that be useful?",
          "value_line_source": "document_pain_analysis, company_profile"
        },
        "linkedin_message": {
          "message": "Seth here. Given your experience leading SLFI, I was hoping to get your opinion. Emailed you about our idea for a WhatsApp AI assistant that does back office work around the clock - sending a voice note too in case it missed you!",
          "hook_used": "C-suite",
          "generated": true
        },
        "voice_note": {
          "script": "Hi James, I'm building an AI startup in Singapore focused on automating heavy back-office paperwork - a gap recently highlighted to us by government leaders in Smart Nation.\n\nWe're a Cambridge-led team with a working prototype, and I'd love 20 minutes of your time to ensure we're solving the right pain points for firms like SLFI.\n\nThis isn't a sales call - just looking for your perspective.\n\nHappy to buy you lunch near your office at Food Xchange @ Admiralty as a thank you.         }

        "contact_name": "Ashley Tay",
        "contact_email": "ashley.tay@unicofoods.com",
        "email_1": {
          "subject": "quick question on food trading",
          "body": "Hi Ashley,\n\nWe're building an AI assistant that's always one step ahead for SG food traders.\n\nIt proactively checks in - running daily reconciliation of supplier invoices against purchase orders, tracking outstanding Health Certificates and sending follow-ups, or giving you morning updates on critical export document statuses - all without you having to ask.\n\nYou just WhatsApp or email it instructions and it does your back office work around the clock.\n\nWe're a Cambridge-backed group with a working prototype to demo, but this isn't a sales call. We're trying to learn what food teams actually find useful, what pain points keep coming up, and how you're thinking about future-proofing the business. 30 minutes of your time would make a big difference.\n\nI know you're busy, so let me know what time is best for a call or I can drop by your office at Fishery Port Road if that's easier!\n\nBest,\nSeth\n\nP.S. Before our call, I can train our AI on your export documents so you can see exactly what we'd catch for Unico Foods.",
          "ps_used": "Train AI on their export documents for Unico Foods."
        },
        "email_2": {
          "subject": "Ashley <> Seth",
          "body": "Hi Ashley,\n\nI did some digging into Unico Foods and had a few ideas on where we could save time:\n\n- Extract 99% accurate data from supplier invoices for faster processing.\n- Generate audit-ready export documentation sets (COO, Health Certs) consistently for Unico Foods.\n- Flag inconsistencies across bill of lading and packing lists that humans miss.\n\nHave you solved for export documentation prep or is your team still doing it manually?\n\nIf we could help you do the same and save 10+ hours a week, automatically from WhatsApp, email or any chat app you already use, would that be interesting?\n\nBest,\nSeth",
          "ideas_used": [
            "Extract 99% accurate data from supplier invoices for faster processing.",
            "Generate audit-ready export documentation sets (COO, Health Certs) consistently for Unico Foods.",
            "Flag inconsistencies across bill of lading and packing lists that humans miss."

        "email_3": {
          "subject": "Re: quick question on Food Processor",
          "body": "Hi James,\n\n\u041c\u043e\u0439 \u0441\u043e\u0443\u0447\u0440\u0435\u0434\u0438\u0442\u0435\u043b\u044c \u0438 \u044f \u0441\u0442\u0440\u043e\u0438\u043c \u0441\u0442\u0430\u0440\u0442\u0430\u043f \u0432 \u0421\u0438\u043d\u0433\u0430\u043f\u0443\u0440\u0435 \u0434\u043b\u044f \u043f\u043e\u0434\u0434\u0435\u0440\u0436\u043a\u0438 \u043c\u0435\u0441\u0442\u043d\u043e\u0433\u043e \u0431\u0438\u0437\u043d\u0435\u0441\u0430, \u0438 \u043c\u044b \u0445\u043e\u0442\u0435\u043b\u0438 \u0441\u0432\u044f\u0437\u0430\u0442\u044c\u0441\u044f \u0441 \u0432\u0430\u043c\u0438, \u043f\u043e\u0442\u043e\u043c\u0443 \u0447\u0442\u043e \u0432\u0430\u0448 \u043e\u043f\u044b\u0442 \u043c\u043e\u0433 \u0431\u044b \u0438\u0437\u0431\u0430\u0432\u0438\u0442\u044c \u043d\u0430\u0441 \u043e\u0442 \u043c\u043d\u043e\u0436\u0435\u0441\u0442\u0432\u0430 \u043e\u0448\u0438\u0431\u043e\u043a.\n\n\u0423\u0447\u0438\u0442\u044b\u0432\u0430\u044f \u0432\u0430\u0448 \u043e\u043f\u044b\u0442 \u0432 \u043f\u0438\u0449\u0435\u0432\u043e\u0439 \u043f\u0440\u043e\u043c\u044b\u0448\u043b\u0435\u043d\u043d\u043e\u0441\u0442\u0438, \u044f \u043d\u0430\u0434\u0435\u044f\u043b\u0441\u044f \u043f\u043e\u043b\u0443\u0447\u0438\u0442\u044c \u0432\u0430\u0448\u0435 \u043c\u043d\u0435\u043d\u0438\u0435.\n\n\u0414\u043b\u044f \u0441\u043f\u0440\u0430\u0432\u043a\u0438, \u043d\u0430 \u043f\u0440\u043e\u0448\u043b\u043e\u0439 \u043d\u0435\u0434\u0435\u043b\u0435 \u043c\u044b \u043e\u0431\u0449\u0430\u043b\u0438\u0441\u044c \u0441 \u0432\u044b\u0441\u043e\u043a\u043e\u043f\u043e\u0441\u0442\u0430\u0432\u043b\u0435\u043d\u043d\u044b\u043c\u0438 \u0433\u043e\u0441\u0443\u0434\u0430\u0440\u0441\u0442\u0432\u0435\u043d\u043d\u044b\u043c\u0438 \u0447\u0438\u043d\u043e\u0432\u043d\u0438\u043a\u0430\u043c\u0438 \u0432 Smart Nation \u2013 \u043e\u043d\u0438 \u0441\u043e\u043e\u0431\u0449\u0438\u043b\u0438, \u0447\u0442\u043e \u043c\u0430\u043b\u044b\u0435 \u0438 \u0441\u0440\u0435\u0434\u043d\u0438\u0435 \u043f\u0440\u0435\u0434\u043f\u0440\u0438\u044f\u0442\u0438\u044f \u0432 \u043d\u0435\u0434\u043e\u0441\u0442\u0430\u0442\u043e\u0447\u043d\u043e \u043e\u0431\u0441\u043b\u0443\u0436\u0438\u0432\u0430\u0435\u043c\u044b\u0445 \u0440\u0430\u0439\u043e\u043d\u0430\u0445 \u0431\u043e\u043b\u044c\u0448\u0435 \u0432\u0441\u0435\u0433\u043e \u0432\u044b\u0438\u0433\u0440\u044b\u0432\u0430\u044e\u0442 \u043e\u0442 \u0418\u0418 \u043f\u043e \u0441\u0440\u0430\u0432\u043d\u0435\u043d\u0438\u044e \u0441 \u043c\u043d\u043e\u0433\u043e\u043d\u0430\u0446\u0438\u043e\u043d\u0430\u043b\u044c\u043d\u044b\u043c\u0438 \u043a\u043e\u0440\u043f\u043e\u0440\u0430\u0446\u0438\u044f\u043c\u0438.\n\n\u0421\u0435\u0439\u0447\u0430\u0441 \u043c\u044b \u043f\u044b\u0442\u0430\u0435\u043c\u0441\u044f \u0432\u044b\u044f\u0441\u043d\u0438\u0442\u044c, \u0441 \u043a\u0430\u043a\u0438\u043c\u0438 \u043d\u0430\u0438\u0431\u043e\u043b\u044c\u0448\u0438\u043c\u0438 \u0431\u043e\u043b\u0435\u0432\u044b\u043c\u0438 \u0442\u043e\u0447\u043a\u0430\u043c\u0438 \u0441\u0442\u0430\u043b\u043a\u0438\u0432\u0430\u044e\u0442\u0441\u044f \u043f\u0438\u0449\u0435\u0432\u044b\u0435 \u0442\u043e\u0440\u0433\u043e\u0432\u044b\u0435 \u043a\u043e\u043c\u043f\u0430\u043d\u0438\u0438, \u0438 30 \u043c\u0438\u043d\u0443\u0442 \u0432\u0430\u0448\u0435\u0433\u043e \u0432\u0440\u0435\u043c\u0435\u043d\u0438 \u0438\u043c\u0435\u043b\u0438 \u0431\u044b \u043e\u0433\u0440\u043e\u043c\u043d\u043e\u0435 \u0437\u043d\u0430\u0447\u0435\u043d\u0438\u0435.\n\n\u041c\u044b \u2013 \u0433\u0440\u0443\u043f\u043f\u0430 \u043f\u043e\u0434 \u0440\u0443\u043a\u043e\u0432\u043e\u0434\u0441\u0442\u0432\u043e\u043c \u041a\u0435\u043c\u0431\u0440\u0438\u0434\u0436\u0430, \u0431\u0430\u0437\u0438\u0440\u0443\u044e\u0449\u0430\u044f\u0441\u044f \u0432 \u0421\u0438\u043d\u0433\u0430\u043f\u0443\u0440\u0435, \u0438 \u0443 \u043d\u0430\u0441 \u0435\u0441\u0442\u044c \u043f\u0440\u043e\u0442\u043e\u0442\u0438\u043f, \u043d\u043e \u044d\u0442\u043e \u043d\u0438 \u0432 \u043a\u043e\u0435\u043c \u0441\u043b\u0443\u0447\u0430\u0435 \u043d\u0435 \u043f\u0440\u043e\u0434\u0430\u0436\u043d\u044b\u0439 \u0437\u0432\u043e\u043d\u043e\u043a.\n\n\u0415\u0441\u043b\u0438 \u0431\u044b \u0432\u044b \u043c\u043e\u0433\u043b\u0438 \u043f\u0440\u043e\u0441\u0442\u043e \u043e\u0442\u043f\u0440\u0430\u0432\u0438\u0442\u044c \u0418\u0418-\u043f\u043e\u043c\u043e\u0449\u043d\u0438\u043a\u0443 \u043f\u043e \u044d\u043b\u0435\u043a\u0442\u0440\u043e\u043d\u043d\u043e\u0439 \u043f\u043e\u0447\u0442\u0435 \u0438\u043b\u0438 WhatsApp \u0432\u0430\u0448\u0438 \u044d\u043a\u0441\u043f\u043e\u0440\u0442\u043d\u044b\u0435 \u0434\u043e\u043a\u0443\u043c\u0435\u043d\u0442\u044b \u0438 \u043f\u043e\u043b\u0443\u0447\u0438\u0442\u044c \u0432 \u043e\u0442\u0432\u0435\u0442 \u0433\u043e\u0442\u043e\u0432\u044b\u0435 \u043a \u0430\u0443\u0434\u0438\u0442\u0443 \u043a\u043e\u043c\u043f\u043b\u0435\u043a\u0442\u044b \u044d\u043a\u0441\u043f\u043e\u0440\u0442\u043d\u044b\u0445 \u0434\u043e\u043a\u0443\u043c\u0435\u043d\u0442\u043e\u0432 \u0432 Excel, \u043f\u0440\u043e\u0432\u0435\u0440\u0435\u043d\u043d\u044b\u0435 \u043d\u0430 \u0441\u043e\u0433\u043b\u0430\u0441\u043e\u0432\u0430\u043d\u043d\u043e\u0441\u0442\u044c, \u0431\u044b\u043b\u043e \u0431\u044b \u044d\u0442\u043e \u043f\u043e\u043b\u0435\u0437\u043d\u043e?\n\n\u0412\u044b \u0431\u044b \u0441\u043e\u0433\u043b\u0430\u0441\u0438\u043b\u0438\u0441\u044c \u043d\u0430 \u043a\u043e\u0440\u043e\u0442\u043a\u0438\u0439 \u0440\u0430\u0437\u0433\u043e\u0432\u043e\u0440, \u0447\u0442\u043e\u0431\u044b \u0443\u043a\u0430\u0437\u0430\u0442\u044c \u043d\u0430\u043c \u043f\u0440\u0430\u0432\u0438\u043b\u044c\u043d\u043e\u0435 \u043d\u0430\u043f\u0440\u0430\u0432\u043b\u0435\u043d\u0438\u0435?\n\nBest,\nSeth\n\nP.S. \u042f \u0441 \u0440\u0430\u0434\u043e\u0441\u0442\u044c\u044e \u0437\u0430\u0435\u0434\u0443 \u0432 \u0432\u0430\u0448 \u043e\u0444\u0438\u0441 \u0432 Woodlands, \u0435\u0441\u043b\u0438 \u044d\u0442\u043e \u043f\u0440\u043e\u0449\u0435!",
          "hook_used": "Fallback (Given your experience in industry_short)",
          "value_line": "just email or WhatsApp an AI assistant your export documents and get back audit-ready export document sets in Excel, cross-checked for consistency",
          "value_line_source": "document_pain_analysis and company_profile"
        },
        "linkedin_message": {
          "message": "\u041f\u0440\u0438\u0432\u0435\u0442, \u0421\u0435\u0442. \u0423\u0447\u0438\u0442\u044b\u0432\u0430\u044f \u0432\u0430\u0448 \u043e\u043f\u044b\u0442 \u0440\u0443\u043a\u043e\u0432\u043e\u0434\u0441\u0442\u0432\u0430 Barramundi Group, \u044f \u043d\u0430\u0434\u0435\u044f\u043b\u0441\u044f \u043f\u043e\u043b\u0443\u0447\u0438\u0442\u044c \u0432\u0430\u0448\u0435 \u043c\u043d\u0435\u043d\u0438\u0435. \u042f \u043e\u0442\u043f\u0440\u0430\u0432\u0438\u043b \u0432\u0430\u043c \u044d\u043b\u0435\u043a\u0442\u0440\u043e\u043d\u043d\u043e\u0435 \u043f\u0438\u0441\u044c\u043c\u043e \u043e \u043d\u0430\u0448\u0435\u0439 \u0438\u0434\u0435\u0435 \u0418\u0418-\u043f\u043e\u043c\u043e\u0449\u043d\u0438\u043a\u0430 \u0432 WhatsApp, \u043a\u043e\u0442\u043e\u0440\u044b\u0439 \u043a\u0440\u0443\u0433\u043b\u043e\u0441\u0443\u0442\u043e\u0447\u043d\u043e \u0437\u0430\u043d\u0438\u043c\u0430\u0435\u0442\u0441\u044f \u0431\u044d\u043a-\u043e\u0444\u0438\u0441\u043d\u043e\u0439 \u0440\u0430\u0431\u043e\u0442\u043e\u0439 \u2013 \u0442\u0430\u043a\u0436\u0435 \u043e\u0442\u043f\u0440\u0430\u0432\u043b\u044f\u044e \u0433\u043e\u043b\u043e\u0441\u043e\u0432\u0443\u044e \u0437\u0430\u043c\u0435\u0442\u043a\u0443, \u0435\u0441\u043b\u0438 \u0432\u044b \u0435\u0435 \u043d\u0435 \u043f\u043e\u043b\u0443\u0447\u0438\u043b\u0438!",
          "hook_used": "C-suite",
          "generated": true
        },
        "voice_note": {
          "script": "\u041f\u0440\u0438\u0432\u0435\u0442, \u0414\u0436\u0435\u0439\u043c\u0441, \u044f \u0441\u043e\u0437\u0434\u0430\u044e \u0441\u0442\u0430\u0440\u0442\u0430\u043f \u0432 \u0421\u0438\u043d\u0433\u0430\u043f\u0443\u0440\u0435, \u0441\u043f\u0435\u0446\u0438\u0430\u043b\u0438\u0437\u0438\u0440\u0443\u044e\u0449\u0438\u0439\u0441\u044f \u043d\u0430 \u0430\u0432\u0442\u043e\u043c\u0430\u0442\u0438\u0437\u0430\u0446\u0438\u0438 \u0440\u0443\u0442\u0438\u043d\u043d\u043e\u0439 \u0440\u0430\u0431\u043e\u0442\u044b \u0441 \u0434\u043e\u043a\u0443\u043c\u0435\u043d\u0442\u0430\u043c\u0438 \u0432 \u0431\u044d\u043a-\u043e\u0444\u0438\u0441\u0435 \u2013 \u044d\u0442\u043e \u043f\u0440\u043e\u0431\u0435\u043b, \u043d\u0435\u0434\u0430\u0432\u043d\u043e \u0432\u044b\u0434\u0435\u043b\u0435\u043d\u043d\u044b\u0439 \u043d\u0430\u043c \u0433\u043e\u0441\u0443\u0434\u0430\u0440\u0441\u0442\u0432\u0435\u043d\u043d\u044b\u043c\u0438 \u043b\u0438\u0434\u0435\u0440\u0430\u043c\u0438 \u0432 Smart Nation.\n\n\u041c\u044b \u2013 \u043a\u043e\u043c\u0430\u043d\u0434\u0430 \u043f\u043e\u0434 \u0440\u0443\u043a\u043e\u0432\u043e\u0434\u0441\u0442\u0432\u043e\u043c \u041a\u0435\u043c\u0431\u0440\u0438\u0434\u0436\u0430 \u0441 \u0440\u0430\u0431\u043e\u0447\u0438\u043c \u043f\u0440\u043e\u0442\u043e\u0442\u0438\u043f\u043e\u043c, \u0438 \u044f \u0445\u043e\u0442\u0435\u043b \u0431\u044b \u0443\u0434\u0435\u043b\u0438\u0442\u044c 20 \u043c\u0438\u043d\u0443\u0442 \u0432\u0430\u0448\u0435\u0433\u043e \u0432\u0440\u0435\u043c\u0435\u043d\u0438, \u0447\u0442\u043e\u0431\u044b \u0443\u0431\u0435\u0434\u0438\u0442\u044c\u0441\u044f, \u0447\u0442\u043e \u043c\u044b \u0440\u0435\u0448\u0430\u0435\u043c \u043f\u0440\u0430\u0432\u0438\u043b\u044c\u043d\u044b\u0435 \u0432\u0430\u0448\u0435\u0433\u043e \u043e\u0444\u0438\u0441\u0430 \u0432 Woodlands \u0432 \u0437\u043d\u0430\u043a \u0431\u043b\u0430\u0433\u043e\u0434\u0430\u0440\u043d\u043e\u0441\u0442\u0438.         "linkedin_message": {
          "message": "Seth here. Noticed Nestle R&D Center recently invested in Singapore R&D to boost innovation and sustainability - figured you'd have perspective on how operations are scaling. Emailed you about our idea for a WhatsApp AI assistant that does back office work around the clock - sending a voice note too in case it missed you!",
          "hook_used": "News",
          "generated": true
        },
        "voice_note": {
          "script": "Hi Markus, I'm building an AI startup in Singapore focused on automating heavy back-office paperwork - a gap recently highlighted to us by government leaders in Smart Nation.           "location_used": "Quality Road",

    "379": {
      "company_name": "379",
      "stage1_status": "completed",
      "stage2_status": "pending",
      "stage1_result": {
        "company_name": "A. Clouet",
        "contact_name": "Kerina Kwek",
        "contact_email": "kerina.kwek@denis.com",
        "email_1": {
          "subject": "quick question on food",
          "body": "Hi Kerina,\n\nWe're building an AI assistant that's always one step ahead for SG food trading companies.\n\nIt proactively checks in - running daily reconciliations of Commercial Invoices against Packing Lists, tracking missing Health Certificates and sending automated follow-ups, or giving you morning updates on export documents awaiting approval - all without you having to ask.\n\nYou just WhatsApp or email it instructions and it does your back office work around the clock.\n\nWe're a Cambridge-backed group with a working prototype to demo, but this isn't a sales call. We're trying to learn what food teams actually find useful, what pain points keep coming up, and how you're thinking about future-proofing the business. 30 minutes of your time would make a big difference.\n\nI know you're busy, so let me know what time is best for a call or I can drop by your office at Tagore Lane if that's easier!\n\nBest,\nSeth",
          "ps_used": "Halal certified"
        },
        "email_2": {
          "subject": "Kerina <> Seth",
          "body": "Hi Kerina,\n\nI did some digging into A. Clouet and had a few ideas on where we could save time:\n\n- Extract 99% accurate data from supplier invoices and Packing Lists for fast processing.\n- Flag inconsistencies that humans miss across your full export document set.\n- Generate complete, ready to review data for SFA Health Cert and TradeNet CCP submissions.\n\nHave you solved for export documentation prep or is your team still doing it manually?\n\nIf we could help you do the same and save 10+ hours a week, automatically from WhatsApp, email or any chat app you already use, would that be interesting?\n\nBest,\nSeth",
          "ideas_used": [
            "Extract 99% accurate data from supplier invoices and Packing Lists for fast processing.",
            "Flag inconsistencies that humans miss across your full export document set.",

          "subject": "Re: quick question on food",
          "body": "Hi Kerina,\n\nMy co-founder and I are building a startup in Singapore to support local businesses and we wanted to reach out because your expertise could save us a ton of mistakes.\n\nGiven your experience in food, I was hoping to get your opinion.\n\nFor some background, we spoke with senior government leaders last week at Smart Nation - they shared that SMEs in underserved areas stand to gain the most from AI compared to MNCs.\n\nWe're now looking to figure out which are the biggest pain points food trading companies face and 30 minutes of your time would make a huge difference.\n\nWe're a Cambridge led group, based in SG, and have a prototype, but this is in no way a sales call.\n\nIf you could just email or WhatsApp an AI assistant your Commercial Invoices, Packing Lists, and Health Certificates and get back an audit-ready reconciliation of all your shipment documents in Excel, would that be useful?\n\nWould you be open to a quick chat to point us in the right direction?\n\nBest,\nSeth\n\nP.S.           "subject": "quick question on food processing",
          "body": "Hi Isaac,\n\nWe're building an AI assistant that's always one step ahead for SG food processors.\n\nIt proactively checks in - running daily reconciliation of shipment documents against orders, tracking pending Health Certificates and sending automated follow-ups, or giving you morning updates on your export documentation status - all without you having to ask.\n\nYou just WhatsApp or email it instructions and it does your back office work around the clock.\n\nWe're a Cambridge-backed group with a working prototype to demo, but this isn't a sales call. \u0432\u044b\u044f\u0441\u043d\u0438\u0442\u044c, \u043a\u0430\u043a\u0438\u0435 \u0441\u0430\u043c\u044b\u0435 \u0431\u043e\u043b\u044c\u0448\u0438\u0435 \u043f\u0440\u043e\u0431\u043b\u0435\u043c\u044b \u0441\u0442\u043e\u044f\u0442 \u043f\u0435\u0440\u0435\u0434 \u043a\u043e\u043c\u043f\u0430\u043d\u0438\u044f\u043c\u0438, \u0437\u0430\u043d\u0438\u043c\u0430\u044e\u0449\u0438\u043c\u0438\u0441\u044f \u0442\u043e\u0440\u0433\u043e\u0432\u043b\u0435\u0439 \u043f\u0440\u043e\u0434\u0443\u043a\u0442\u0430\u043c\u0438 \u043f\u0438\u0442\u0430\u043d\u0438\u044f, \u0438 30 \u043c\u0438\u043d\u0443\u0442 \u0432\u0430\u0448\u0435\u0433\u043e \u0432\u0440\u0435\u043c\u0435\u043d\u0438 \u0438\u043c\u0435\u043b\u0438 \u0431\u044b \u043e\u0433\u0440\u043e\u043c\u043d\u043e\u0435 \u0437\u043d\u0430\u0447\u0435\u043d\u0438\u0435.\n\n\u041c\u044b \u2014 \u0433\u0440\u0443\u043f\u043f\u0430 \u043f\u043e\u0434 \u0440\u0443\u043a\u043e\u0432\u043e\u0434\u0441\u0442\u0432\u043e\u043c \u041a\u0435\u043c\u0431\u0440\u0438\u0434\u0436\u0430, \u0431\u0430\u0437\u0438\u0440\u0443\u044e\u0449\u0430\u044f\u0441\u044f \u0432 \u0421\u0438\u043d\u0433\u0430\u043f\u0443\u0440\u0435, \u0443 \u043d\u0430\u0441 \u0435\u0441\u0442\u044c \u043f\u0440\u043e\u0442\u043e\u0442\u0438\u043f, \u043d\u043e \u044d\u0442\u043e \u043d\u0438 \u0432 \u043a\u043e\u0435\u043c \u0441\u043b\u0443\u0447\u0430\u0435 \u043d\u0435 \u043f\u0440\u043e\u0434\u0430\u0436\u043d\u044b\u0439 \u0437\u0432\u043e\u043d\u043e\u043a.\n\n\u0415\u0441\u043b\u0438 \u0431\u044b \u0432\u044b \u043c\u043e\u0433\u043b\u0438 \u043f\u0440\u043e\u0441\u0442\u043e \u043e\u0442\u043f\u0440\u0430\u0432\u0438\u0442\u044c \u0434\u043e\u043a\u0443\u043c\u0435\u043d\u0442\u044b \u043d\u0430\u0448\u0435\u043c\u0443 \u0418\u0418 \u0447\u0435\u0440\u0435\u0437 WhatsApp/email \u0438 \u043f\u043e\u043b\u0443\u0447\u0438\u0442\u044c \u0430\u0443\u0434\u0438\u0442-\u0433\u043e\u0442\u043e\u0432\u0443\u044e \u0441\u0432\u0435\u0440\u043a\u0443 \u0432 Excel, \u043f\u043e\u043a\u0430\u0437\u044b\u0432\u0430\u044e\u0449\u0443\u044e, \u0447\u0442\u043e \u043e\u043d\u0438 \u0437\u0430\u0431\u043e\u0442\u044f\u0442\u0441\u044f \u043e \u0447\u0435\u043c-\u0442\u043e, \u044d\u0442\u043e \u0431\u044b\u043b\u043e \u0431\u044b \u043f\u043e\u043b\u0435\u0437\u043d\u043e?\n\n\u0412\u044b \u0433\u043e\u0442\u043e\u0432\u044b \u043a \u0431\u044b\u0441\u0442\u0440\u043e\u043c\u0443 \u0447\u0430\u0442\u0443, \u0447\u0442\u043e\u0431\u044b \u0443\u043a\u0430\u0437\u0430\u0442\u044c \u043d\u0430\u043c \u043f\u0440\u0430\u0432\u0438\u043b\u044c\u043d\u043e\u0435 \u043d\u0430\u043f\u0440\u0430\u0432\u043b\u0435\u043d\u0438\u0435?\n\n\u0421 \u043d\u0430\u0438\u043b\u0443\u0447\u0448\u0438\u043c\u0438 \u043f\u043e\u0436\u0435\u043b\u0430\u043d\u0438\u044f\u043c\u0438,\n\u0421\u0435\u0442\n\nP.S. \u0411\u0443\u0434\u0443 \u0440\u0430\u0434 \u0437\u0430\u0433\u043b\u044f\u043d\u0443\u0442\u044c \u0432 \u0432\u0430\u0448 \u043e\u0444\u0438\u0441 \u043d\u0430 \u0422\u0430\u0433\u043e\u0440\u0435 \u041b\u0435\u0439\u043d, \u0435\u0441\u043b\u0438 \u0442\u0430\u043a \u0431\u0443\u0434\u0435\u0442 \u043f\u0440\u043e\u0449\u0435!",
          "ps_used": "export documents"
        },
        "email_2": {
          "subject": "Chuan Hang <> Seth",
          "body": "Hi Chuan Hang,\n\nI did some digging into Ang Leong Huat and had a few ideas on where we could save time:\n\n- Extract 99% accurate data from diverse supplier invoices for Ang Leong Huat.\n- Flag inconsistencies in HS codes across export docs before submission.\n- Generate audit-ready Commercial Invoices and Packing Lists in minutes.\n\nHave you solved for export documentation prep or is your team still doing it manually?\n\nIf we could help you do the same and save 10+ hours a week, automatically from WhatsApp, email or any chat app you already use, would that be interesting?\n\nBest,\nSeth",
          "ideas_used": [
            "Extract 99% accurate data from diverse supplier invoices for Ang Leong Huat.",
            "Flag inconsistencies in HS codes across export docs before submission.",
            "Generate audit-ready Commercial Invoices and Packing Lists in minutes."
          ]
        },
        "email_3": {
          "subject": "Re: quick question on food",
          "body": "Hi Chuan Hang,\n\nMy co-founder and I are building a startup in Singapore to support local businesses and we wanted to reach out because your expertise could save us a ton of mistakes.\n\nGiven your experience in food, I was hoping to get your opinion.\n\nFor some background, we spoke with senior government leaders last week at Smart Nation - they shared that SMEs in underserved areas stand to gain the most from AI compared to MNCs.\n\nWe're now looking to figure out which are the biggest pain points food trading companies face and 30 minutes of your time would make a huge difference.\n\nWe're a Cambridge led group, based in SG, and have a prototype, but this is in no way a sales call.\n\nIf you could just email or WhatsApp an AI assistant your export details and get back a complete, audit-ready set of export documents in PDF, consistent across all forms, would that be useful?\n\nWould you be open to a quick chat to point us in the right direction?\n\nBest,\nSeth\n\nP.S. Happy to drop by your office at Tagore Lane if that's easier!",
          "hook_used": "Fallback",
          "value_line": "just email or WhatsApp an AI assistant your export details and get back a complete, audit-ready set of export documents in PDF, consistent across all forms",
          "value_line_source": "document_pain_analysis, company_profile"
        },
        "linkedin_message": {

          "hook_used": "none",

          "body": "Hi Tsutomu,\n\nWe're building an AI assistant that's always one step ahead for SG food processors.\n\nIt proactively checks in - running daily reconciliations of export documents for consistency, tracking missing Health Certificates and prompting follow-ups, or giving you morning updates on pending COO applications - all without you having to ask.\n\nYou just WhatsApp or email it instructions and it does your back office work around the clock.\n\nWe're a Cambridge-backed group with a working prototype to demo, but this isn't a sales call. \u0437\u043d\u0430\u0447\u0435\u043d\u0438\u0435.\n\n\u0415\u0441\u043b\u0438 \u0431\u044b \u0432\u044b \u043c\u043e\u0433\u043b\u0438 [VALUE_MESSAGING], \u0431\u044b\u043b\u043e \u0431\u044b \u044d\u0442\u043e \u043f\u043e\u043b\u0435\u0437\u043d\u043e?\n\n\u0411\u044b\u043b\u0438 \u0431\u044b \u0432\u044b \u043e\u0442\u043a\u0440\u044b\u0442\u044b \u0434\u043b\u044f \u0431\u044b\u0441\u0442\u0440\u043e\u0433\u043e \u0440\u0430\u0437\u0433\u043e\u0432\u043e\u0440\u0430, \u0447\u0442\u043e\u0431\u044b \u0443\u043a\u0430\u0437\u0430\u0442\u044c \u043d\u0430\u043c \u043f\u0440\u0430\u0432\u0438\u043b\u044c\u043d\u043e\u0435 \u043d\u0430\u043f\u0440\u0430\u0432\u043b\u0435\u043d\u0438\u0435?\n\n\u0421 \u043d\u0430\u0438\u043b\u0443\u0447\u0448\u0438\u043c\u0438 \u043f\u043e\u0436\u0435\u043b\u0430\u043d\u0438\u044f\u043c\u0438,\n\u0421\u0435\u0442\n\nP.S. \u0421 \u0440\u0430\u0434\u043e\u0441\u0442\u044c\u044e \u0437\u0430\u0439\u0434\u0443 \u0432 \u0432\u0430\u0448 \u043e\u0444\u0438\u0441 \u0432 \u0418\u043d\u043d\u043e\u0432\u0430\u0442 360, \u0435\u0441\u043b\u0438 \u0442\u0430\u043a \u0443\u0434\u043e\u0431\u043d\u0435\u0435!",
          "ps_used": "Generic P.S. for export documents"
        },
        "email_2": {
          "subject": "Varden <> Seth",
          "body": "Hi Varden, I did some digging into The Moonbeam Co. and had a few ideas on where we could save time:\n\n- Extract 99% accurate data from purchase orders for production.\n- Generate audit-ready Commercial Invoices and Packing Lists for The Moonbeam Co. shipments.\n- Flag inconsistencies across Health Certificates and COOs to prevent rejections.\n\nHave you solved for export documentation prep or is your team still doing it manually?\n\nIf we could help you do the same and save 10+ hours a week, automatically from WhatsApp, email or any chat app you already use, would that be interesting?\n\nBest,\nSeth",
          "ideas_used": [
            "- Extract 99% accurate data from purchase orders for production.",
            "- Generate audit-ready Commercial Invoices and Packing Lists for The Moonbeam Co. shipments.",
            "- Flag inconsistencies across Health Certificates and COOs to prevent rejections."
          ]
        },
        "email_3": {
          "subject": "Re: quick question on Food Processor",
          "body": "Hi Varden,\n\nMy co-founder and I are building a startup in Singapore to support local businesses and we wanted to reach out because your expertise could save us a ton of mistakes.\n\nSaw your recognition for DBS Foundation-NEA Hungry for Change Challenge (Winner) - figured you'd have perspective on this.\n\nFor some background, we spoke with senior government leaders last week at Smart Nation - they shared that SMEs in underserved areas stand to gain the most from AI compared to MNCs.\n\nWe're now looking to figure out which are the biggest pain points food trading companies face and 30 minutes of your time would make a huge difference.\n\nWe're a Cambridge led group, based in SG, and have a prototype, but this is in no way a sales call.\n\nIf you could just email or WhatsApp an AI assistant your export documents and get back audit-ready reconciliation of your shipment documents in Excel, would that be useful?\n\nWould you be open to a quick chat to point us in the right direction?\n\nBest,\nSeth\n\nP.S. Happy to drop by your office at Innovate 360 if that's easier!",
          "hook_used": "Awards",
          "value_line": "just email or WhatsApp an AI assistant your export documents and get back audit-ready reconciliation of your shipment documents in Excel",
          "value_line_source": "document_pain_analysis"
        },
        "linkedin_message": {
          "message": "Seth here. Saw your recognition for DBS Foundation-NEA Hungry for Change Challenge (Winner) - figured you'd have perspective on this. Emailed you about our idea for a WhatsApp AI assistant that does back office work around the clock - sending a voice note too in case it missed you!",
          "hook_used": "Awards",
          "generated": true
        },
        "voice_note": {
          "script": "Hi Varden, I'm building an AI startup in Singapore focused on automating heavy back-office paperwork - a gap recently highlighted to us by government leaders in Smart Nation.\n\nWe're a Cambridge-led team with a working prototype, and I'd love 20 minutes of your time to ensure we're solving the right pain points for firms like The Moonbeam Co..\n\nThis isn't a sales call - just looking for your perspective.\n\nHappy to buy you lunch near your office at Innovate 360 as a thank you. Would you be open to a quick chat?",
          "location_used": "Innovate 360",
          "generated": true
        }
      },

          "body": "Hi Wing Yun,We're building an AI assistant that's always one step ahead for SG food traders.It proactively checks in - running daily reconciliation of supplier invoices against purchase orders, tracking missing health certificates and sending follow-ups, or giving you morning updates on export documents awaiting approval - all without you having to ask.You just WhatsApp or email it instructions and it does your back office work around the clock.We're a Cambridge-backed group with a working prototype to demo, but this isn't a sales call.         "email_1": {
          "subject": "quick question on food",
          "body": "Hi Mitsuhiro,\n\nWe're building an AI assistant that's always one step ahead for SG food processors.\n\nIt proactively checks in - running daily reconciliation of Commercial Invoices against Packing Lists, tracking missing Health Certificates for shipments and sending follow-ups, or giving you morning updates on export documents awaiting approval - all without you having to ask.\n\nYou just WhatsApp or email it instructions and it does your back office work around the clock.\n\nWe're a Cambridge-backed group with a working prototype to demo, but this isn't a sales call. We're trying to learn what food teams actually find useful, what pain points keep coming up, and how you're thinking about future-proofing the business. 30 minutes of your time would make a big difference.\n\nI know you're busy, so let me know what time is best for a call or I can drop by your office at Guoco Midtown if that's easier!\n\nBest,\nSeth\n\nP.S. Before our call, I can train our AI on your export documents so you can see exactly what we'd catch for Suntory Beverage & Food Asia.",
          "ps_used": "Generic P.S. for export documents (fallback as no specific signal found)"
        },
        "email_2": {
          "subject": "Mitsuhiro <> Seth",
          "body": "Hi Mitsuhiro,\n\nI did some digging into Suntory Beverage & Food Asia and had a few ideas on where we could save time:\n\n- Extract 99% accurate data from diverse export documents for TradeNet submission.\n- Flag discrepancies across Commercial Invoices, Packing Lists, and COOs for Suntory.\n- Generate audit-ready Health Certificate applications consistent with shipment details.\n\nHave you solved for export documentation prep or is your team still doing it manually?\n\nIf we could help you do the same and save 10+ hours a week, automatically from WhatsApp, email or any chat app you already use, would that be interesting?\n\nBest,\nSeth",
          "ideas_used": [
            "Extract 99% accurate data from diverse export documents for TradeNet submission.",
            "Flag discrepancies across Commercial Invoices, Packing Lists, and COOs for Suntory.",
            "Generate audit-ready Health Certificate applications consistent with shipment details."
          ]
        },
        "email_3": {
          "subject": "Re: quick question on food",
          "body": "Hi Mitsuhiro,\n\nMy co-founder and I are building a startup in Singapore to support local businesses and we wanted to reach out because your expertise could save us a ton of mistakes.\n\nGiven your experience in food, I was hoping to get your opinion.\n\nFor some background, we spoke with senior government leaders last week at Smart Nation - they shared that SMEs in underserved areas stand to gain the most from AI compared to MNCs.\n\nWe're now looking to figure out which are the biggest pain points food trading companies face and 30 minutes of your time would make a huge difference.\n\nWe're a Cambridge led group, based in SG, and have a prototype, but this is in no way a sales call.\n\nIf you could just email or WhatsApp an AI assistant your export documents and get back audit-ready reconciliation of all shipment data in Excel, would that be useful?\n\nWould you be open to a quick chat to point us in the right direction?\n\nBest,\nSeth\n\nP.S. Happy to drop by your office at Guoco Midtown if that's easier!",
          "hook_used": "Fallback (no specific signal found): Given your experience in {industry_short}",
          "value_line": "If you could just email or WhatsApp an AI assistant your export documents and get back audit-ready reconciliation of all shipment data in Excel, would that be useful?",

          "body": "Hi John,\n\nWe're building an AI assistant that's always one step ahead for SG food processors.\n\nIt proactively checks in - running daily reconciliations of Commercial Invoices and Packing Lists, tracking missing COO or Health Certificates and sending follow-ups, or giving you morning updates on export documents awaiting approval - all without you having to ask.\n\nYou just WhatsApp or email it instructions and it does your back office work around the clock.\n\nWe're a Cambridge-backed group with a working prototype to demo, but this isn't a sales call.           "body": "Hi John,\n\nI did some digging into QAF Limited and had a few ideas on where we could save time:\n\n- Extract 99% accurate data from QAF's multi-country Commercial Invoices and Packing Lists.\n- Flag discrepancies across all shipment documents that humans miss to prevent customs delays.\n- Generate complete, ready-to-submit COO and Health Cert applications for various export markets.\n\nHave you solved for export documentation prep or is your team still doing it manually?\n\nIf we could help you do the same and save 10+ hours a week, automatically from WhatsApp, email or any chat app you already use, would that be interesting?\n\nBest,\nSeth\n\nP.S. Before the call, I can train our AI on your export docs for different markets so you can see how it handles multiple compliance requirements for QAF Limited.",

        "email_3": {
          "subject": "Re: quick question on Food Processor",
          "body": "Hi John,\n\nMy co-founder and I are building a startup in Singapore to support local businesses and we wanted to reach out because your expertise could save us a ton of mistakes.\n\nGiven your experience in food, I was hoping to get your opinion.\n\nFor some background, we spoke with senior government leaders last week at Smart Nation - they shared that SMEs in underserved areas stand to gain the most from AI compared to MNCs.\n\nWe're now looking to figure out which are the biggest pain points food trading companies face and 30 minutes of your time would make a huge difference.\n\nWe're a Cambridge led group, based in SG, and have a prototype, but this is in no way a sales call.\n\nIf you could just email or WhatsApp an AI assistant your Commercial Invoices, Packing Lists, COO, and Health Certificates and get back an audit-ready reconciliation in Excel showing consistent data across your entire export document set, would that be useful?\n\nWould you be open to a quick chat to point us in the right direction?\n\nBest,\nSeth\n\nP.S.           "body": "Hi David,\n\nI did some digging into Shrimp Improvement Systems and had a few ideas on where we could save time:\n\n- Generate complete, consistent export document sets for your broodstock shipments.\n- Flag inconsistencies across Health Certificates and Commercial Invoices.\n- Extract 99% accurate data from supplier invoices for better tracking.\n\nHave you solved for export documentation prep or is your team still doing it manually?\n\nIf we could help you do the same and save 10+ hours a week, automatically from WhatsApp, email or any chat app you already use, would that be interesting?\n\nBest,\nSeth",

\u0434\u043b\u044f \u0434\u0435\u043c\u043e\u043d\u0441\u0442\u0440\u0430\u0446\u0438\u0438, \u043d\u043e \u044d\u0442\u043e \u043d\u0435 \u043f\u0438\u0449\u0435\u0432\u043e\u0439 \u043e\u0442\u0440\u0430\u0441\u043b\u0438, \u043a\u0430\u043a\u0438\u0435 \u043f\u0440\u043e\u0431\u043b\u0435\u043c\u044b \u043f\u043e\u0441\u0442\u043e\u044f\u043d\u043d\u043e \u0432\u043e\u0437\u043d\u0438\u043a\u0430\u044e\u0442 \u0438 \u043a\u0430\u043a \u0432\u044b \u043f\u043b\u0430\u043d\u0438\u0440\u0443\u0435\u0442\u0435 \u043e\u0431\u0435\u0441\u043f\u0435\u0447\u0438\u0442\u044c \u0431\u0443\u0434\u0443\u0449\u0435\u0435 \u0441\u0432\u043e\u0435\u0433\u043e \u0431\u0438\u0437\u043d\u0435\u0441\u0430. 30 \u043c\u0438\u043d\u0443\u0442 \u0432\u0430\u0448\u0435\u0433\u043e \u0432\u0440\u0435\u043c\u0435\u043d\u0438 \u0438\u043c\u0435\u043b\u0438 \u0431\u044b \u043e\u0433\u0440\u043e\u043c\u043d\u043e\u0435 \u0437\u043d\u0430\u0447\u0435\u043d\u0438\u0435. \u042f \u0437\u043d\u0430\u044e, \u0447\u0442\u043e \u0432\u044b \u0437\u0430\u043d\u044f\u0442\u044b, \u043f\u043e\u044d\u0442\u043e\u043c\u0443 \u0434\u0430\u0439\u0442\u0435 \u043c\u043d\u0435 \u0437\u043d\u0430\u0442\u044c, \u043a\u0430\u043a\u043e\u0435 \u0432\u0440\u0435\u043c\u044f \u0434\u043b\u044f \u0437\u0432\u043e\u043d\u043a\u0430 \u0432\u0430\u043c \u0443\u0434\u043e\u0431\u043d\u0435\u0435, \u0438\u043b\u0438 \u044f \u043c\u043e\u0433\u0443 \u0437\u0430\u0435\u0445\u0430\u0442\u044c \u0432 \u0432\u0430\u0448 \u043e\u0444\u0438\u0441 \u0432 Tradehub 21, \u0435\u0441\u043b\u0438 \u0442\u0430\u043a \u0431\u0443\u0434\u0435\u0442 \u043f\u0440\u043e\u0449\u0435! Best, Seth P.S. \u041f\u0435\u0440\u0435\u0434 \u043d\u0430\u0448\u0438\u043c \u0437\u0432\u043e\u043d\u043a\u043e\u043c \u044f \u043c\u043e\u0433\u0443 \u043e\u0431\u0443\u0447\u0438\u0442\u044c \u043d\u0430\u0448 \u0418\u0418 \u0440\u0430\u0431\u043e\u0442\u0430\u0442\u044c \u0441 \u0432\u0430\u0448\u0438\u043c\u0438 \u0437\u0430\u044f\u0432\u043a\u0430\u043c\u0438 \u043d\u0430 \u0441\u0430\u043d\u0438\u0442\u0430\u0440\u043d\u044b\u0435 \u0441\u0435\u0440\u0442\u0438\u0444\u0438\u043a\u0430\u0442\u044b, \u0447\u0442\u043e\u0431\u044b \u0432\u044b \u0443\u0432\u0438\u0434\u0435\u043b\u0438, \u043a\u0430\u043a \u0438\u043c\u0435\u043d\u043d\u043e \u043e\u043d \u043e\u0431\u0440\u0430\u0431\u0430\u0442\u044b\u0432\u0430\u0435\u0442 \u044d\u043a\u0441\u043f\u043e\u0440\u0442\u043d\u044b\u0435 \u0434\u043e\u043a\u0443\u043c\u0435\u043d\u0442\u044b \u043d\u0430 \u043c\u043e\u0440\u0435\u043f\u0440\u043e\u0434\u0443\u043a\u0442\u044b \u0434\u043b\u044f Kibun Foods Singapore.",
          "ps_used": "Seafood exporter"
        },
        "email_2": {
          "subject": "Tatsuya <> Seth",
          "body": "Hi Tatsuya, I did some digging into Kibun Foods Singapore and had a few ideas on where we could save time: - Extract 99% accurate data from Kibun's purchase orders and test reports. - Generate complete, consistent Commercial Invoices and Packing Lists for exports. - Flag discrepancies across health certificates and bills of lading before submission. Have you solved for export documentation prep or is your team still doing it manually? If we could help you do the same and save 10+ hours a week, automatically from WhatsApp, email or any chat app you already use, would that be interesting? Best, Seth",
          "ideas_used": [
            "Extract 99% accurate data from Kibun's purchase orders and test reports.",
            "Generate complete, consistent Commercial Invoices and Packing Lists for exports.",
            "Flag discrepancies across health certificates and bills of lading before submission."
          ]
        },
        "email_3": {
          "subject": "Re: quick question on food",
          "body": "Hi Tatsuya, My co-founder and I are building a startup in Singapore to support local businesses and we wanted to reach out because your expertise could save us a ton of mistakes. Given your experience in food, I was hoping to get your opinion. For some background, we spoke with senior government leaders last week at Smart Nation - they shared that SMEs in underserved areas stand to gain the most from AI compared to MNCs. We're now looking to figure out which are the biggest pain points food trading companies face and 30 minutes of your time would make a huge difference. We're a Cambridge led group, based in SG, and have a prototype, but this is in no way a sales call. If you could just email or WhatsApp an AI assistant your export documents and get back audit-ready reconciliation in Excel showing consistency across all your shipment documents, would that be useful? Would you be open to a quick chat to point us in the right direction? Best, Seth P.S. Happy to drop by your office at Tradehub 21 if that's easier!",
          "hook_used": "Fallback",
          "value_line": "just email or WhatsApp an AI assistant your export documents and get back audit-ready reconciliation in Excel showing consistency across all your shipment documents",
          "value_line_source": "document_pain_analysis"
        },
        "linkedin_message": {
          "message": "N/A",
          "hook_used": "none",
          "generated": false
        },
        "voice_note": {
          "script": "N/A",
          "location_used": "none",
          "generated": false
        }

      "stage1_result": {
        "company_name": "Cuisine Service",
        "contact_name": "Julien Bompard",
        "contact_email": "julien@cuisineservice.com.sg",
        "email_1": {
          "subject": "quick question on food",
          "body": "Hi Julien,\n\nWe're building an AI assistant that's always one step ahead for SG food processors.\n\nIt proactively checks in - running daily inventory reconciliations, tracking missing batch records and sending follow-ups, or giving you morning updates on production orders awaiting approval - all without you having to ask.\n\nYou just WhatsApp or email it instructions and it does your back office work around the clock.\n\nWe're a Cambridge-backed group with a working prototype to demo, but this isn't a sales call. We're trying to learn what food processing teams actually find useful, what pain points keep coming up, and how you're thinking about future-proofing the business. 30 minutes of your time would make a big difference.\n\nI know you're busy, so let me know what time is best for a call or I can drop by your office at Kampong Ampat if that's easier!\n\nBest,\nSeth\n\nP.S. Before our call, I can train our AI on your production orders so you can see exactly what we'd catch for Cuisine Service.",
          "ps_used": "train AI on production orders for Cuisine Service"
        },
        "email_2": {
          "subject": "Julien <> Seth",
          "body": "Hi Julien,\n\nI did some digging into Cuisine Service and had a few ideas on where we could save time:\n\n- Extract 99% accurate data from client production orders for inventory.\n- Flag discrepancies in batch records and recipe specifications.\n- Generate complete, ready to review QA/HACCP compliance reports.\n\nHave you solved for export documentation prep or is your team still doing it manually?\n\nIf we could help you do the same and save 10+ hours a week, automatically from WhatsApp, email or any chat app you already use, would that be interesting?\n\nBest,\nSeth",
          "ideas_used": [
            "Extract 99% accurate data from client production orders for inventory.",
            "Flag discrepancies in batch records and recipe specifications.",
            "Generate complete, ready to review QA/HACCP compliance reports."
          ]
        },
        "email_3": {
          "subject": "Re: quick question on food",
          "body": "Hi Julien,\n\nMy co-founder and I are building a startup in Singapore to support local businesses and we wanted to reach out because your expertise could save us a ton of mistakes.\n\nGiven your 33+ years in the industry, I was hoping to get your opinion.\n\nFor some background, we spoke with senior government leaders last week at Smart Nation - they shared that SMEs in underserved areas stand to gain the most from AI compared to MNCs.\n\nWe're now looking to figure out which are the biggest pain points food trading companies face and 30 minutes of your time would make a huge difference.\n\nWe're a Cambridge led group, based in SG, and have a prototype, but this is in no way a sales call.\n\nIf you could just email or WhatsApp an AI assistant your production orders, batch records, and QA reports and get back audit-ready inventory reconciliations in Excel, would that be useful?\n\nWould you be open to a quick chat to point us in the right direction?\n\nBest,\nSeth\n\nP.S. Happy to drop by your office at Kampong Ampat if that's easier!",
          "hook_used": "10+ years",
          "value_line": "If you could just email or WhatsApp an AI assistant your production orders, batch records, and QA reports and get back audit-ready inventory reconciliations in Excel, would that be useful?",
          "value_line_source": "document_pain_analysis"
        },
        "linkedin_message": {
          "message": "Seth here. Given your experience leading Cuisine Service, I was hoping to get your opinion. Emailed you about our idea for a WhatsApp AI assistant that does back office work around the clock - sending a voice note too in case it missed you!",
          "hook_used": "C-suite",
          "generated": true
        },
        "voice_note": {
          "script": "Hi Julien, I'm building an AI startup in Singapore focused on automating heavy back-office paperwork - a gap recently highlighted to us by government leaders in Smart Nation.\nWe're a Cambridge-led team with a working prototype, and I'd love 20 minutes of your time to ensure we're solving the right pain points for firms like Cuisine Service.\nThis isn't a sales call - just looking for your perspective.\nHappy to buy you lunch near your office at Kampong Ampat as a thank you.         "email_2": {
          "subject": "Lara <> Seth",
          "body": "Hi Lara,\n\nI did some digging into Jacobs Douwe Egberts Hld Scp Sg and had a few ideas on where we could save time:\n\n- Extract 99% accurate data from JDE's purchase orders and supplier invoices for faster processing.\n- Get audit-ready reconciliation of export shipment documents, catching what humans miss.\n- Generate complete Commercial Invoices and Packing Lists in minutes, ready for submission.\n\nHave you solved for export documentation prep or is your team still doing it manually?\n\nIf we could help you do the same and save 10+ hours a week, automatically from WhatsApp, email or any chat app you already use, would that be interesting?\n\nBest,\nSeth",
          "ideas_used": [
            "Extract 99% accurate data from JDE's purchase orders and supplier invoices for faster processing.",
            "Get audit-ready reconciliation of export shipment documents, catching what humans miss.",
            "Generate complete Commercial Invoices and Packing Lists in minutes, ready for submission."
          ]
        },
        "email_3": {
          "subject": "Re: quick question on food",
          "body": "Hi Lara,\n\nMy co-founder and I are building a startup in Singapore to support local businesses and we wanted to reach out because your expertise could save us a ton of mistakes.\n\nNoticed you're hiring for an Export Manager - figured you'd have perspective on where the bottlenecks are.\n\nFor some background, we spoke with senior government leaders last week at Smart Nation - they shared that SMEs in underserved areas stand to gain the most from AI compared to MNCs.\n\nWe're now looking to figure out which are the biggest pain points food trading companies face and 30 minutes of your time would make a huge difference.\n\nWe're a Cambridge led group, based in SG, and have a prototype, but this is in no way a sales call.\n\nIf you could just email or WhatsApp an AI assistant your export documents and get back audit-ready reconciliation of your export shipments in Excel, would that be useful?\n\nWould you be open to a quick chat to point us in the right direction?\n\nBest,\nSeth\n\nP.S. Happy to drop by your office if that's easier!",
          "hook_used": "Hiring",
          "value_line": "If you could just email or WhatsApp an AI assistant your export documents and get back audit-ready reconciliation of your export shipments in Excel, would that be useful?",
          "value_line_source": "document_pain_analysis"
        },
        "linkedin_message": {
          "message": "N/A",
          "hook_used": "none",
          "generated": false

        "contact_name": "Catherine Chang",
        "contact_email": "cchang@freshdelmonte.com",
        "email_1": {
          "subject": "quick question on Food Trader",
          "body": "Hi Catherine,\n\nWe're building an AI assistant that's always one step ahead for SG food traders.\n\nIt proactively checks in - running daily reconciliation of shipment documents against invoices, tracking missing regulatory approvals and sending follow-ups, or giving you morning updates on critical export deadlines - all without you having to ask.\n\nYou just WhatsApp or email it instructions and it does your back office work around the clock.\n\nWe're a Cambridge-backed group with a working prototype to demo, but this isn't a sales call. We're trying to learn what food trading teams actually find useful, what pain points keep coming up, and how you're thinking about future-proofing the business. 30 minutes of your time would make a big difference.\n\nI know you're busy, so let me know what time is best for a call or I can drop by your office at Parkview Square if that's easier!\n\nBest,\nSeth\n\nP.S. Before our call, I can train our AI on your export documents so you can see exactly what we'd catch for Del Monte Asia.",
          "ps_used": "Generic"
        },
        "email_2": {
          "subject": "Catherine <> Seth",
          "body": "Hi Catherine,\n\nI did some digging into Del Monte Asia and had a few ideas on where we could save time:\n\n- Generate audit-ready Commercial Invoices and Packing Lists for Del Monte Asia\u2019s shipments.\n- Extract 99% accurate data from supplier invoices for smooth TradeNet CCP submissions.\n- Flag inconsistencies that humans miss across all cross-border regulatory documents.\n\nHave you solved for export documentation prep or is your team still doing it manually?\n\nIf we could help you do the same and save 10+ hours a week, automatically from WhatsApp, email or any chat app you already use, would that be interesting?\n\nBest,\nSeth",
          "ideas_used": [
            "Generate audit-ready Commercial Invoices and Packing Lists for Del Monte Asia\u2019s shipments.",
            "Extract 99% accurate data from supplier invoices for smooth TradeNet CCP submissions.",
            "Flag inconsistencies that humans miss across all cross-border regulatory documents."

        },
        "email_3": {
          "subject": "Re: quick question on Food Trader",
          "body": "Hi Catherine,\n\nMy co-founder and I are building a startup in Singapore to support local businesses and we wanted to reach out because your expertise could save us a ton of mistakes.\n\nGiven your experience in food, I was hoping to get your opinion.\n\nFor some background, we spoke with senior government leaders last week at Smart Nation - they shared that SMEs in underserved areas stand to gain the most from AI compared to MNCs.\n\nWe're now looking to figure out which are the biggest pain points food trading companies face and 30 minutes of your time would make a huge difference.\n\nWe're a Cambridge led group, based in SG, and have a prototype, but this is in no way a sales call.\n\nIf you could just email or WhatsApp an AI assistant your export documents and get back audit-ready reconciliation of all your cross-border shipment documents in Excel, would that be useful?\n\nWould you be open to a quick chat to point us in the right direction?\n\nBest,\nSeth\n\nP.S. Happy to drop by your office at Parkview Square if that's easier!",

          "body": "Hi Sheng Hua,\n\nI did some digging into Growthwell Foods and had a few ideas on where we could save time:\n\n- Extract 99% accurate data from diverse supplier invoices for Growthwell Foods.\n- Generate audit-ready Commercial Invoices, Packing Lists, and COOs in minutes.\n- Flag inconsistencies across your Health Cert applications and Bill of Lading.\n\nHave you solved for export documentation prep or is your team still doing it manually?\n\nIf we could help you do the same and save 10+ hours a week, automatically from WhatsApp, email or any chat app you already use, would that be interesting?\n\nBest,\nSeth",
          "ideas_used": [
            "Extract 99% accurate data from diverse supplier invoices for Growthwell Foods.",
            "Generate audit-ready Commercial Invoices, Packing Lists, and COOs in minutes.",
            "Flag inconsistencies across your Health Cert applications and Bill of Lading."
          ]
        },
        "email_3": {
          "subject": "Re: quick question on food",
          "body": "Hi Sheng Hua,\n\nMy co-founder and I are building a startup in Singapore to support local businesses and we wanted to reach out because your expertise could save us a ton of mistakes.\n\nGiven your experience in food, I was hoping to get your opinion.\n\nFor some background, we spoke with senior government leaders last week at Smart Nation - they shared that SMEs in underserved areas stand to gain the most from AI compared to MNCs.\n\nWe're now looking to figure out which are the biggest pain points food trading companies face and 30 minutes of your time would make a huge difference.\n\nWe're a Cambridge led group, based in SG, and have a prototype, but this is in no way a sales call.\n\nIf you could just email or WhatsApp an AI assistant your Commercial Invoices and Packing Lists and get back an audit-ready reconciliation in Excel, would that be useful?\n\nWould you be open to a quick chat to point us in the right direction?\n\nBest,\nSeth\n\nP.S. Happy to drop by your office at Tai Seng if that's easier!",
          "hook_used": "Fallback",
          "value_line": "If you could just email or WhatsApp an AI assistant your Commercial Invoices and Packing Lists and get back an audit-ready reconciliation in Excel, would that be useful?",
          "value_line_source": "document_pain_analysis and company_profile"
        },

        "email_1": {
          "subject": "quick question on food",
          "body": "Hi Joon Hong,\n\nWe're building an AI assistant that's always one step ahead for SG food processors.\n\nIt proactively checks in - running daily reconciliation of export documents against shipment details, tracking pending health certificates and sending follow-up reminders, or giving you morning updates on document consistency checks - all without you having to ask.\n\nYou just WhatsApp or email it instructions and it does your back office work around the clock.\n\nWe're a Cambridge-backed group with a working prototype to demo, but this isn't a sales call.           "ps_used": "Before the call, I can train our AI on your export documents so you can see exactly what we'd catch for Food Empire Holdings."
        },
        "email_2": {
          "subject": "Joon Hong <> Seth",
          "body": "Hi Joon Hong,\n\nI did some digging into Food Empire Holdings and had a few ideas on where we could save time:\n\n- Generate audit-ready Commercial Invoices and Packing Lists in minutes for Food Empire.\n- Flag inconsistencies across all export documents before submission to avoid delays.\n- Extract 99% accurate data from supplier invoices for faster trade portal submissions.\n\nHave you solved for export documentation prep or is your team still doing it manually?\n\nIf we could help you do the same and save 10+ hours a week, automatically from WhatsApp, email or any chat app you already use, would that be interesting?\n\nBest,\nSeth",

          "subject": "quick question on food",
          "body": "Hi Siok May,\n\nWe're building an AI assistant that's always one step ahead for SG food processors.\n\nIt proactively checks in - running daily reconciliation of supplier invoices against purchase orders, tracking missing health certificates and sending follow-ups, or giving you morning updates on export documents awaiting SFA submission - all without you having to ask.\n\nYou just WhatsApp or email it instructions and it does your back office work around the clock.\n\nWe're a Cambridge-backed group with a working prototype to demo, but this isn't a sales call.           "subject": "Siok May <> Seth",
          "body": "Hi Siok May,\n\nI did some digging into TSM Food Services and had a few ideas on where we could save time:\n\n- Extract 99% accurate data from TSM Food Services' supplier invoices for faster processing.\n- Generate complete, ready-to-review Health Certificates and COOs for SFA submissions.\n- Flag discrepancies across your Bill of Ladings and Packing Lists before customs submission.\n\nHave you solved for export documentation prep or is your team still doing it manually?\n\nIf we could help you do the same and save 10+ hours a week, automatically from WhatsApp, email or any chat app you already use, would that be interesting?\n\nBest,\nSeth",

        "email_1": {
          "subject": "quick question on food trading",
          "body": "Hi Kian Boon Daniel, We're building an AI assistant that's always one step ahead for SG food traders. We're trying to learn what food trading teams actually find useful, what pain points keep coming up, and how you're thinking about future-proofing the business. 30 minutes of your time would make a big difference. Before our call, I can train our AI on your export documents so you can see exactly what we'd catch for Khong Guan Development.",
          "ps_used": "Generic option from Email 2 P.S. Options: Before the call, I can train our AI on your export documents so you can see exactly how it works for {company_name}."
        },
        "email_2": {
          "subject": "Kian Boon Daniel <> Seth",
          "body": "Hi Kian Boon Daniel, I did some digging into Khong Guan Development and had a few ideas on where we could save time: - Extract 99% accurate data from your Purchase Orders and supplier invoices. - Flag inconsistencies that humans miss across all your shipment documents. - Generate audit-ready COO and Health Cert applications in minutes. Have you solved for export documentation prep or is your team still doing it manually? If we could help you do the same and save 10+ hours a week, automatically from WhatsApp, email or any chat app you already use, would that be interesting? Best, Seth",

            "Extract 99% accurate data from your Purchase Orders and supplier invoices.",
            "Flag inconsistencies that humans miss across all your shipment documents.",
            "Generate audit-ready COO and Health Cert applications in minutes."

        "email_3": {
          "subject": "Re: quick question on food trading",
          "body": "Hi Kian Boon Daniel, My co-founder and I are building a startup in Singapore to support local businesses and we wanted to reach out because your expertise could save us a ton of mistakes. Given your experience in food, I was hoping to get your opinion. For some background, we spoke with senior government leaders last week at Smart Nation - they shared that SMEs in underserved areas stand to gain the most from AI compared to MNCs.
