    "425": {
      "company_name": "425",
      "stage1_status": "completed",
      "stage2_status": "pending",
      "stage1_result": {
        "company_name": "IRVINS",
        "contact_name": "Ivan Gunawan",
        "contact_email": "ivan@irvinsaltedegg.com",
        "email_1": {
          "subject": "quick question on food",
          "body": "Hi Ivan,\n\nWe're building an AI assistant that's always one step ahead for SG food processors.\n\nIt proactively checks in - running daily reconciliations of international sales documents, tracking pending Health Cert or COO applications and sending follow-ups, or giving you morning updates on inconsistent product codes or HS codes in your export documents - all without you having to ask.\n\nYou just WhatsApp or email it instructions and it does your back office work around the clock.\n\nWe're a Cambridge-backed group with a working prototype to demo, but this isn't a sales call. We're trying to learn what food teams actually find useful, what pain points keep coming up, and how you're thinking about future-proofing the business. 30 minutes of your time would make a big difference.\n\nI know you're busy, so let me know what time is best for a call or I can drop by your office at Tagore Industrial Avenue if that's easier!\n\nBest,\nSeth",
          "ps_used": "Happy to drop by your office at Tagore Industrial Avenue if that's easier!"
        },
        "email_2": {
          "subject": "Ivan <> Seth",
          "body": "Hi Ivan,\n\nI did some digging into IRVINS and had a few ideas on where we could save time:\n\n- Get audit-ready reconciliation of inbound ingredient invoices to ensure cost accuracy for IRVINS.\n- Generate 99% accurate Commercial Invoices and Packing Lists from shipment data.\n- Flag inconsistent HS codes or quantities across your export documents to prevent customs delays.\n\nHave you solved for export documentation prep or is your team still doing it manually?\n\nIf we could help you do the same and save 10+ hours a week, automatically from WhatsApp, email or any chat app you already use, would that be interesting?\n\nBest,\nSeth",
          "ideas_used": [
            "Get audit-ready reconciliation of inbound ingredient invoices to ensure cost accuracy for IRVINS.",
            "Generate 99% accurate Commercial Invoices and Packing Lists from shipment data.",
            "Flag inconsistent HS codes or quantities across your export documents to prevent customs delays."
          ]
        },
        "email_3": {
          "subject": "Re: quick question on food",
          "body": "Hi Ivan,\n\nMy co-founder and I are building a startup in Singapore to support local businesses and we wanted to reach out because your expertise could save us a ton of mistakes.\n\nGiven your experience in food, I was hoping to get your opinion.\n\nFor some background, we spoke with senior government leaders last week at Smart Nation - they shared that SMEs in underserved areas stand to gain the most from AI compared to MNCs.\n\nWe're now looking to figure out which are the biggest pain points food trading companies face and 30 minutes of your time would make a huge difference.\n\nWe're a Cambridge led group, based in SG, and have a prototype, but this is in no way a sales call.\n\nIf you could just email or WhatsApp an AI assistant your export documents and compliance certificates and get back audit-ready reports in Excel that catch what humans miss, would that be useful?\n\nWould you be open to a quick chat to point us in the right direction?\n\nBest,\nSeth\n\nP.S. Happy to drop by your office at Tagore Industrial Avenue if that's easier!",
          "hook_used": "C-suite",
          "value_line": "just email or WhatsApp an AI assistant your export documents and compliance certificates and get back audit-ready reports in Excel that catch what humans miss",
          "value_line_source": "document_pain_analysis, company_profile"
        },
        "linkedin_message": {
          "message": "Seth here. Given your experience leading IRVINS, I was hoping to get your opinion. Emailed you about our idea for a WhatsApp AI assistant that does back office work around the clock - sending a voice note too in case it missed you!",
          "hook_used": "C-suite",
          "generated": true
        },
        "voice_note": {
          "script": "Hi Ivan, I'm building an AI startup in Singapore focused on automating heavy back-office paperwork - a gap recently highlighted to us by government leaders in Smart Nation.\n\nWe're a Cambridge-led team with a working prototype, and I'd love 20 minutes of your time to ensure we're solving the right pain points for firms like IRVINS.\n\nThis isn't a sales call - just looking for your perspective.\n\nHappy to buy you lunch near your office at Tagore Industrial Avenue as a thank you. Would you be open to a quick chat?",
          "location_used": "Tagore Industrial Avenue",
          "generated": true
        }
      },

          "subject": "quick question on food",
          "body": "Hi Andrian,\n\nWe're building an AI assistant that's always one step ahead for SG food supply chain companies.\n\nIt proactively checks in - running daily reconciliation of supplier invoices against purchase orders, tracking missing delivery notes and sending automated follow-ups, or giving you morning updates on critical product certifications - all without you having to ask.\n\nYou just WhatsApp or email it instructions and it does your back office work around the clock.\n\nWe're a Cambridge-backed group with a working prototype to demo, but this isn't a sales call.           "ps_used": "train AI on their docs"
        },
        "email_2": {
          "subject": "Andrian <> Seth",
          "body": "Hi Andrian,\n\nI did some digging into Farmio and had a few ideas on where we could save time:\n\n- Extract 99% accurate data from diverse supplier invoices for faster processing.\n- Get audit-ready reconciliation of purchase orders against incoming delivery notes.\n- Automate generation of error-free packing lists and delivery notes for every shipment.\n\nHave you solved for export documentation prep or is your team still doing it manually?\n\nIf we could help you do the same and save 10+ hours a week, automatically from WhatsApp, email or any chat app you already use, would that be interesting?\n\nBest,\nSeth",
          "ideas_used": [
            "Extract 99% accurate data from diverse supplier invoices for faster processing.",
            "Get audit-ready reconciliation of purchase orders against incoming delivery notes.",
            "Automate generation of error-free packing lists and delivery notes for every shipment."

        },
        "email_3": {
          "subject": "Re: quick question on food",
          "body": "Hi Andrian,\n\nMy co-founder and I are building a startup in Singapore to support local businesses and we wanted to reach out because your expertise could save us a ton of mistakes.\n\nGiven your experience in food, I was hoping to get your opinion.\n\nFor some background, we spoke with senior government leaders last week at Smart Nation - they shared that SMEs in underserved areas stand to gain the most from AI compared to MNCs.\n\nWe're now looking to figure out which are the biggest pain points food trading companies face and 30 minutes of your time would make a huge difference.\n\nWe're a Cambridge led group, based in SG, and have a prototype, but this is in no way a sales call.\n\nIf you could just email or WhatsApp an AI assistant your purchase orders and invoices and get back audit-ready reconciliations in Excel, would that be useful?\n\nWould you be open to a quick chat to point us in the right direction?\n\nBest,\nSeth\n\nP.S.           "body": "Hi Sze Wee,\n\nMy co-founder and I are building a startup in Singapore to support local businesses and we wanted to reach out because your expertise could save us a ton of mistakes.\n\nGiven your experience in food, I was hoping to get your opinion.\n\nFor some background, we spoke with senior government leaders last week at Smart Nation - they shared that SMEs in underserved areas stand to gain the most from AI compared to MNCs.\n\nWe're now looking to figure out which are the biggest pain points food trading companies face and 30 minutes of your time would make a huge difference.\n\nWe're a Cambridge led group, based in SG, and have a prototype, but this is in no way a sales call.\n\nIf you could just email or WhatsApp an AI assistant your Health Certificates and COOs and get back an audit-ready reconciliation of all export documents in Excel, would that be useful?\n\nWould you be open to a quick chat to point us in the right direction?\n\nBest,\nSeth\n\nP.S.     "437": {
      "company_name": "437",
      "stage1_status": "completed",
      "stage2_status": "pending",
      "stage1_result": {
        "company_name": "ARIKI SEAFOOD",
        "contact_name": "Kelvin Lim",
        "contact_email": "kelvin@ariki.com.sg",
        "email_1": {
          "subject": "quick question on food wholesaling",
          "body": "Hi Kelvin,\n\nWe're building an AI assistant that's always one step ahead for SG food wholesalers.\n\nIt proactively checks in - running daily reconciliation of supplier invoices against warehouse receipts, tracking missing export certificates and sending follow-ups, or giving you morning updates on shipments awaiting final export documentation - all without you having to ask.\n\nYou just WhatsApp or email it instructions and it does your back office work around the clock.\n\nWe're a Cambridge-backed group with a working prototype to demo, but this isn't a sales call. We're trying to learn what food wholesaling teams actually find useful, what pain points keep coming up, and how you're thinking about future-proofing the business. 30 minutes of your time would make a big difference.\n\nI know you're busy, so let me know what time is best for a call or I can drop by your office at Henderson Road if that's easier!\n\nBest,\nSeth\n\nP.S. Before our call, I can train our AI on your health cert applications so you can see exactly what we'd catch for ARIKI SEAFOOD.",
          "ps_used": "Seafood exporter"
        },
        "email_2": {
          "subject": "Kelvin <> Seth",
          "body": "Hi Kelvin,\n\nI did some digging into ARIKI SEAFOOD and had a few ideas on where we could save time:\n\n- Generate consistent export documentation like COOs and health certs for ARIKI SEAFOOD.\n- Flag inconsistencies across your invoices, packing lists, and certificates before submission.\n- Prepare clean, ready-to-import data for SFA and TradeNet portal submissions.\n\nHave you solved for export documentation prep or is your team still doing it manually?\n\nIf we could help you do the same and save 10+ hours a week, automatically from WhatsApp, email or any chat app you already use, would that be interesting?\n\nBest,\nSeth",
          "ideas_used": [
            "Generate consistent export documentation like COOs and health certs for ARIKI SEAFOOD.",
            "Flag inconsistencies across your invoices, packing lists, and certificates before submission.",
            "Prepare clean, ready-to-import data for SFA and TradeNet portal submissions."
          ]
        },
        "email_3": {
          "subject": "Re: quick question on food wholesaling",
          "body": "Hi Kelvin,\n\nMy co-founder and I are building a startup in Singapore to support local businesses and we wanted to reach out because your expertise could save us a ton of mistakes.\n\nGiven your experience in food, I was hoping to get your opinion.\n\nFor some background, we spoke with senior government leaders last week at Smart Nation - they shared that SMEs in underserved areas stand to gain the most from AI compared to MNCs.\n\nWe're now looking to figure out which are the biggest pain points food trading companies face and 30 minutes of your time would make a huge difference.\n\nWe're a Cambridge led group, based in SG, and have a prototype, but this is in no way a sales call.\n\nIf you could just email or WhatsApp an AI assistant your invoices, packing lists, and certificates of origin and get back an audit-ready reconciliation showing all inconsistencies that prevent LC compliance or customs rejections, would that be useful?\n\nWould you be open to a quick chat to point us in the right direction?\n\nBest,\nSeth\n\nP.S. Happy to drop by your office at Henderson Road if that's easier!",
          "hook_used": "Fallback",
          "value_line": "just email or WhatsApp an AI assistant your invoices, packing lists, and certificates of origin and get back an audit-ready reconciliation showing all inconsistencies that prevent LC compliance or customs rejections",
          "value_line_source": "document_pain_analysis"
        },
        "linkedin_message": {
          "message": "N/A",
          "hook_used": "none",
          "generated": false

          "body": "Hi Wilson,\n\nWe're building an AI assistant that's always one step ahead for SG food trading companies.\n\nIt proactively checks in - running daily reconciliations of supplier invoices against purchase orders, tracking missing Health Certificates and sending follow-ups, or giving you morning updates on inbound shipment documents awaiting approval - all without you having to ask.\n\nYou just WhatsApp or email it instructions and it does your back office work around the clock.\n\nWe're a Cambridge-backed group with a working prototype to demo, but this isn't a sales call. We're trying to learn what food teams actually find useful, what pain points keep coming up, and how you're thinking about future-proofing the business. 30 minutes of your time would make a big difference.\n\nI know you're busy, so let me know what time is best for a call or I can drop by your office at Tampines Industrial Ave 5 if that's easier!\n\nBest,\nSeth\n\nP.S. Before our call, I can train our AI on your export documents so you can see exactly what we'd catch for Hong Lian Gim Kee.",
          "ps_used": "Value demo P.S. (generic export documents)"
        },
        "email_2": {
          "subject": "Wilson <> Seth",
          "body": "Hi Wilson,\n\nI did some digging into Hong Lian Gim Kee and had a few ideas on where we could save time:\n\n- Extract 99% accurate data from supplier invoices and import permits.\n- Flag discrepancies in quantities across Packing Lists and Commercial Invoices for Hong Lian Gim Kee.\n- Generate complete, ready-to-review Customs Declaration forms from your shipment data.\n\nHave you solved for export documentation prep or is your team still doing it manually?\n\nIf we could help you do the same and save 10+ hours a week, automatically from WhatsApp, email or any chat app you already use, would that be interesting?\n\nBest,\nSeth",
          "ideas_used": [
            "Extract 99% accurate data from supplier invoices and import permits.",
            "Flag discrepancies in quantities across Packing Lists and Commercial Invoices for Hong Lian Gim Kee.",
            "Generate complete, ready-to-review Customs Declaration forms from your shipment data."
          ]
        },
        "email_3": {
          "subject": "Re: quick question on food",
          "body": "Hi Wilson,\n\nMy co-founder and I are building a startup in Singapore to support local businesses and we wanted to reach out because your expertise could save us a ton of mistakes.\n\nGiven your experience in food, I was hoping to get your opinion.\n\nFor some background, we spoke with senior government leaders last week at Smart Nation - they shared that SMEs in underserved areas stand to gain the most from AI compared to MNCs.\n\nWe're now looking to figure out which are the biggest pain points food trading companies face and 30 minutes of your time would make a huge difference.\n\nWe're a Cambridge led group, based in SG, and have a prototype, but this is in no way a sales call.\n\nIf you could just email or WhatsApp an AI assistant your export documents and get back audit-ready reconciliations that catch what humans miss in Excel, would that be useful?\n\nWould you be open to a quick chat to point us in the right direction?\n\nBest,\nSeth\n\nP.S. Happy to drop by your office at Tampines Industrial Ave 5 if that's easier!",
          "hook_used": "Fallback (general experience)",
          "value_line": "If you could just email or WhatsApp an AI assistant your export documents and get back audit-ready reconciliations that catch what humans miss in Excel, would that be useful?",
          "value_line_source": "document_pain_analysis, company_profile"
        },
        "linkedin_message": {
          "message": "N/A",
          "hook_used": "none",
          "generated": false
        },
        "voice_note": {
          "script": "N/A",
          "location_used": "none",
          "generated": false
        }

          "body": "Hi Bandana,\n\nI did some digging into Foodedge Gourmet and had a few ideas on where we could save time:\n\n- Extract 99% accurate data from diverse supplier invoices for faster processing.\n- Flag inconsistencies across all export documents, catching what humans miss.\n- Generate audit-ready Commercial Invoices and Packing Lists automatically.\n\nHave you solved for export documentation prep or is your team still doing it manually?\n\nIf we could help you do the same and save 10+ hours a week, automatically from WhatsApp, email or any chat app you already use, would that be interesting?\n\nBest,\nSeth",
          "ideas_used": [
            "Extract 99% accurate data from diverse supplier invoices for faster processing.",
            "Flag inconsistencies across all export documents, catching what humans miss.",
            "Generate audit-ready Commercial Invoices and Packing Lists automatically."
          ]
        },
        "email_3": {
          "subject": "Re: quick question on food wholesaler",
          "body": "Hi Bandana,\n\nMy co-founder and I are building a startup in Singapore to support local businesses and we wanted to reach out because your expertise could save us a ton of mistakes.\n\nNoticed you're hiring for a Quality Control Manager - figured you'd have perspective on where the bottlenecks are.\n\nFor some background, we spoke with senior government leaders last week at Smart Nation - they shared that SMEs in underserved areas stand to gain the most from AI compared to MNCs.\n\nWe're now looking to figure out which are the biggest pain points food trading companies face and 30 minutes of your time would make a huge difference.\n\nWe're a Cambridge led group, based in SG, and have a prototype, but this is in no way a sales call.\n\nIf you could just email or WhatsApp an AI assistant your export documents and get back audit-ready, consistent export document sets in Excel, would that be useful?\n\nWould you be open to a quick chat to point us in the right direction?\n\nBest,\nSeth\n\nP.S. Happy to drop by your office at Woodlands Terrace if that's easier!",
          "hook_used": "Hiring",
          "value_line": "If you could just email or WhatsApp an AI assistant your export documents and get back audit-ready, consistent export document sets in Excel, would that be useful?",
          "value_line_source": "document_pain_analysis"
        },
        "linkedin_message": {
          "message": "Seth here. Noticed you're hiring for a Quality Control Manager - figured you'd have perspective on where the bottlenecks are. Emailed you about our idea for a WhatsApp AI assistant that does back office work around the clock - sending a voice note too in case it missed you!",
          "hook_used": "Hiring",

        "voice_note": {
          "script": "Hi Bandana, I'm building an AI startup in Singapore focused on automating heavy back-office paperwork - a gap recently highlighted to us by government leaders in Smart Nation.\n\nWe're a Cambridge-led team with a working prototype, and I'd love 20 minutes of your time to ensure we're solving the right pain points for firms like Foodedge Gourmet.\n\nThis isn't a sales call - just looking for your perspective.\n\nHappy to buy you lunch near your office at Woodlands Terrace as a thank you.           "body": "Hi Shuichi, We're building an AI assistant that's always one step ahead for SG food traders.     "458": {
      "company_name": "458",
      "stage1_status": "completed",
      "stage2_status": "pending",
      "stage1_result": {
        "company_name": "Chia Yong Joo Trading",
        "contact_name": "Alan Chia Song Wee",
        "contact_email": "alan@chiayongjoo.com.sg",
        "email_1": {
          "subject": "quick question on food wholesaling",
          "body": "Hi Alan,\n\nWe're building an AI assistant that's always one step ahead for SG food wholesalers.\n\nIt proactively checks in - running daily reconciliation of import invoices against packing lists, tracking outstanding health certificates and sending follow-up reminders, or giving you morning updates on export documents awaiting approval - all without you having to ask.\n\nYou just WhatsApp or email it instructions and it does your back office work around the clock.\n\nWe're a Cambridge-backed group with a working prototype to demo, but this isn't a sales call. We're trying to learn what food wholesaling teams actually find useful, what pain points keep coming up, and how you're thinking about future-proofing the business. 30 minutes of your time would make a big difference.\n\nI know you're busy, so let me know what time is best for a call or I can drop by your office at Pasir Panjang Wholesale Centre if that's easier!\n\nBest,\nSeth\n\nP.S. Before our call, I can train our AI on your Commercial Invoices, Packing Lists, and Health Certificates so you can see exactly what we'd catch for Chia Yong Joo Trading.",
          "ps_used": "Before our call, I can train our AI on your Commercial Invoices, Packing Lists, and Health Certificates so you can see exactly what we'd catch for Chia Yong Joo Trading."
        },
        "email_2": {
          "subject": "Alan <> Seth",
          "body": "Hi Alan,\n\nI did some digging into Chia Yong Joo Trading and had a few ideas on where we could save time:\n\n- Extract 99% accurate data from supplier invoices for TradeNet CCP submissions.\n- Generate audit-ready Commercial Invoices and Packing Lists from single data entry.\n- Flag inconsistencies in HS codes and quantities across all export documents for Chia Yong Joo Trading.\n\nHave you solved for export documentation prep or is your team still doing it manually?\n\nIf we could help you do the same and save 10+ hours a week, automatically from WhatsApp, email or any chat app you already use, would that be interesting?\n\nBest,\nSeth",
          "ideas_used": [
            "Extract 99% accurate data from supplier invoices for TradeNet CCP submissions.",
            "Generate audit-ready Commercial Invoices and Packing Lists from single data entry.",
            "Flag inconsistencies in HS codes and quantities across all export documents for Chia Yong Joo Trading."
          ]
        },
        "email_3": {
          "subject": "Re: quick question on food wholesaling",
          "body": "Hi Alan,\n\nMy co-founder and I are building a startup in Singapore to support local businesses and we wanted to reach out because your expertise could save us a ton of mistakes.\n\nGiven your experience in food, I was hoping to get your opinion.\n\nFor some background, we spoke with senior government leaders last week at Smart Nation - they shared that SMEs in underserved areas stand to gain the most from AI compared to MNCs.\n\nWe're now looking to figure out which are the biggest pain points food trading companies face and 30 minutes of your time would make a huge difference.\n\nWe're a Cambridge led group, based in SG, and have a prototype, but this is in no way a sales call.\n\nIf you could just email or WhatsApp an AI assistant your Commercial Invoices, Packing Lists, COOs, and Health Certificates and get back an audit-ready reconciliation of your shipment documents in Excel, would that be useful?\n\nWould you be open to a quick chat to point us in the right direction?\n\nBest,\nSeth\n\nP.S. Happy to drop by your office at Pasir Panjang Wholesale Centre if that's easier!",
          "hook_used": "Fallback (no specific signals)",
          "value_line": "just email or WhatsApp an AI assistant your Commercial Invoices, Packing Lists, COOs, and Health Certificates and get back an audit-ready reconciliation of your shipment documents in Excel",
          "value_line_source": "document_pain_analysis, company_profile"
        },
        "linkedin_message": {
          "message": "N/A",
          "hook_used": "none",
          "generated": false
        },
        "voice_note": {
          "script": "N/A",
          "location_used": "none",
          "generated": false
        }
      },

        "email_1": {
          "subject": "quick question on food",
          "body": "Hi Bob,\n\nWe're building an AI assistant that's always one step ahead for SG food processors.\n\nIt proactively checks in - running daily reconciliation of export documents against manifests, tracking missing Health Certificates and sending automated reminders, or giving you morning updates on critical export document statuses - all without you having to ask.\n\nYou just WhatsApp or email it instructions and it does your back office work around the clock.\n\nWe're a Cambridge-backed group with a working prototype to demo, but this isn't a sales call. We're trying to learn what food teams actually find useful, what pain points keep coming up, and how you're thinking about future-proofing the business. 30 minutes of your time would make a big difference.\n\nI know you're busy, so let me know what time is best for a call or I can drop by your office at Airport Boulevard if that's easier!\n\nBest,\nSeth\n\nP.S.           "ps_used": "export documents"
        },
        "email_2": {
          "subject": "Bob <> Seth",
          "body": "Hi Bob,\n\nI did some digging into SATS Airport Services and had a few ideas on where we could save time:\n\n- Automate audit-ready Commercial Invoice and Packing List generation for SATS.\n- Flag inconsistencies in Health Certs or COOs, catching what SATS' teams miss.\n- Extract 99% accurate data from AWBs for SATS' cross-system reconciliation.\n\nHave you solved for export documentation prep or is your team still doing it manually?\n\nIf we could help you do the same and save 10+ hours a week, automatically from WhatsApp, email or any chat app you already use, would that be interesting?\n\nBest,\nSeth",
          "ideas_used": [
            "Automate audit-ready Commercial Invoice and Packing List generation for SATS.",
            "Flag inconsistencies in Health Certs or COOs, catching what SATS' teams miss.",
            "Extract 99% accurate data from AWBs for SATS' cross-system reconciliation."
          ]
        },
        "email_3": {
          "subject": "Re: quick question on food",
          "body": "Hi Bob,\n\nMy co-founder and I are building a startup in Singapore to support local businesses and we wanted to reach out because your expertise could save us a ton of mistakes.\n\nNoticed you're hiring for a Regional Quality Leader, Food Solutions - figured you'd have perspective on where the bottlenecks are.\n\nFor some background, we spoke with senior government leaders last week at Smart Nation - they shared that SMEs in underserved areas stand to gain the most from AI compared to MNCs.\n\nWe're now looking to figure out which are the biggest pain points food trading companies face and 30 minutes of your time would make a huge difference.\n\nWe're a Cambridge led group, based in SG, and have a prototype, but this is in no way a sales call.\n\nIf you could just email or WhatsApp an AI assistant your export documents like Commercial Invoices and AWBs and get back an audit-ready reconciliation of all your export documents for quick submission in Excel, would that be useful?\n\nWould you be open to a quick chat to point us in the right direction?\n\nBest,\nSeth\n\nP.S. Happy to drop by your office at Airport Boulevard if that's easier!",
          "hook_used": "Hiring",
          "value_line": "just email or WhatsApp an AI assistant your export documents like Commercial Invoices and AWBs and get back an audit-ready reconciliation of all your export documents for quick submission in Excel",
          "value_line_source": "document_pain_analysis, company_profile"
        },

    "464": {
      "company_name": "464",
      "stage1_status": "completed",
      "stage2_status": "pending",
      "stage1_result": {
        "company_name": "Pom' Alliance F&V Trading Asia",
        "contact_name": "Romain Charpentier",
        "contact_email": "romain.charpentier@pom-alliance.fr",
        "email_1": {
          "subject": "quick question on food",
          "body": "Hi Romain, We're building an AI assistant that's always one step ahead for SG food companies. It proactively checks in - running daily reconciliation of commercial invoices against packing lists, tracking missing health certificates and sending follow-ups, or giving you morning updates on export documents awaiting submission - all without you having to ask. You just WhatsApp or email it instructions and it does your back office work around the clock. We're a Cambridge-backed group with a working prototype to demo, but this isn't a sales call. We're trying to learn what food teams actually find useful, what pain points keep coming up, and how you're thinking about future-proofing the business. 30 minutes of your time would make a big difference. I know you're busy, so let me know what time is best for a call or I can drop by your office if that's easier! Best, Seth P.S. Before our call, I can train our AI on your export documents so you can see exactly what we'd catch for Pom' Alliance F&V Trading Asia.",
          "ps_used": "Fixed formula: \"Before our call, I can train our AI on your [their_doc_type] so you can see exactly what we'd catch for [company].\""
        },
        "email_2": {
          "subject": "Romain <> Seth",
          "body": "Hi Romain, I did some digging into Pom' Alliance F&V Trading Asia and had a few ideas on where we could save time: - Extract 99% accurate data from diverse export documents in seconds. - Get audit-ready reconciliation across invoices, packing lists, and certificates. - Flag inconsistencies that humans miss in health cert applications for Pom' Alliance F&V Trading Asia. Have you solved for export documentation prep or is your team still doing it manually? If we could help you do the same and save 10+ hours a week, automatically from WhatsApp, email or any chat app you already use, would that be interesting? Best, Seth",
          "ideas_used": [
            "Extract 99% accurate data from diverse export documents in seconds.",
            "Get audit-ready reconciliation across invoices, packing lists, and certificates.",
            "Flag inconsistencies that humans miss in health cert applications for Pom' Alliance F&V Trading Asia."
          ]
        },
        "email_3": {
          "subject": "Re: quick question on food",
          "body": "Hi Romain, My co-founder and I are building a startup in Singapore to support local businesses and we wanted to reach out because your expertise could save us a ton of mistakes. Given your experience in food, I was hoping to get your opinion. For some background, we spoke with senior government leaders last week at Smart Nation - they shared that SMEs in underserved areas stand to gain the most from AI compared to MNCs. We're now looking to figure out which are the biggest pain points food trading companies face and 30 minutes of your time would make a huge difference. We're a Cambridge led group, based in SG, and have a prototype, but this is in no way a sales call. If you could just email or WhatsApp an AI assistant your export documents and get back an audit-ready reconciliation in Excel showing consistency across all your shipment documents, would that be useful? Would you be open to a quick chat to point us in the right direction? Best, Seth P.S. Happy to drop by your office if that's easier!",
          "hook_used": "Fallback",
          "value_line": "If you could just email or WhatsApp an AI assistant your export documents and get back an audit-ready reconciliation in Excel showing consistency across all your shipment documents, would that be useful?",
          "value_line_source": "document_pain_analysis, company_profile"

        "email_1": {
          "subject": "quick question on Food Processor",
          "body": "Hi Soong Jing,\n\nWe're building an AI assistant that's always one step ahead for SG food processors.\n\nIt proactively checks in - running daily reconciliation of supplier invoices against purchase orders, tracking pending quality control reports and sending automated follow-ups, or giving you morning updates on production batch records awaiting approval - all without you having to ask.\n\nYou just WhatsApp or email it instructions and it does your back office work around the clock.\n\nWe're a Cambridge-backed group with a working prototype to demo, but this isn't a sales call. We're trying to learn what food processor teams actually find useful, what pain points keep coming up, and how you're thinking about future-proofing the business. 30 minutes of your time would make a big difference.\n\nI know you're busy, so let me know what time is best for a call or I can drop by your office at Paya Lebar if that's easier!\n\nBest,\nSeth\n\nP.S. Before our call, I can train our AI on your export documents so you can see exactly what we'd catch for Frezfruta Jam Manufacturing.",
          "ps_used": "Generic"
        },
        "email_2": {
          "subject": "Soong Jing <> Seth",
          "body": "Hi Soong Jing,\n\nI did some digging into Frezfruta Jam Manufacturing and had a few ideas on where we could save time:\n\n- Extract 99% accurate data from supplier invoices for Frezfruta's accounting.\n- Flag inconsistencies across sales orders and delivery notes to prevent shipment errors.\n- Generate audit-ready export documents (like COO/Health Cert) in minutes.\n\nHave you solved for export documentation prep or is your team still doing it manually?\n\nIf we could help you do the same and save 10+ hours a week, automatically from WhatsApp, email or any chat app you already use, would that be interesting?\n\nBest,\nSeth",
          "ideas_used": [
            "Extract 99% accurate data from supplier invoices for Frezfruta's accounting.",
            "Flag inconsistencies across sales orders and delivery notes to prevent shipment errors.",
            "Generate audit-ready export documents (like COO/Health Cert) in minutes."
          ]
        },
        "email_3": {
          "subject": "Re: quick question on food",
          "body": "Hi Soong Jing,\n\nMy co-founder and I are building a startup in Singapore to support local businesses and we wanted to reach out because your expertise could save us a ton of mistakes.\n\nGiven your experience in food, I was hoping to get your opinion.\n\nFor some background, we spoke with senior government leaders last week at Smart Nation - they shared that SMEs in underserved areas stand to gain the most from AI compared to MNCs.\n\nWe're now looking to figure out which are the biggest pain points food trading companies face and 30 minutes of your time would make a huge difference.\n\nWe're a Cambridge led group, based in SG, and have a prototype, but this is in no way a sales call.\n\nIf you could just email or WhatsApp an AI assistant your export documents and get back an audit-ready reconciliation in Excel showing consistency across all paperwork, would that be useful?\n\nWould you be open to a quick chat to point us in the right direction?\n\nBest,\nSeth\n\nP.S. Original P.S. from Email 2 options applied here as per the template's requirement for Email 1 P.S. to reference specific docs/company for value demo before the call, while also adapting for Email 1's flow: \"Before our call, I can train our AI on your [their_doc_type] so you can see exactly what we'd catch for [company].\" here using [their_doc_type] as 'export documents' based on document_pain_analysis, and [company] as 'Fossa Chocolate'. It should be noted that the template's Email 1 P.S. instruction is a slightly modified version of the Email 2 P.S. logic, making it a "
        },
        "email_2": {
          "subject": "Jay <> Seth",
          "body": "Hi Jay,\n\nI did some digging into Fossa Chocolate and had a few ideas on where we could save time:\n\n- Extract 99% accurate data from Fossa's purchase orders and invoices.\n- Get audit-ready reconciliation of shipment details across all export documents.\n- Flag discrepancies in quantities and HS codes before submission.\n\nHave you solved for export documentation prep or is your team still doing it manually?\n\nIf we could help you do the same and save 10+ hours a week, automatically from WhatsApp, email or any chat app you already use, would that be interesting?\n\nBest,\nSeth",
          "ideas_used": [
            "Extract 99% accurate data from Fossa's purchase orders and invoices.",
            "Get audit-ready reconciliation of shipment details across all export documents.",
            "Flag discrepancies in quantities and HS codes before submission."
          ]
        },
        "email_3": {
          "subject": "Re: quick question on food",
          "body": "Hi Jay,\n\nMy co-founder and I are building a startup in Singapore to support local businesses and we wanted to reach out because your expertise could save us a ton of mistakes.\n\nNoticed Fossa Chocolate announced a new line of chocolate bars hitting shelves - figured you'd have perspective on how operations are scaling.\n\nFor some background, we spoke with senior government leaders last week at Smart Nation - they shared that SMEs in underserved areas stand to gain the most from AI compared to MNCs.\n\nWe're now looking to figure out which are the biggest pain points food trading companies face and 30 minutes of your time would make a huge difference.\n\nWe're a Cambridge led group, based in SG, and have a prototype, but this is in no way a sales call.\n\nIf you could just email or WhatsApp an AI assistant your export documents and get back audit-ready reconciliation of all shipment details in Excel, would that be useful?\n\nWould you be open to a quick chat to point us in the right direction?\n\nBest,\nSeth\n\nP.S. Happy to drop by your office at Gambas Crescent if that's easier!",
          "hook_used": "News",
          "value_line": "just email or WhatsApp an AI assistant your export documents and get back audit-ready reconciliation of all shipment details in Excel",
          "value_line_source": "document_pain_analysis + company_profile"
        },
        "linkedin_message": {
          "message": "Seth here. Noticed you're hiring for an Operations Executive - figured you'd have perspective on where the bottlenecks are. Emailed you about our idea for a WhatsApp AI assistant that does back office work around the clock - sending a voice note too in case it missed you!",
          "hook_used": "Hiring",
          "generated": true
        },
        "voice_note": {
          "script": "Hi Jay, I'm building an AI startup in Singapore focused on automating heavy back-office paperwork - a gap recently highlighted to us by government leaders in Smart Nation.\n\nWe're a Cambridge-led team with a working prototype, and I'd love 20 minutes of your time to ensure we're solving the right pain points for firms like Fossa Chocolate.\n\nThis isn't a sales call - just looking for your perspective.\n\nHappy to buy you lunch near your office at Gambas Crescent as a thank you.         "email_1": {
          "subject": "quick question on food trading",
          "body": "Hi Hitoshi,\n\nMy co-founder and I are building a startup in Singapore to support local businesses and we wanted to reach out because your expertise could save us a ton of mistakes.\n\nGiven your experience in food, I was hoping to get your opinion.\n\nFor some background, we spoke with senior government leaders last week at Smart Nation - they shared that SMEs in underserved areas stand to gain the most from AI compared to MNCs.\n\nWe're now looking to figure out which are the biggest pain points food trading companies face and 30 minutes of your time would make a huge difference.\n\nWe're a Cambridge led group, based in SG, and have a prototype, but this is in no way a sales call.\n\nIf you could just email or WhatsApp an AI assistant your Commercial Invoices, Packing Lists, COOs, and Health Certificates and get back an audit-ready reconciliation in Excel showing all inconsistencies, would that be useful?\n\nWould you be open to a quick chat to point us in the right direction?\n\nBest,\nSeth\n\nP.S. Happy to drop by your office at The Central if that's easier!",
          "ps_used": "location from research (The Central)"
        },
        "email_2": {

          "body": "Hi Hitoshi,\n\nJust wanted to check in again in case this missed your inbox.\n\nWe're building an AI assistant that's always one step ahead. It proactively checks in - giving you morning updates on pending Health Cert approvals, tracking inconsistencies across Commercial Invoices and Packing Lists, or running weekly audits on Certificate of Origin applications - all without you having to ask.\n\nCurious whether teams in food would actually use this from WhatsApp or email - would love your perspective if you have 15 mins.\n\nBest,\nSeth\n\nP.S.           "ideas_used": [

            "running weekly audits on Certificate of Origin applications"
          ]
        },

          "subject": "Hitoshi <> Seth",
          "body": "Hi Hitoshi,\n\nI did some digging into Lacto Asia and had a few ideas on where we could save time:\n\n- Get audit-ready reconciliation of all shipment documents for consistency.\n- Extract 99% accurate data from supplier invoices for faster processing.\n- Generate complete Health Certificate applications ready for SFA submission.\n\nHave you solved for export documentation prep or is your team still doing it manually?\n\nIf we could help you do the same and save 10+ hours a week, automatically from WhatsApp, email or any chat app you already use, would that be interesting?\n\nBest,\nSeth",

          "body": "Hi Boon Hua,\n\nWe're building an AI assistant that's always one step ahead for SG food processing companies.\n\nIt proactively checks in - running daily reconciliation of supplier invoices against purchase orders, tracking missing test reports and sending follow-ups to suppliers, or giving you morning updates on purchase orders awaiting approval - all without you having to ask.\n\nYou just WhatsApp or email it instructions and it does your back office work around the clock.\n\nWe're a Cambridge-backed group with a working prototype to demo, but this isn't a sales call. Happy to drop by your office at Yishun Industrial Street 1 if that's easier!",
          "hook_used": "Fallback (no specific signals)",
          "value_line": "If you could just email or WhatsApp an AI assistant your export documents and get back an audit-ready reconciliation in Excel showing consistent shipment details across all documents, would that be useful?",

        "contact_name": "Gavriel Tan",

        "email_1": {
          "subject": "quick question on food",
          "body": "Hi Gavriel,\n\nWe're building an AI assistant that's always one step ahead for SG food processors.\n\nIt proactively checks in - running daily reconciliation of order data against export documents, tracking status of Health Cert applications and sending follow-ups, or giving you morning updates on critical export document deadlines - all without you having to ask.\n\nYou just WhatsApp or email it instructions and it does your back office work around the clock.\n\nWe're a Cambridge-backed group with a working prototype to demo, but this isn't a sales call. We're trying to learn what food teams actually find useful, what pain points keep coming up, and how you're thinking about future-proofing the business. 30 minutes of your time would make a big difference.\n\nI know you're busy, so let me know what time is best for a call or I can drop by your office at Republic Polytechnic Industry Centre if that's easier!\n\nBest,\nSeth\n\nP.S. Before our call, I can train our AI on your Halal + health cert stack so you can see exactly what we'd catch for Altimate Nutrition.",
          "ps_used": "Halal certified"
        },
        "email_2": {
          "subject": "Gavriel <> Seth",
          "body": "Hi Gavriel,\n\nI did some digging into Altimate Nutrition and had a few ideas on where we could save time:\n\n- Extract 99% accurate data from Altimate's purchase orders and test reports.\n- Generate complete, audit-ready Commercial Invoices and Packing Lists.\n- Flag inconsistencies across all export documents before SFA submission.\n\nHave you solved for export documentation prep or is your team still doing it manually?\n\nIf we could help you do the same and save 10+ hours a week, automatically from WhatsApp, email or any chat app you already use, would that be interesting?\n\nBest,\nSeth",
          "ideas_used": [
            "Extract 99% accurate data from Altimate's purchase orders and test reports.",
            "Generate complete, audit-ready Commercial Invoices and Packing Lists.",
            "Flag inconsistencies across all export documents before SFA submission."
          ]
        },

        "email_2": {
          "subject": "Jahan <> Seth",
          "body": "Hi Jahan,\n\nI did some digging into Jupiter 57 and had a few ideas on where we could save time:\n\n- Extract 99% accurate data from supplier invoices for faster processing.\n- Get audit-ready reconciliation of shipment docs to catch inconsistencies.\n- Flag certificate expiry and compliance issues that humans miss for Jupiter 57.\n\nHave you solved for export documentation prep or is your team still doing it manually?\n\nIf we could help you do the same and save 10+ hours a week, automatically from WhatsApp, email or any chat app you already use, would that be interesting?\n\nBest,\nSeth",
          "ideas_used": [
            "Extract 99% accurate data from supplier invoices for faster processing.",
            "Get audit-ready reconciliation of shipment docs to catch inconsistencies.",
            "Flag certificate expiry and compliance issues that humans miss for Jupiter 57."
          ]
        },
        "email_3": {
          "subject": "Re: quick question on food",
          "body": "Hi Jahan,\n\nMy co-founder and I are building a startup in Singapore to support local businesses and we wanted to reach out because your expertise could save us a ton of mistakes.\n\nGiven your experience in food, I was hoping to get your opinion.\n\nFor some background, we spoke with senior government leaders last week at Smart Nation - they shared that SMEs in underserved areas stand to gain the most from AI compared to MNCs.\n\nWe're now looking to figure out which are the biggest pain points food trading companies face and 30 minutes of your time would make a huge difference.\n\nWe're a Cambridge led group, based in SG, and have a prototype, but this is in no way a sales call.\n\nIf you could just email or WhatsApp an AI assistant your full set of import and export documents and get back an audit-ready reconciliation in Excel showing consistency across all your shipment documents, would that be useful?\n\nWould you be open to a quick chat to point us in the right direction?\n\nBest,\nSeth\n\nP.S. Happy to drop by your office at Duxton Road if that's easier!",
          "hook_used": "Fallback",
          "value_line": "just email or WhatsApp an AI assistant your full set of import and export documents and get back an audit-ready reconciliation in Excel showing consistency across all your shipment documents",
          "value_line_source": "document_pain_analysis, company_profile"
        },
        "linkedin_message": {
          "message": "Seth here. Given your experience leading Jupiter 57, I was hoping to get your opinion. Emailed you about our idea for a WhatsApp AI assistant that does back office work around the clock - sending a voice note too in case it missed you!",

        "voice_note": {
          "script": "Hi Jahan, I'm building an AI startup in Singapore focused on automating heavy back-office paperwork - a gap recently highlighted to us by government leaders in Smart Nation.We're a Cambridge-led team with a working prototype, and I'd love 20 minutes of your time to ensure we're solving the right pain points for firms like Jupiter 57.This isn't a sales call - just looking for your perspective.Happy to buy you lunch near your office at Duxton Road as a thank you.         "email_1": {
          "subject": "quick question on food",
          "body": "Hi Jing Yi,\n\nWe're building an AI assistant that's always one step ahead for SG food traders.\n\nIt proactively checks in - running daily reconciliation of invoices vs packing lists, tracking pending health and halal certifications, or giving you morning updates on critical export documents awaiting approval - all without you having to ask.\n\nYou just WhatsApp or email it instructions and it does your back office work around the clock.\n\nWe're a Cambridge-backed group with a working prototype to demo, but this isn't a sales call.       "stage1_result": {
        "company_name": "Sing Ghee Beancurd Manufacturer",
        "contact_name": "Chua Heng Tiong",
        "contact_email": "chuaheng.tiong@singghee.com",
        "email_1": {
          "subject": "quick question on food processing",
          "body": "Hi Heng Tiong,\n\nWe're building an AI assistant that's always one step ahead for SG food processors.\n\nIt proactively checks in - running daily reconciliations of Commercial Invoices and Packing Lists, tracking missing Health or Halal Certificates and sending automated follow-ups, or giving you morning updates on export documents awaiting submission - all without you having to ask.\n\nYou just WhatsApp or email it instructions and it does your back office work around the clock.\n\nWe're a Cambridge-backed group with a working prototype to demo, but this isn't a sales call. We're trying to learn what food processing teams actually find useful, what pain points keep coming up, and how you're thinking about future-proofing the business. 30 minutes of your time would make a big difference.\n\nI know you're busy, so let me know what time is best for a call or I can drop by your office at Shimei East Kitchen if that's easier!\n\nBest,\nSeth\n\nP.S. Before our call, I can train our AI on your export documents so you can see exactly what we'd catch for Sing Ghee Beancurd Manufacturer.",
          "ps_used": "generic training on export documents"
        },
        "email_2": {
          "subject": "Heng Tiong <> Seth",
          "body": "Hi Heng Tiong,\n\nI did some digging into Sing Ghee Beancurd Manufacturer and had a few ideas on where we could save time:\n\n- Extract 99% accurate data from supplier invoices for smooth finance operations.\n- Flag inconsistencies across export documents like COOs that humans miss.\n- Generate complete Commercial Invoices and Packing Lists for Sing Ghee in minutes.\n\nHave you solved for export documentation prep or is your team still doing it manually?\n\nIf we could help you do the same and save 10+ hours a week, automatically from WhatsApp, email or any chat app you already use, would that be interesting?\n\nBest,\nSeth",
          "ideas_used": [
            "Extract 99% accurate data from supplier invoices for smooth finance operations.",
            "Flag inconsistencies across export documents like COOs that humans miss.",
            "Generate complete Commercial Invoices and Packing Lists for Sing Ghee in minutes."
          ]
        },
        "email_3": {
          "subject": "Re: quick question on food processing",
          "body": "Hi Heng Tiong,\n\nMy co-founder and I are building a startup in Singapore to support local businesses and we wanted to reach out because your expertise could save us a ton of mistakes.\n\nGiven your experience in food, I was hoping to get your opinion.\n\nFor some background, we spoke with senior government leaders last week at Smart Nation - they shared that SMEs in underserved areas stand to gain the most from AI compared to MNCs.\n\nWe're now looking to figure out which are the biggest pain points food trading companies face and 30 minutes of your time would make a huge difference.\n\nWe're a Cambridge led group, based in SG, and have a prototype, but this is in no way a sales call.\n\nIf you could just email or WhatsApp an AI assistant your Commercial Invoices and Health Certificates and get back an audit-ready reconciliation in Excel showing all batch number and expiry date consistency across documents, would that be useful?\n\nWould you be open to a quick chat to point us in the right direction?\n\nBest,\nSeth\n\nP.S. Happy to drop by your office at Shimei East Kitchen if that's easier!",
          "hook_used": "Fallback (no specific signals)",
          "value_line": "just email or WhatsApp an AI assistant your Commercial Invoices and Health Certificates and get back an audit-ready reconciliation in Excel showing all batch number and expiry date consistency across documents",
          "value_line_source": "document_pain_analysis, company_profile"
        },
        "linkedin_message": {

          "body": "Hi Nadine,\n\nMy co-founder and I are building a startup in Singapore to support local businesses and we wanted to reach out because your expertise could save us a ton of mistakes.\n\nGiven your experience in food, I was hoping to get your opinion.\n\nFor some background, we spoke with senior government leaders last week at Smart Nation - they shared that SMEs in underserved areas stand to gain the most from AI compared to MNCs.\n\nWe're now looking to figure out which are the biggest pain points food trading companies face and 30 minutes of your time would make a huge difference.\n\nWe're a Cambridge led group, based in SG, and have a prototype, but this is in no way a sales call.\n\nIf you could just email or WhatsApp an AI assistant your shipment documents and get back a clean, audit-ready reconciliation in Excel that catches what humans miss, would that be useful?\n\nWould you be open to a quick chat to point us in the right direction?\n\nBest,\nSeth\n\nP.S.           "body": "Hi Nadine,\n\nI did some digging into Aerospring Hydroponics and had a few ideas on where we could save time:\n\n- Extract 99% accurate sales order details from Shopify and Amazon into export docs.\n- Flag discrepancies in weights and HS codes across your packing lists and carrier documents.\n- Generate audit-ready Commercial Invoices and Packing Lists from one source of truth.\n\nHave you solved for export documentation prep or is your team still doing it manually?\n\nIf we could help you do the same and save 10+ hours a week, automatically from WhatsApp, email or any chat app you already use, would that be interesting?\n\nBest,\nSeth",

    "498": {
      "company_name": "498",
      "stage1_status": "completed",
      "stage2_status": "pending",
      "stage1_result": {
        "company_name": "Lian Aik Trading",
        "contact_name": "Jimmy Ng Keng Siong",
        "contact_email": "jkengsiong@sfma.net",
        "email_1": {
          "subject": "quick question on food",
          "body": "Hi Jimmy,\n\nWe're building an AI assistant that's always one step ahead for SG food trading companies.\n\nIt proactively checks in - running daily reconciliation of import/export invoices against purchase orders, tracking missing health certificates or customs declarations, or giving you morning updates on new shipment documents awaiting processing - all without you having to ask.\n\nYou just WhatsApp or email it instructions and it does your back office work around the clock.\n\nWe're a Cambridge-backed group with a working prototype to demo, but this isn't a sales call. We're trying to learn what food teams actually find useful, what pain points keep coming up, and how you're thinking about future-proofing the business. 30 minutes of your time would make a big difference.\n\nI know you're busy, so let me know what time is best for a call or I can drop by your office at Kallang Distripark if that's easier!\n\nBest,\nSeth\n\nP.S. Before our call, I can train our AI on your export documents so you can see exactly what we'd catch for Lian Aik Trading.",
          "ps_used": "Before our call, I can train our AI on your export documents so you can see exactly what we'd catch for Lian Aik Trading."
        },
        "email_2": {
          "subject": "Jimmy <> Seth",
          "body": "Hi Jimmy,\n\nI did some digging into Lian Aik Trading and had a few ideas on where we could save time:\n\n- Extract 99% accurate data from supplier invoices for coffee beans.\n- Generate complete Commercial Invoices and Packing Lists for exports.\n- Flag inconsistencies across all shipment documents for Lian Aik Trading.\n\nHave you solved for export documentation prep or is your team still doing it manually?\n\nIf we could help you do the same and save 10+ hours a week, automatically from WhatsApp, email or any chat app you already use, would that be interesting?\n\nBest,\nSeth",
          "ideas_used": [
            "Extract 99% accurate data from supplier invoices for coffee beans.",
            "Generate complete Commercial Invoices and Packing Lists for exports.",
            "Flag inconsistencies across all shipment documents for Lian Aik Trading."
          ]
        },
        "email_3": {
          "subject": "Re: quick question on food",
          "body": "Hi Jimmy,\n\nMy co-founder and I are building a startup in Singapore to support local businesses and we wanted to reach out because your expertise could save us a ton of mistakes.\n\nGiven your experience in food, I was hoping to get your opinion.\n\nFor some background, we spoke with senior government leaders last week at Smart Nation - they shared that SMEs in underserved areas stand to gain the most from AI compared to MNCs.\n\nWe're now looking to figure out which are the biggest pain points food trading companies face and 30 minutes of your time would make a huge difference.\n\nWe're a Cambridge led group, based in SG, and have a prototype, but this is in no way a sales call.\n\nIf you could just email or WhatsApp an AI assistant your export documents and get back audit-ready reconciliation in Excel showing consistency across all your shipment documents, would that be useful?\n\nWould you be open to a quick chat to point us in the right direction?\n\nBest,\nSeth\n\nP.S. Happy to drop by your office at Kallang Distripark if that's easier!",
          "hook_used": "Fallback: Given your experience in {industry_short}, I was hoping to get your opinion.",
          "value_line": "If you could just email or WhatsApp an AI assistant your export documents and get back audit-ready reconciliation in Excel showing consistency across all your shipment documents, would that be useful?",
          "value_line_source": "document_pain_analysis, company_profile"
        },
        "linkedin_message": {
          "message": "N/A",
          "hook_used": "none",
          "generated": false
        },
        "voice_note": {
          "script": "N/A",
          "location_used": "none",
          "generated": false
        }
      },

        "contact_name": "Chin Chin Wong",

        "email_1": {
          "subject": "quick question on Food Processor",
          "body": "Hi Chin Chin,\n\nWe're building an AI assistant that's always one step ahead for SG Food Processors.\n\nIt proactively checks in - running daily reconciliation of commercial invoices vs packing lists, tracking outstanding health certificates and sending follow-ups, or giving you morning updates on export documents awaiting approval - all without you having to ask.\n\nYou just WhatsApp or email it instructions and it does your back office work around the clock.\n\nWe're a Cambridge-backed group with a working prototype to demo, but this isn't a sales call. We're trying to learn what food teams actually find useful, what pain points keep coming up, and how you're thinking about future-proofing the business. 30 minutes of your time would make a big difference.\n\nI know you're busy, so let me know what time is best for a call or I can drop by your office at South Bridge Road if that's easier!\n\nBest,\nSeth\n\nP.S. Before our call, I can train our AI on your Halal + health cert stack so you can see exactly how it handles the compliance docs for QAF Limited.",
          "ps_used": "Halal certified stack for {company_name}"
        },
        "email_2": {
          "subject": "Chin Chin <> Seth",
          "body": "Hi Chin Chin,\n\nI did some digging into QAF Limited and had a few ideas on where we could save time:\n\n- Extract 99% accurate data from diverse APAC shipment documents for consistent processing.\n- Flag inconsistencies across commercial invoices and health certificates to prevent customs delays.\n- Generate complete, ready-to-review summaries of export data for SFA and TradeNet submissions.\n\nHave you solved for export documentation prep or is your team still doing it manually?\n\nIf we could help you do the same and save 10+ hours a week, automatically from WhatsApp, email or any chat app you already use, would that be interesting?\n\nBest,\nSeth",
          "ideas_used": [
            "Extract 99% accurate data from diverse APAC shipment documents for consistent processing.",
            "Flag inconsistencies across commercial invoices and health certificates to prevent customs delays.",
            "Generate complete, ready-to-review summaries of export data for SFA and TradeNet submissions."
          ]
        },
        "email_3": {
          "subject": "Re: quick question on Food Processor",
          "body": "Hi Chin Chin,\n\nMy co-founder and I are building a startup in Singapore to support local businesses and we wanted to reach out because your expertise could save us a ton of mistakes.\n\nGiven your experience in food, I was hoping to get your opinion.\n\nFor some background, we spoke with senior government leaders last week at Smart Nation - they shared that SMEs in underserved areas stand to gain the most from AI compared to MNCs.\n\nWe're now looking to figure out which are the biggest pain points food trading companies face and 30 minutes of your time would make a huge difference.\n\nWe're a Cambridge led group, based in SG, and have a prototype, but this is in no way a sales call.\n\nIf you could just email or WhatsApp an AI assistant your export documents and get back audit-ready reconciliations and applications for regulatory submissions in Excel, would that be useful?\n\nWould you be open to a quick chat to point us in the right direction?\n\nBest,\nSeth\n\nP.S. Happy to drop by your office at South Bridge Road if that's easier!",
          "hook_used": "Fallback (none)",
          "value_line": "just email or WhatsApp an AI assistant your export documents and get back audit-ready reconciliations and applications for regulatory submissions in Excel",

          "body": "Hi John,\n\nWe're building an AI assistant that's always one step ahead for SG food wholesalers.\n\nIt proactively checks in - running daily reconciliation of export documents against shipping instructions, tracking pending health certificates and sending follow-ups, or giving you morning updates on invoices awaiting approval - all without you having to ask.\n\nYou just WhatsApp or email it instructions and it does your back office work around the clock.\n\nWe're a Cambridge-backed group with a working prototype to demo, but this isn't a sales call.         "email_2": {

          "body": "Hi John,\n\nI did some digging into JT Network and had a few ideas on where we could save time:\n\n- Audit-ready reconciliation of shipment data across all documents.\n- Extract 99% accurate data from Bills of Lading and AWBs for JT Network.\n- Flagging inconsistent HS codes or quantities across export documents.\n\nHave you solved for export documentation prep or is your team still doing it manually?\n\nIf we could help you do the same and save 10+ hours a week, automatically from WhatsApp, email or any chat app you already use, would that be interesting?\n\nBest,\nSeth",
          "ideas_used": [
            "Audit-ready reconciliation of shipment data across all documents.",
            "Extract 99% accurate data from Bills of Lading and AWBs for JT Network.",
            "Flagging inconsistent HS codes or quantities across export documents."

        "email_3": {
          "subject": "Re: quick question on food",
          "body": "Hi John,\n\nMy co-founder and I are building a startup in Singapore to support local businesses and we wanted to reach out because your expertise could save us a ton of mistakes.\n\nNoticed JT Network announced Pepagora joined JTN GEKS 2026 as a Growth Partner for Growth - figured you'd have perspective on how operations are scaling.\n\nFor some background, we spoke with senior government leaders last week at Smart Nation - they shared that SMEs in underserved areas stand to gain the most from AI compared to MNCs.\n\nWe're now looking to figure out which are the biggest pain points food trading companies face and 30 minutes of your time would make a huge difference.\n\nWe're a Cambridge led group, based in SG, and have a prototype, but this is in no way a sales call.\n\nIf you could just email or WhatsApp an AI assistant your export documents and get back audit-ready reconciliation in Excel showing all consistent data, would that be useful?\n\nWould you be open to a quick chat to point us in the right direction?\n\nBest,\nSeth\n\nP.S. Happy to drop by your office at Paya Lebar Rd if that's easier!",
          "hook_used": "News",
          "value_line": "just email or WhatsApp an AI assistant your export documents and get back audit-ready reconciliation in Excel showing all consistent data",

        "linkedin_message": {
          "message": "Seth here. Given your experience at JT Network, I was hoping to get your opinion. Emailed you about our idea for a WhatsApp AI assistant that does back office work around the clock - sending a voice note too in case it missed you!",

    "505": {
      "company_name": "505",
      "stage1_status": "completed",
      "stage2_status": "pending",
      "stage1_result": {
        "company_name": "WhatIF Foods",
        "contact_name": "Chris Langwallner",
        "contact_email": "chris@whatif-foods.com",
        "email_1": {
          "subject": "quick question on food processing",
          "body": "Hi Chris,\\n\\nWe're building an AI assistant that's always one step ahead for SG food processors.\\n\\nIt proactively checks in - running daily reconciliation of Commercial Invoices against Packing Lists, tracking missing Health Certificates and sending follow-ups, or giving you morning updates on Certificates of Origin awaiting approval - all without you having to ask.\\n\\nYou just WhatsApp or email it instructions and it does your back office work around the clock.\\n\\nWe're a Cambridge-backed group with a working prototype to demo, but this isn't a sales call. We're trying to learn what food processing teams actually find useful, what pain points keep coming up, and how you're thinking about future-proofing the business. 30 minutes of your time would make a big difference.\\n\\nI know you're busy, so let me know what time is best for a call or I can drop by your office at CleanTech One if that's easier!\\n\\nBest,\\nSeth\\n\\nP.S. Before our call, I can train our AI on your export documentation so you can see exactly what we'd catch for WhatIF Foods.",
          "ps_used": "Before our call, I can train our AI on your export documentation so you can see exactly what we'd catch for WhatIF Foods."
        },
        "email_2": {
          "subject": "Chris <> Seth",
          "body": "Hi Chris,\\n\\nI did some digging into WhatIF Foods and had a few ideas on where we could save time:\\n\\n- Extract 99% accurate data from your Commercial Invoices and Packing Lists.\\n- Generate audit-ready Certificates of Origin and Health Certificates for diverse markets.\\n- Flag inconsistencies across all shipment documents before SFA or TradeNet submission.\\n\\nHave you solved for export documentation prep or is your team still doing it manually?\\n\\nIf we could help you do the same and save 10+ hours a week, automatically from WhatsApp, email or any chat app you already use, would that be interesting?\\n\\nBest,\\nSeth",
          "ideas_used": [
            "Extract 99% accurate data from your Commercial Invoices and Packing Lists.",
            "Generate audit-ready Certificates of Origin and Health Certificates for diverse markets.",
            "Flag inconsistencies across all shipment documents before SFA or TradeNet submission."
          ]
        },
        "email_3": {
          "subject": "quick question on food",
          "body": "Hi Chris,\\n\\nMy co-founder and I are building a startup in Singapore to support local businesses and we wanted to reach out because your expertise could save us a ton of mistakes.\\n\\nGiven your experience in food, I was hoping to get your opinion.\\n\\nFor some background, we spoke with senior government leaders last week at Smart Nation - they shared that SMEs in underserved areas stand to gain the most from AI compared to MNCs.\\n\\nWe're now looking to figure out which are the biggest pain points food trading companies face and 30 minutes of your time would make a huge difference.\\n\\nWe're a Cambridge led group, based in SG, and have a prototype, but this is in no way a sales call.\\n\\nIf you could just email or WhatsApp an AI assistant your export documentation and get back an audit-ready reconciliation of all your shipment documents in Excel, would that be useful?\\n\\nWould you be open to a quick chat to point us in the right direction?\\n\\nBest,\\nSeth\\n\\nP.S. Happy to drop by your office at CleanTech One if that's easier!",
          "hook_used": "Fallback (none)",
          "value_line": "If you could just email or WhatsApp an AI assistant your export documentation and get back an audit-ready reconciliation of all your shipment documents in Excel, would that be useful?",
          "value_line_source": "document_pain_analysis, company_profile"
        },
        "linkedin_message": {
          "message": "Seth here. Given your experience leading WhatIF Foods, I was hoping to get your opinion. Emailed you about our idea for a WhatsApp AI assistant that does back office work around the clock - sending a voice note too in case it missed you!",
          "hook_used": "C-suite",
          "generated": true
        },
        "voice_note": {
          "script": "Hi Chris, I'm building an AI startup in Singapore focused on automating heavy back-office paperwork - a gap recently highlighted to us by government leaders in Smart Nation.\\n\\nWe're a Cambridge-led team with a working prototype, and I'd love 20 minutes of your time to ensure we're solving the right pain points for firms like WhatIF Foods.\\n\\nThis isn't a sales call - just looking for your perspective.\\n\\nHappy to buy you lunch near your office at CleanTech One as a thank you. Would you be open to a quick chat?",
          "location_used": "CleanTech One",
          "generated": true
        }
      },

    "508": {
      "company_name": "508",
      "stage1_status": "completed",
      "stage2_status": "pending",
      "stage1_result": {
        "company_name": "A. Clouet Singapore",
        "contact_name": "Nicolas Denis",
        "contact_email": "nicolas@denis.com",
        "email_1": {
          "subject": "quick question on food",
          "body": "Hi Nicolas,\n\nMy co-founder and I are building a startup in Singapore to support local businesses and we wanted to reach out because your expertise could save us a ton of mistakes.\n\nNoticed Ayam Brand strengthened community bonds with a nationwide campaign - figured you'd have perspective on how operations are scaling.\n\nFor some background, we spoke with senior government leaders last week at Smart Nation - they shared that SMEs in underserved areas stand to gain the most from AI compared to MNCs.\n\nWe're now looking to figure out which are the biggest pain points food trading companies face and 30 minutes of your time would make a huge difference.\n\nWe're a Cambridge led group, based in SG, and have a prototype, but this is in no way a sales call.\n\nIf you could just email or WhatsApp an AI assistant your full export document set and get back audit-ready reconciliation in Excel, would that be useful?\n\nWould you be open to a quick chat to point us in the right direction?\n\nBest,\nSeth\n\nP.S. Happy to drop by your office at New Tech Park if that's easier!",
          "ps_used": "Happy to drop by your office at New Tech Park if that's easier!"
        },
        "email_2": {
          "subject": "Re: quick question on food",
          "body": "Hi Nicolas,\n\nJust wanted to check in again in case this missed your inbox.\n\nWe're building an AI assistant that's always one step ahead. It proactively checks in - giving you morning updates on pending halal certificate renewals, tracking inconsistencies across your Commercial Invoices and Packing Lists, or running weekly audits on export document packages for specific markets without you having to ask.\n\nCurious whether teams in food would actually use this from WhatsApp or email - would love your perspective if you have 15 mins.\n\nBest,\nSeth\n\nP.S. Before the call, I can train our AI on your Halal + health cert stack so you can see exactly how it handles the compliance docs for A. Clouet Singapore.",
          "ideas_used": [
            "giving you morning updates on pending halal certificate renewals",
            "tracking inconsistencies across your Commercial Invoices and Packing Lists",
            "running weekly audits on export document packages for specific markets"
          ]
        },
        "email_3": {
          "subject": "Nicolas <> Seth",
          "body": "Hi Nicolas,\n\nI did some digging into A. Clouet Singapore and had a few ideas on where we could save time:\n\n- Extract 99% accurate data from supplier invoices and purchase orders for faster processing.\n- Generate audit-ready Commercial Invoices, Packing Lists, and COOs from a single data entry.\n- Flag discrepancies that humans miss across your full export document set for SFA submission.\n\nHave you solved for export documentation prep or is your team still doing it manually?\n\nIf we could help you do the same and save 10+ hours a week, automatically from WhatsApp, email or any chat app you already use, would that be interesting?\n\nBest,\nSeth",
          "hook_used": "Noticed Ayam Brand strengthened community bonds with a nationwide campaign - figured you'd have perspective on how operations are scaling.",
          "value_line": "If you could just email or WhatsApp an AI assistant your full export document set and get back audit-ready reconciliation in Excel, would that be useful?",
          "value_line_source": "document_pain_analysis"
        },
        "linkedin_message": {
